model_requirements.description: Restaurants is a global foodservice industry operating quick-service, casual, and fine-dining establishments through franchise and company-owned models, serving millions of customers daily with a focus on speed, quality, and value.

_vibe_session_metadata.summary: Model quality: 91/100 (14 warnings, 0 errors). 153 tables across 13 domains.

model.name: Restaurants
model.description: Restaurants is a global foodservice industry operating quick-service, casual, and fine-dining establishments through franchise and company-owned models, serving millions of customers daily with a focus on speed, quality, and value.
model.core_business_processes: Menu Development and Engineering, Food Procurement and Supply Chain Management, Restaurant Operations and Service Delivery, Franchise Management and Development, Quality Assurance and Food Safety Compliance, Customer Order Management and Fulfillment, Workforce Scheduling and Labor Management, Marketing and Promotional Campaign Execution, Financial Planning and Revenue Management, Real Estate Site Selection and Facility Management
model.data_domains: Menu, Guest, Order, Supply Chain, Restaurant Operations, Workforce, Franchise, Marketing, Finance, Food Safety, Inventory, Loyalty, Real Estate
model.common_business_jargons: QSR (Quick-Service Restaurant), COGS (Cost of Goods Sold), AUV (Average Unit Volume), PMIX (Product Mix), BOH (Back of House), FOH (Front of House), POS (Point of Sale), KDS (Kitchen Display System), LTO (Limited Time Offer), HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points), SOP (Standard Operating Procedure), FTE (Full-Time Equivalent), ADT (Average Daily Transactions), ATC (Average Transaction Count), ACV (Average Check Value), SSS (Same-Store Sales), NRO (New Restaurant Opening), CSAT (Customer Satisfaction), NPS (Net Promoter Score), DT (Drive-Thru), OLO (Online Ordering), 3PD (Third-Party Delivery), SKU (Stock Keeping Unit), BOM (Bill of Materials), R&M (Repairs and Maintenance), P&L (Profit and Loss), EBITDA (Earnings Before Interest Taxes Depreciation and Amortization), ROI (Return on Investment), CRM (Customer Relationship Management), ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), WMS (Warehouse Management System), GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice), FDA (Food and Drug Administration), OSHA (Occupational Safety and Health Administration), CoGS% (Cost of Goods Sold Percentage), Labor% (Labor Cost Percentage), Speed of Service (SOS), Ticket Time, Daypart, Throughput, Comp Sales (Comparable Store Sales), Franchise Fee, Royalty Rate, CAM (Common Area Maintenance), CapEx (Capital Expenditure), OpEx (Operating Expenditure), PAR Level (Periodic Automatic Replenishment Level), Waste% (Food Waste Percentage), Yield Management, Table Turn, Cover Count
model.operational_systems_of_records: Oracle MICROS POS (order capture; payment processing; menu management), SAP S/4HANA (GL; AP; AR; FA; CO; MM), Workday HCM (recruiting; payroll; benefits; time tracking; workforce planning), MarketMan Inventory Management (stock tracking; purchase orders; vendor management; waste tracking), Salesforce CRM (franchise relations; guest engagement; marketing automation), FranConnect (franchise development; compliance tracking; royalty management; site selection), Olo Digital Ordering Platform (online ordering; delivery integration; guest data), Zenput (food safety audits; task management; operational compliance), Coupa Procurement (sourcing; supplier management; contract management; spend analytics), Planday Workforce Scheduling (shift planning; labor forecasting; time and attendance)
model.industry_governing_body: FDA (Food and Drug Administration) - food safety and labeling regulations, USDA (United States Department of Agriculture) - meat and poultry inspection and grading, OSHA (Occupational Safety and Health Administration) - workplace safety standards, FTC (Federal Trade Commission) - franchise disclosure and advertising regulations, NRA (National Restaurant Association) - industry standards and ServSafe certification, Local Health Departments - restaurant inspection and permitting, IFA (International Franchise Association) - franchise best practices and ethics, ISO 22000 - Food Safety Management Systems, PCI DSS (Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard) - payment data security, GAAP/IFRS - financial reporting standards

domains.name: menu
domains.description: Single source of truth for all menu items, recipes, BOMs (Bill of Materials), nutritional data, allergen declarations, pricing, product mix (PMIX), limited time offers (LTO), and menu engineering decisions across dayparts, channels (DT, OLO, 3PD), and restaurant formats (QSR, casual, fine-dining). Governs what the business sells.
domains.references: FDA Nutrition Labeling (21 CFR Part 101), ISO 22000

products.name: menu_item
products.description: Master record for every sellable item on the menu across all restaurant formats (QSR, casual, fine-dining) and service channels (DT, OLO, 3PD, dine-in). Captures item identity, guest-facing name, internal name, description, PLU/SKU code, category, sub-category, daypart availability flags, format eligibility flags, channel availability flags, item status (active/inactive/seasonal/LTO), prep time estimate, portion size, serving temperature, calorie display value, image asset reference, and lifecycle dates (created, launched, discontinued). This is the SSOT for what the business sells — the anchor entity for the entire menu domain.

attributes.name: menu_item_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each menu item record in the lakehouse. Primary key for the menu_item master data product.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Item Master

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: Menu items are brand-owned master data. Brand-level menu engineering, nutritional compliance reporting, and franchise menu approval all require direct brand association on menu_item. A foodservice dom

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Required for Campaign Planning: associate specific menu items with marketing campaigns (e.g., seasonal featured dishes) to enable menu rollout, budgeting, and performance reporting.

attributes.name: created_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Menu item creation workflow requires recording the employee (chef/manager) who created the item for audit and traceability.

attributes.name: franchisee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: Franchisee Menu Customization Report requires linking each menu item to the owning franchisee for localized availability and pricing decisions.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Revenue reporting requires each menu item to map to a GL account for posting sales; finance teams use this for daily sales ledger reconciliation.

attributes.name: haccp_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to foodsafety.haccp_plan. Business justification: REGULATORY: HACCP compliance per menu item is required for safety reporting and audit traceability.

attributes.name: stock_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.stock_item. Business justification: Required for POS and inventory forecasting: each menu item must be linked to its underlying stock item (SKU) to reconcile sales with inventory levels and generate daily sales‑vs‑stock reports.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.supply_supplier. Business justification: REQUIRED: Supplier sourcing for each menu item is needed for cost analysis, procurement planning, and supplier performance dashboards; experts expect a direct supplier_id on menu_item.

attributes.name: allergen_flags
attributes.description: Pipe-delimited list of the FDA's 9 major food allergens present in this menu item (milk, eggs, fish, shellfish, tree_nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, sesame). Required for FDA allergen labeling compliance and guest safety disclosures on OLO and 3PD platforms. Example: 'wheat|milk|soy'.
attributes.references: FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA); FASTER Act (2021); FDA 21 CFR Part 101

attributes.name: base_price
attributes.description: The standard retail selling price of the menu item before any discounts, promotions, or channel-specific pricing adjustments. Expressed in the local operating currency. This is the principal quantitative value (MEASUREMENT_OR_VALUE) for this MASTER_RESOURCE entity.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Price Level 1; SAP S/4HANA SD Pricing

attributes.name: calorie_count
attributes.description: Total caloric content of the menu item in kilocalories (kcal) per standard serving. Mandatory disclosure on menus for restaurant chains with 20+ locations under FDA Menu Labeling Rule (Section 4205 of the ACA).
attributes.references: FDA Menu Labeling Rule (21 CFR Part 101.11); ACA Section 4205

attributes.name: cost
attributes.description: Standard cost of goods sold (COGS) for this menu item, representing the total ingredient and packaging cost per serving. Used to calculate CoGS% and gross margin in P&L reporting. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA CO and MarketMan BOM costing.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO — Standard Cost; MarketMan BOM Costing; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this menu item record was first created in the system of record (Oracle MICROS POS). Represents the business creation event, not the ETL load time. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Record Audit; ISO 8601

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base_price and cost fields (e.g., USD, CAD, GBP). Supports multi-currency operations across international franchise markets.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; GAAP/IFRS Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: daypart
attributes.description: The daypart(s) during which this menu item is available for sale. Daypart segmentation drives kitchen prep scheduling, labor planning, and PMIX reporting by time-of-day. Standard foodservice dayparts: breakfast, lunch, dinner, late_night, snack, all_day.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Daypart Configuration; NRA Daypart Standards

attributes.name: discontinue_date
attributes.description: The date this menu item was permanently discontinued and removed from the menu. Null for active items. Used for menu lifecycle management, historical PMIX analysis, and supply chain wind-down planning.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Item Effective Date

attributes.name: image_url
attributes.description: URL of the approved product image for this menu item used on digital menus, OLO platform, 3PD marketplace listings, and marketing materials. Must reference the approved brand asset in the digital asset management system.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform — Item Image; Salesforce CRM — Digital Asset Management

attributes.name: is_3pd_available
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item is available through Third-Party Delivery (3PD) partners (e.g., DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub). Controls item syndication to 3PD marketplace menus via Olo integration.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform — 3PD Channel Integration

attributes.name: is_customizable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item supports guest customization (e.g., add/remove ingredients, size selection, preparation modifications). Drives modifier group configuration in Oracle MICROS POS and OLO ordering flows.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Modifier Configuration; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: is_dine_in_available
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item is available for dine-in service. Used to configure FOH (Front of House) menu boards and server-facing POS screens.

attributes.name: is_dt_available
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item is available for sale through the Drive-Thru (DT) channel. Used to configure channel-specific menus in Oracle MICROS POS and drive-thru menu boards.

attributes.name: is_gluten_free
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item is certified or designated as gluten-free per FDA gluten-free labeling standards (less than 20 ppm gluten). Used for allergen filtering on digital ordering platforms and guest safety disclosures.
attributes.references: FDA Gluten-Free Labeling Rule (21 CFR Part 101.91); FALCPA

attributes.name: is_lto
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item is a Limited Time Offer (LTO). LTO items have defined availability windows and are used for promotional campaigns, seasonal offerings, and new product testing. Drives marketing campaign execution and supply chain planning.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — LTO Configuration; Salesforce CRM — Campaign Management

attributes.name: is_olo_available
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item is available through the Online Ordering (OLO) digital channel. Controls item visibility on the Olo Digital Ordering Platform for web and mobile ordering.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform — Menu Availability

attributes.name: is_taxable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item is subject to sales tax. Tax applicability varies by jurisdiction and item type (e.g., prepared food vs. grocery). Drives tax calculation in Oracle MICROS POS and SAP S/4HANA AR.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Tax Configuration; SAP S/4HANA SD Tax; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: is_vegan
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item meets vegan dietary criteria (no animal products including dairy and eggs). Used for dietary filter functionality on OLO, 3PD platforms, and in-restaurant menu boards.
attributes.references: FDA Menu Labeling Rule; NRA Dietary Disclosure Guidelines

attributes.name: is_vegetarian
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item meets vegetarian dietary criteria (no meat, poultry, or seafood). Used for dietary filter functionality on OLO, 3PD platforms, and in-restaurant menu boards.
attributes.references: FDA Menu Labeling Rule; NRA Dietary Disclosure Guidelines

attributes.name: item_code
attributes.description: Externally-known alphanumeric business identifier for the menu item used across POS, KDS, ERP, and supply chain systems. Equivalent to the PLU (Price Look-Up) code in Oracle MICROS POS.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — PLU Code; SAP S/4HANA MM Material Number

attributes.name: item_description
attributes.description: Long-form marketing and operational description of the menu item including key ingredients, preparation style, and flavor profile. Used on digital menus, OLO platform, 3PD integrations, and guest-facing materials.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform — Item Description; FDA Menu Labeling Rule (21 CFR Part 101)

attributes.name: item_name
attributes.description: The customer-facing display name of the menu item as it appears on the menu board, POS screen, and digital ordering channels (DT, OLO, 3PD).
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Item Master; FDA Menu Labeling Rule (21 CFR Part 101)

attributes.name: item_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the menu item. 'active' = currently sold; 'inactive' = temporarily removed; 'lto' = Limited Time Offer (LTO) with defined availability window; 'discontinued' = permanently removed; 'pending_launch' = approved but not yet live; 'suspended' = pulled due to safety or supply issue.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Item Status; FDA Menu Labeling Rule

attributes.name: launch_date
attributes.description: The date this menu item was first made available for sale across the restaurant network. Used for item lifecycle tracking, PMIX trend analysis, and new product performance reporting.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Item Effective Date; NRA Menu Engineering

attributes.name: lto_end_date
attributes.description: The date on which a Limited Time Offer (LTO) menu item is removed from sale. Null for non-LTO items. Triggers automatic item deactivation in POS and removal from OLO and 3PD channel menus.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — LTO Scheduling; Salesforce CRM — Campaign Calendar

attributes.name: lto_start_date
attributes.description: The date on which a Limited Time Offer (LTO) menu item becomes available for sale. Null for non-LTO items. Used to coordinate marketing campaign launches, supply chain procurement, and POS menu activation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — LTO Scheduling; Salesforce CRM — Campaign Calendar

attributes.name: menu_engineering_class
attributes.description: Menu engineering quadrant classification based on the item's profitability and popularity: 'star' (high profit, high popularity), 'plow_horse' (low profit, high popularity), 'puzzle' (high profit, low popularity), 'dog' (low profit, low popularity). Used by menu development teams to make pricing and promotion decisions.
attributes.references: NRA Menu Engineering Standards; Kasavana & Smith Menu Engineering Model

attributes.name: portion_size_grams
attributes.description: Standard portion weight of the menu item in grams as defined in the recipe and BOM (Bill of Materials). Used for food cost control, yield management, waste tracking, and FDA nutrition label compliance.
attributes.references: FDA Menu Labeling Rule (21 CFR Part 101); USDA Food Composition Standards; MarketMan BOM

attributes.name: prep_time_seconds
attributes.description: Standard preparation time for this menu item measured in seconds, from order receipt on the KDS (Kitchen Display System) to item ready. Used for Speed of Service (SOS) benchmarking, Ticket Time targets, and kitchen throughput planning.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — KDS Prep Time; NRA Speed of Service Standards

attributes.name: restaurant_format
attributes.description: Identifies which restaurant format(s) this menu item is eligible for: QSR (Quick-Service Restaurant), casual dining, fine dining, or all formats. Governs menu item availability across the restaurant portfolio.
attributes.references: FranConnect — Restaurant Format Classification; Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: serving_temperature
attributes.description: Required serving temperature classification for this menu item: hot, cold, ambient, or frozen. Critical for HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points) compliance, food safety SOPs, and Zenput audit checklists.
attributes.references: FDA Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA); HACCP Guidelines; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management

attributes.name: sku_code
attributes.description: Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) code that links the sellable menu item to its corresponding inventory and procurement record in MarketMan and SAP S/4HANA MM. Enables COGS tracking and PAR level management.
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management — SKU Master; SAP S/4HANA MM

attributes.name: sodium_mg
attributes.description: Sodium content of the menu item in milligrams (mg) per standard serving. Required for FDA nutrition disclosure and supports guest health-conscious ordering decisions on digital platforms.
attributes.references: FDA Menu Labeling Rule (21 CFR Part 101.11); USDA Dietary Guidelines

attributes.name: sort_order
attributes.description: Numeric sort order controlling the display sequence of this item within its category on POS screens, digital menu boards, OLO, and 3PD platforms. Lower values appear first. Used by menu engineering teams to influence guest ordering behavior.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Item Sort Order; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: source_system_code
attributes.description: The native item identifier from the operational source system (Oracle MICROS POS) from which this record was ingested into the lakehouse Silver layer. Enables lineage tracing and reconciliation between the lakehouse and the POS system of record.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Item Master; Databricks Lakehouse Data Lineage

attributes.name: subcategory
attributes.description: Secondary classification within the item category for granular PMIX analysis and menu engineering (e.g., Burger, Chicken Sandwich, Fountain Drink, Milkshake, French Fries). Supports drill-down reporting in P&L and product mix analytics.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Subcategory; NRA Menu Engineering Standards

attributes.name: tax_category_code
attributes.description: Tax category code assigned to this menu item in SAP S/4HANA for jurisdiction-specific tax rate determination. Maps to the tax condition type in SD pricing. Examples: FOOD_PREP, BEVERAGE_ALCO, BEVERAGE_NON_ALCO.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA SD Tax Condition Types; GAAP/IFRS; Local Tax Regulations

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to this menu item record in the system of record. Used to detect changes for incremental lakehouse ingestion and to track menu item modification history. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Record Audit; ISO 8601

products.name: menu
products.description: Master record for each published menu — the container that groups menu items for a specific restaurant format, daypart, channel, and effective date range. Tracks menu name, version, format (QSR/casual/fine-dining), channel (DT/OLO/3PD/dine-in), daypart (breakfast/lunch/dinner/late-night), effective start/end dates, approval status, and publishing state. Enables menu versioning and rollout governance.

attributes.name: menu_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each published menu record in the lakehouse. Serves as the primary key for all downstream joins and lineage tracking.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: Menus exist at brand level (master menus) independent of any specific unit. Brand-level menu compliance, franchise menu approval workflows, and brand standard audits require direct brand association o

attributes.name: created_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Menu versioning is driven by a menu manager; capturing the creator enables change‑control and reporting.

attributes.name: financial_period_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.financial_period. Business justification: Menu version approval and activation is tied to fiscal periods for menu engineering reviews and budget cycle planning. Foodservice finance and operations teams track which menu version was active in e

attributes.name: franchisee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: Franchisee‑specific menu versions are tracked for regional offerings; the Franchisee Menu Management process needs this FK.

attributes.name: haccp_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to foodsafety.haccp_plan. Business justification: OPERATIONS: The entire menu is governed by a HACCP plan that drives safety checks across all items.

attributes.name: program_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to loyalty.program. Business justification: Loyalty program menu configuration: QSR loyalty apps serve program-specific digital menus with member pricing and exclusive items. The menu record must reference which loyalty program it serves to dri

attributes.name: site_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.site. Business justification: Required for site‑specific menu publishing, compliance, and pricing; each restaurant location (site) maintains its own active menu.

attributes.name: territory_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.territory. Business justification: Regional Menu Planning uses territory assignment to determine which menu set applies to each geographic area.

attributes.name: unit_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.unit. Business justification: Required for POS and reporting to assign each menu to the specific restaurant unit where it is served.

attributes.name: allergen_disclosure_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu requires allergen declarations for the nine FDA-recognized major food allergens (milk, eggs, fish, shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, sesame). Supports HACCP compliance and guest safety.
attributes.references: FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA); HACCP

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Current workflow state of the menu in the approval lifecycle. Menus must be approved before publishing. Tracks progression from draft through review, approval, and eventual archival.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Governance Policy; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101

attributes.name: approved_by
attributes.description: Name or employee identifier of the individual who granted final approval for this menu version. Required for audit trail and regulatory compliance with FDA food labeling and franchise disclosure obligations.
attributes.references: FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations

attributes.name: approved_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the menu received final approval, recorded in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Establishes the official approval event in the menu lifecycle audit trail.
attributes.references: FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; Internal Audit Policy

attributes.name: category_count
attributes.description: Total number of menu categories (e.g., Burgers, Sides, Beverages, Desserts) included in this menu version. Supports menu structure analysis and POS display configuration.

attributes.name: channel
attributes.description: The ordering or service channel this menu is published for. Drive-Thru (DT), Online Ordering (OLO), Third-Party Delivery (3PD), dine-in, kiosk, and catering channels may carry different item availability, pricing, and promotional content. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: dine_in|drive_thru|olo|third_party_delivery|kiosk|catering|curbside|mobile_app — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform; Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code identifying the country where this menu is published. Drives regulatory compliance (FDA, USDA, local health departments), currency, and language localization.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; FDA Food Labeling Regulations; USDA

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this menu record was first created in the system, recorded in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Establishes the beginning of the menu's audit trail.
attributes.references: Internal Data Governance Standard; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code applicable to all pricing on this menu (e.g., 'USD', 'CAD', 'GBP'). Ensures consistent financial reporting and P&L (Profit and Loss) attribution across markets.

attributes.name: daypart
attributes.description: The meal period or daypart this menu is active for. Daypart segmentation drives kitchen prep, staffing, and PMIX (Product Mix) analytics. Standard dayparts include breakfast, lunch, dinner, late-night, snack, and all-day.

attributes.name: daypart_end_time
attributes.description: The local wall-clock time (HH:MM, 24-hour) at which this menu's daypart ends service. Used by POS and KDS to automatically deactivate the menu and transition to the next daypart.

attributes.name: daypart_start_time
attributes.description: The local wall-clock time (HH:MM, 24-hour) at which this menu's daypart begins service. Used by POS and KDS (Kitchen Display System) to automatically switch active menus.

attributes.name: digital_menu_board_enabled
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu is configured for display on digital menu boards in restaurant locations. Digital menu boards require specific image assets, layout templates, and real-time price synchronization.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management; Internal Operations SOP

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: The calendar date on which this menu version is retired and no longer available for ordering. Null indicates an open-ended menu with no planned expiry. Critical for LTO (Limited Time Offer) lifecycle management.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Governance Policy; FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: The calendar date on which this menu version becomes active and available for ordering. Governs menu rollout scheduling for New Restaurant Openings (NRO), Limited Time Offers (LTO), and seasonal rotations.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Governance Policy; FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations

attributes.name: engineering_tier
attributes.description: Menu engineering classification based on the Boston Consulting Group (BCG) matrix adapted for foodservice: Stars (high popularity, high margin), Plow Horses (high popularity, low margin), Puzzles (low popularity, high margin), Dogs (low popularity, low margin). Drives strategic menu optimization decisions.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Menu Engineering Standards

attributes.name: haccp_reviewed
attributes.business_glossary_term: Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points (HACCP) Reviewed Indicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu version has undergone a HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points) review to ensure all items meet food safety critical control point requirements before publication.
attributes.references: HACCP; FDA 21 CFR Part 120; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management Systems

attributes.name: is_default
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu is the default active menu for its restaurant format, channel, and daypart combination. Only one menu per format-channel-daypart combination should be flagged as default at any point in time.

attributes.name: is_franchise_menu
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu is designated for franchise-operated restaurants as opposed to company-owned locations. Franchise menus may have restricted customization rights governed by the Franchise Disclosure Document (FDD).
attributes.references: FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations; IFA (International Franchise Association) Best Practices

attributes.name: is_lto
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu is a Limited Time Offer (LTO) menu with a defined promotional window. LTO menus drive incremental traffic and require distinct PMIX tracking, marketing support, and supply chain coordination.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Menu Engineering Standards

attributes.name: item_count
attributes.description: Total number of distinct menu items included in this menu version. Used in menu engineering analysis to assess menu complexity, PMIX (Product Mix) breadth, and operational throughput impact.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Menu Engineering Standards

attributes.name: kds_routing_profile
attributes.description: Identifier for the KDS (Kitchen Display System) routing profile associated with this menu. Determines how orders are routed to BOH (Back of House) preparation stations based on item categories and prep sequences.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Internal Kitchen Operations SOP

attributes.name: language_code
attributes.description: IETF BCP 47 language code for the menu's display language (e.g., 'en-US', 'fr-CA', 'es-MX'). Supports multilingual menu publishing for diverse guest populations and regulatory bilingual requirements.
attributes.references: IETF BCP 47; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this menu record was most recently updated, recorded in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Used for change detection, incremental ETL processing, and audit compliance.
attributes.references: Internal Data Governance Standard; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: market_region
attributes.description: The geographic market or region this menu is scoped to (e.g., 'US-Southeast', 'Canada', 'EMEA-UK'). Supports regional menu variation, localization, and regulatory compliance across jurisdictions.
attributes.references: Internal Geographic Hierarchy; FDA 21 CFR; USDA Regional Compliance

attributes.name: menu_code
attributes.description: Externally-known alphanumeric business identifier for the menu, used in Oracle MICROS POS configurations, franchise communications, and cross-system references (e.g., BRKFST-QSR-DT-2024).

attributes.name: menu_description
attributes.description: Free-text narrative description of the menu's purpose, scope, and key characteristics. Used in internal documentation, franchise communications, and menu engineering review sessions.

attributes.name: menu_name
attributes.description: Human-readable display name of the menu as it appears in POS systems, digital ordering platforms, and internal reporting (e.g., 'Breakfast Drive-Thru Menu Q1 2024').

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for operational notes, change justifications, or franchise-specific instructions associated with this menu version. Used by menu managers and franchise business consultants during review cycles.

attributes.name: nutritional_disclosure_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu requires calorie and nutritional information disclosure per FDA menu labeling regulations (21 CFR Part 101.11). Mandatory for restaurant chains with 20 or more locations in the United States.
attributes.references: FDA Menu Labeling Final Rule 21 CFR Part 101.11; ACA Section 4205

attributes.name: olo_menu_code
attributes.description: The native menu identifier as configured in the Olo Digital Ordering Platform. Enables reconciliation of digital channel menu versions with the master menu record.

attributes.name: pmix_tracking_enabled
attributes.description: Indicates whether Product Mix (PMIX) sales tracking is enabled for this menu version. When enabled, POS transaction data is aggregated to measure item-level sales velocity, supporting menu engineering and COGS% analysis.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Internal Revenue Management Policy

attributes.name: pos_menu_code
attributes.description: The native menu identifier as configured in Oracle MICROS POS. Used for system-of-record reconciliation between the lakehouse silver layer and the POS operational system.

attributes.name: price_tier
attributes.description: Pricing tier classification for this menu, reflecting the overall price positioning strategy (value, standard, premium, luxury). Drives ACV (Average Check Value) benchmarking and revenue management decisions.
attributes.references: Internal Revenue Management Policy; NRA Menu Engineering Standards

attributes.name: publish_status
attributes.description: Current publishing state of the menu indicating whether it is live and visible to guests across channels. Distinct from approval_status — a menu may be approved but not yet published, or suspended post-publication.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: published_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the menu was pushed live to POS systems, digital ordering platforms (OLO), and third-party delivery (3PD) integrations. Critical for SSS (Same-Store Sales) period alignment and rollout governance.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: restaurant_format
attributes.description: The restaurant service format this menu is designed for. Quick-Service Restaurant (QSR) menus differ structurally from casual or fine-dining menus in item count, pricing tiers, and daypart coverage.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Restaurant Classification Standards

attributes.name: retired_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the menu was deactivated and retired from all channels. Null if the menu is still active. Used for historical PMIX analysis and LTO post-campaign reporting.

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Identifies the operational system of record from which this menu record originated (e.g., Oracle MICROS POS, Olo Digital Ordering Platform, FranConnect). Supports data lineage and reconciliation in the lakehouse silver layer.
attributes.references: Internal Data Governance Standard; Databricks Lakehouse Architecture

attributes.name: version_number
attributes.description: Sequential integer version of the menu, incremented each time the menu is revised and republished. Enables rollback, audit, and comparison of menu changes over time.

products.name: recipe
products.description: Master record for each standardized recipe (SOP) associated with a menu item. Captures recipe name, version, yield quantity, yield unit, prep method, cook method, cook temperature, cook time, plating instructions, BOH preparation notes, and recipe status. Serves as the culinary SSOT linking menu items to their production specifications and BOM components.

attributes.name: recipe_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each standardized recipe record in the foodservice master recipe repository. Serves as the primary key for all downstream joins to menu items, Bill of Materials (BOM) components, and production specifications.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: Recipes are brand-owned culinary master data. Brand R&D, culinary standards management, and brand-level food cost analysis all require knowing which brand owns a recipe. A foodservice domain expert wo

attributes.name: created_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Recipe development is performed by a chef; tracking the creator supports cost, quality, and compliance reporting.

attributes.name: critical_control_point_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to foodsafety.critical_control_point. Business justification: HACCP documentation requires each recipe to reference the specific CCP governing its critical process step (e.g., cook temperature CCP for a burger). Recipe already has haccp_ccp_flag and haccp_plan_i

attributes.name: haccp_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to foodsafety.haccp_plan. Business justification: QUALITY: Recipes have specific HACCP plans defining critical limits for preparation steps.

attributes.name: menu_item_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent menu item this recipe produces. Links the culinary production specification to the sellable menu item entity, enabling Product Mix (PMIX) analysis and menu engineering decisions.

attributes.name: primary_supplier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.supply_supplier. Business justification: Supplier recall and food safety traceability: when a supplier is recalled or audited, procurement and food safety teams must identify all affected recipes. Recipe-level supplier traceability is a stan

attributes.name: allergen_flags
attributes.description: Pipe-delimited list of major food allergens present in this recipe as required by FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA). Includes the FDA's Big 9 allergens: milk, eggs, fish, shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, sesame. Used for menu labeling compliance and guest allergen communication. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: milk|eggs|fish|shellfish|tree_nuts|peanuts|wheat|soybeans|sesame — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA; FDA 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: approved_by
attributes.description: Name or employee identifier of the culinary or food safety authority who approved this recipe version for production use. Provides audit trail for recipe governance, food safety compliance, and SOP change management.
attributes.references: ISO 22000; FDA FSMA; Internal SOP Governance

attributes.name: approved_date
attributes.description: Date on which this recipe version was formally approved for production use by the culinary or food safety authority. Supports recipe version lifecycle management, audit trail, and regulatory compliance documentation.
attributes.references: ISO 22000; FDA FSMA; Internal SOP Governance

attributes.name: boh_prep_notes
attributes.description: Supplementary Back of House (BOH) preparation notes and special handling instructions for kitchen staff, including equipment-specific guidance, batch preparation tips, and quality checkpoints not captured in the structured prep_method field. Sourced from culinary SOP documentation.

attributes.name: calories
attributes.description: Total caloric content per serving in kilocalories (kcal) as required for FDA menu labeling compliance under the Affordable Care Act Section 4205. Displayed on menu boards and digital ordering platforms per FDA 21 CFR Part 101.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101; ACA Section 4205; USDA

attributes.name: calories_from_fat
attributes.description: Calories derived from fat content per serving in kilocalories (kcal), as declared on the FDA Nutrition Facts Panel. Supports nutritional transparency and menu labeling compliance.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101; USDA Dietary Guidelines

attributes.name: channel
attributes.description: The service channel(s) for which this recipe is approved and available. Supports channel-specific menu management across Dine-In, Drive-Thru (DT), Online Ordering (OLO via Olo platform), Third-Party Delivery (3PD), and Catering. Drives channel-specific menu configuration in Oracle MICROS POS and Olo.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform; Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: cook_method
attributes.description: The primary cooking technique applied to this recipe (e.g., fry, grill, bake, steam, broil, saute, raw, microwave, sous_vide, smoke). Drives Kitchen Display System (KDS) routing, equipment assignment, and HACCP critical control point identification. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: fry|grill|bake|steam|broil|saute|raw|microwave|sous_vide|smoke — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: HACCP; FDA Food Code; NRA ServSafe; ISO 22000

attributes.name: cook_temperature_f
attributes.description: Required internal or cooking equipment temperature in degrees Fahrenheit for this recipe. Critical for HACCP compliance, food safety critical control point (CCP) monitoring, and Zenput food safety audit verification. Ensures pathogen elimination per FDA Food Code minimum temperature requirements.
attributes.references: HACCP; FDA Food Code; ISO 22000; NRA ServSafe

attributes.name: cook_time_seconds
attributes.description: Standardized cook time in seconds for this recipe as defined in the culinary SOP. Used for Kitchen Display System (KDS) timer configuration, Speed of Service (SOS) benchmarking, Ticket Time analysis, and throughput optimization in BOH operations.
attributes.references: Internal SOP Standards; Oracle MICROS KDS; NRA

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this recipe record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Provides audit trail for data lineage, recipe version history, and compliance documentation.
attributes.references: ISO 22000; Internal Data Governance Standard; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail

attributes.name: daypart
attributes.description: The meal period or daypart during which this recipe is available for production and sale. Drives kitchen scheduling, labor forecasting via Planday, and daypart-level PMIX reporting. Standard foodservice dayparts include breakfast, lunch, dinner, late_night, snack, and all_day.
attributes.references: NRA Industry Standards; Internal Menu Engineering

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: Date from which this recipe version becomes active and available for production in restaurant operations. Used for recipe version scheduling, Limited Time Offer (LTO) launch planning, and menu change management across Oracle MICROS POS and Olo.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Internal Menu Engineering; FTC Franchise Disclosure

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: Date on which this recipe version is retired from active production use. Applicable for Limited Time Offers (LTO), seasonal items, and superseded recipe versions. Null for open-ended core menu recipes.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Internal Menu Engineering

attributes.name: food_cost
attributes.description: Calculated raw ingredient cost in USD to produce one yield unit of this recipe, derived from Bill of Materials (BOM) component costs in MarketMan Inventory Management. Used for Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) analysis, CoGS% reporting, menu pricing strategy, and P&L management in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO; MarketMan Inventory Management; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: food_cost_pct
attributes.description: Recipe food cost expressed as a percentage of the menu selling price, representing the Cost of Goods Sold Percentage (CoGS%). A key menu engineering metric used to evaluate recipe profitability, set pricing targets, and manage P&L performance. Calculated as food_cost divided by menu selling price.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO; GAAP/IFRS; Internal Menu Engineering Standards

attributes.name: haccp_ccp_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point (HACCP) Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this recipe contains one or more Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points (HACCP CCPs) requiring mandatory monitoring, verification, and corrective action procedures per ISO 22000 and FDA Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA). Drives Zenput food safety audit task generation.
attributes.references: HACCP; FDA FSMA; ISO 22000; NRA ServSafe

attributes.name: holding_temperature_f
attributes.description: Required hot or cold holding temperature in degrees Fahrenheit for maintaining food safety after cooking and prior to service. Critical HACCP critical control point (CCP) parameter monitored via Zenput food safety audits and local health department inspections.
attributes.references: HACCP; FDA Food Code; ISO 22000; Local Health Departments

attributes.name: holding_time_max_minutes
attributes.description: Maximum allowable holding time in minutes after cooking before the item must be discarded, per HACCP and food safety SOP. Drives waste tracking in MarketMan and Zenput task management for BOH discard compliance and Waste% reporting.
attributes.references: HACCP; FDA Food Code; ISO 22000; NRA ServSafe

attributes.name: is_gluten_free
attributes.description: Indicates whether this recipe meets FDA gluten-free labeling standards (less than 20 ppm gluten). Used for menu labeling compliance, guest dietary accommodation, and marketing of gluten-free menu options per FDA 21 CFR Part 101.91.

attributes.name: is_vegan
attributes.description: Indicates whether this recipe contains no animal-derived ingredients, qualifying it as vegan. Supports menu labeling, dietary filtering on Olo Digital Ordering Platform, and guest dietary accommodation.
attributes.references: NRA Menu Labeling Standards; Internal Menu Engineering

attributes.name: is_vegetarian
attributes.description: Indicates whether this recipe contains no meat, poultry, or seafood ingredients, qualifying it as vegetarian. Supports menu labeling, dietary filtering on Olo Digital Ordering Platform, and guest dietary accommodation.
attributes.references: NRA Menu Labeling Standards; Internal Menu Engineering

attributes.name: menu_price
attributes.description: Standard menu selling price in USD for this recipe as configured in Oracle MICROS POS. Used for revenue management, menu engineering analysis, Average Check Value (ACV) calculations, and Same-Store Sales (SSS) reporting.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; SAP S/4HANA AR; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: plating_instructions
attributes.description: Standardized plating and presentation instructions for this recipe as defined in the culinary SOP. Specifies garnish placement, portioning, vessel type, and visual presentation standards for Front of House (FOH) service quality and brand consistency.

attributes.name: prep_method
attributes.description: Standardized description of the preparation technique for this recipe as defined in the culinary Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Includes steps such as marinating, chopping, mixing, or assembling performed prior to cooking. Governs BOH preparation workflow and kitchen training.
attributes.references: NRA ServSafe; Internal SOP Standards; Zenput Operational Compliance

attributes.name: prep_time_seconds
attributes.description: Standardized preparation time in seconds required before cooking begins, as defined in the culinary SOP. Contributes to total Ticket Time calculation and labor scheduling in Planday Workforce Scheduling for BOH staffing models.
attributes.references: Internal SOP Standards; Planday Workforce Scheduling

attributes.name: recipe_category
attributes.description: Culinary category grouping for the recipe used in menu engineering and Product Mix (PMIX) reporting (e.g., Entrée, Appetizer, Dessert, Beverage, Side, Sauce, Condiment). Supports daypart analysis and menu mix optimization. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: entree|appetizer|dessert|beverage|side|sauce|condiment|breakfast|snack — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: NRA Menu Labeling Standards; Internal Menu Engineering

attributes.name: recipe_code
attributes.description: Externally-known alphanumeric business identifier for the recipe, used across Oracle MICROS POS, MarketMan Inventory Management, and SAP S/4HANA for cross-system reference. Follows the format RCP-XXXX. Serves as the operational lookup key in kitchen and procurement workflows.
attributes.references: Internal Data Governance Standard; NRA ServSafe

attributes.name: recipe_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the standardized recipe as it appears in culinary Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) documentation and kitchen training materials. Used by Back of House (BOH) staff and culinary teams for identification and communication.

attributes.name: recipe_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the recipe within the culinary development and operations workflow. 'draft' indicates in-development; 'active' indicates approved for production use; 'inactive' indicates temporarily suspended; 'archived' indicates retired; 'under_review' indicates pending culinary or food safety re-evaluation.

attributes.name: recipe_type
attributes.description: Classification of the recipe by its menu permanence and scope. 'core' indicates a permanent menu item; 'limited_time_offer' (LTO) indicates a time-bound promotional item; 'seasonal' indicates availability tied to seasonal ingredients; 'test' indicates a recipe under culinary trial; 'regional' indicates a market-specific variant.

attributes.name: restaurant_format
attributes.description: The restaurant format or concept for which this recipe is designed and approved. Quick-Service Restaurant (QSR), casual, fine_dining, and fast_casual formats may have distinct recipe specifications, plating standards, and production methods.

attributes.name: serving_size_g
attributes.description: Standardized serving size in grams as declared for nutritional labeling purposes. Required for FDA Nutrition Facts Panel compliance and menu labeling regulations. Used in nutritional data calculations and USDA reporting.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101 Nutrition Labeling; USDA

attributes.name: shelf_life_hours
attributes.description: Maximum shelf life in hours for the prepared recipe item from time of production, as defined in the food safety SOP. Governs discard scheduling, holding time compliance, and waste tracking in MarketMan. Critical for HACCP date-marking compliance per FDA Food Code.
attributes.references: HACCP; FDA Food Code; ISO 22000; Local Health Departments

attributes.name: sodium_mg
attributes.description: Sodium content per serving in milligrams (mg) as declared on the FDA Nutrition Facts Panel. Critical for menu labeling compliance, nutritional transparency, and alignment with USDA Dietary Guidelines sodium reduction targets.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101; USDA Dietary Guidelines; ACA Section 4205

attributes.name: storage_temperature_f
attributes.description: Required storage temperature in degrees Fahrenheit for raw ingredients or prepared components of this recipe prior to production. HACCP critical control point (CCP) parameter for cold chain compliance, monitored via Zenput food safety audits.
attributes.references: HACCP; FDA Food Code; ISO 22000; Local Health Departments

attributes.name: subcategory
attributes.description: Secondary culinary classification providing finer granularity within the recipe category (e.g., Grilled, Fried, Baked, Raw, Blended). Used for BOH workflow routing, kitchen station assignment, and menu engineering analysis.

attributes.name: total_time_seconds
attributes.description: Total elapsed time in seconds from start of preparation to completion of plating, combining prep_time_seconds and cook_time_seconds plus any resting or holding time. Used for Speed of Service (SOS) targets, throughput modeling, and KDS configuration.
attributes.references: Internal SOP Standards; Oracle MICROS KDS

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this recipe record was last modified, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Supports change tracking, recipe version audit trail, and Silver Layer data freshness monitoring in the Databricks Lakehouse.

attributes.name: version
attributes.description: Version number of the recipe in major.minor format (e.g., 1.0, 2.3), tracking iterative culinary changes, reformulations, or ingredient substitutions over the recipe lifecycle. Enables version-controlled recipe management and rollback capability.
attributes.references: ISO 22000 Food Safety Management Systems; Internal SOP Standards

attributes.name: waste_pct
attributes.description: Expected food waste percentage for this recipe during production, representing trim loss, cooking loss, and preparation waste as a proportion of raw ingredient weight. Used for Yield Management, PAR Level planning, and Waste% reporting in MarketMan Inventory Management.
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management; USDA; Internal SOP Standards

attributes.name: yield_quantity
attributes.description: The standardized output quantity produced by one execution of this recipe (e.g., 1.0 for a single portion, 12.0 for a batch of 12 units). Used in Bill of Materials (BOM) scaling, food cost calculations, and PAR Level (Periodic Automatic Replenishment Level) planning in MarketMan.
attributes.references: ISO 22000; Internal SOP Standards; MarketMan Inventory Management

attributes.name: yield_unit
attributes.description: Unit of measure for the recipe yield quantity (e.g., portion, oz, g, kg, lb, ml, L, each, batch, serving). Aligns with MarketMan Inventory Management unit-of-measure standards for accurate food cost and waste tracking. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: portion|oz|g|kg|lb|ml|L|each|batch|serving — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management; USDA; Internal SOP Standards

products.name: recipe_ingredient
products.description: Bill of Materials (BOM) line-item record for each ingredient within a recipe. Captures ingredient SKU reference, ingredient name, quantity, unit of measure, preparation state (raw/cooked/prepped), waste factor percentage, yield percentage, sequence order, and substitution flag. Drives COGS calculations, procurement planning, and PAR level management.

attributes.name: recipe_ingredient_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each Bill of Materials (BOM) line-item record linking an ingredient to a recipe. Primary key for the recipe_ingredient entity.

attributes.name: approved_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: HACCP critical control point ingredients require approval by a certified food safety employee. Tracing ingredient approvals to a specific employee is mandatory for HACCP audit documentation and allerg

attributes.name: critical_control_point_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to foodsafety.critical_control_point. Business justification: HACCP compliance requires each recipe ingredient with a critical handling step (e.g., minimum internal temp for raw proteins) to reference the governing CCP. Food safety auditors and QA teams use this

attributes.name: ingredient_id
attributes.description: Reference to the master ingredient or Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) record that identifies the specific raw material, semi-finished, or finished component used in this recipe line.

attributes.name: preferred_supplier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.supply_supplier. Business justification: Approved supplier list management: procurement and HACCP compliance require tracking which supplier is approved for each ingredient-in-recipe. supplier_item_code is a denormalized supplier reference a

attributes.name: primary_recipe_substitute_ingredient_id
attributes.description: Reference to the approved substitute ingredient SKU that may replace this ingredient when is_substitution_allowed is True. Supports supply chain contingency planning and procurement flexibility.
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management — Substitution Rules; Coupa Procurement

attributes.name: recipe_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent recipe to which this ingredient belongs. Establishes the Bill of Materials (BOM) header-to-line relationship.

attributes.name: stock_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.stock_item. Business justification: Core BOM link for theoretical food cost calculation, inventory depletion modeling, and purchase forecasting. recipe_ingredient.ingredient_id targets supply.ingredient (supply-side concept); stock_item

attributes.name: allergen_flags
attributes.description: Pipe-delimited list of major food allergens present in this ingredient as required by FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA) and EU Regulation 1169/2011 (e.g., 'gluten|milk|eggs|soy'). Drives menu allergen declarations and guest-facing nutritional disclosures.
attributes.references: FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA); EU Regulation 1169/2011; ISO 22000

attributes.name: approved_date
attributes.description: Date on which this ingredient was formally approved for inclusion in the recipe by the designated culinary or quality assurance authority. Required for food safety compliance documentation and recipe change control audit trails.
attributes.references: FDA Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA); ISO 22000; Internal Recipe Governance Policy

attributes.name: bom_version
attributes.description: Version identifier for the recipe Bill of Materials (BOM) line, following semantic versioning convention (e.g., v1.0, v2.3). Enables change control tracking, regulatory audit trails, and rollback capability for recipe modifications.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — BOM Change Management; Internal Recipe Governance Policy

attributes.name: contains_dairy
attributes.description: Indicates whether this ingredient contains milk or dairy derivatives as a major allergen per FDA FALCPA. True = dairy present; False = dairy-free. Supports allergen management and guest dietary accommodation.
attributes.references: FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA)

attributes.name: contains_gluten
attributes.description: Indicates whether this ingredient contains or may contain gluten as a major allergen per FDA FALCPA requirements. True = gluten present or cross-contact risk; False = gluten-free. Used for menu allergen labeling and guest dietary accommodation.
attributes.references: FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA); FDA Gluten-Free Labeling Rule (21 CFR 101.91)

attributes.name: cost_per_unit
attributes.description: Procurement cost of the ingredient per one unit of measure at the time of recipe costing. Used as the primary input for Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) and Cost of Goods Sold Percentage (CoGS%) calculations at the recipe level. Sourced from Coupa Procurement or SAP AP.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO — Product Costing; Coupa Procurement; GAAP/IFRS Cost Accounting

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this recipe ingredient BOM line record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Provides audit trail for recipe development and change management.
attributes.references: Internal Data Governance Standard; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code in which ingredient cost values (cost_per_unit, extended_cost) are denominated (e.g., USD, CAD, GBP). Supports multi-currency operations across global franchise markets.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; GAAP/IFRS Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: Date on which this ingredient version expires or is superseded within the recipe Bill of Materials (BOM). Null indicates the ingredient is currently active with no planned end date. Supports LTO lifecycle management and recipe change control.
attributes.references: Internal Recipe Versioning Policy; SAP S/4HANA MM — BOM Validity

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: Date from which this ingredient version is active and valid within the recipe Bill of Materials (BOM). Supports recipe versioning, Limited Time Offer (LTO) ingredient management, and historical COGS analysis.
attributes.references: Internal Recipe Versioning Policy; SAP S/4HANA MM — BOM Validity

attributes.name: extended_cost
attributes.description: Total cost contribution of this ingredient line to the recipe, calculated as quantity × cost_per_unit adjusted for yield. Represents the line-level Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) input for recipe costing and menu engineering decisions.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO — Product Costing; GAAP/IFRS Cost Accounting

attributes.name: haccp_critical_control_point
attributes.description: Indicates whether this ingredient represents a Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point (HACCP) in the recipe preparation process requiring mandatory temperature, time, or handling controls. True = CCP applies; False = standard handling. Drives food safety audit requirements in Zenput.
attributes.references: HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points); FDA Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA); ISO 22000; Zenput Food Safety Audits

attributes.name: ingredient_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of this ingredient within the recipe Bill of Materials (BOM). Controls whether the ingredient is actively used in production, pending approval, seasonal, or discontinued. Drives menu engineering and procurement decisions.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Governance Policy; MarketMan Inventory Management

attributes.name: is_critical_ingredient
attributes.description: Indicates whether this ingredient is designated as a critical or signature component of the recipe whose absence or substitution would materially alter the menu item's identity, quality standard, or brand promise. True = critical; False = non-critical. Drives supply chain risk prioritization.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Engineering Policy; NRA Quality Standards

attributes.name: is_halal_certified
attributes.description: Indicates whether this ingredient holds a valid Halal certification from an accredited certifying body. True = Halal certified; False = not certified. Required for menu compliance in markets with Halal dietary requirements.
attributes.references: Islamic Food and Nutrition Council of America (IFANCA); Internal Halal Compliance Policy

attributes.name: is_kosher_certified
attributes.description: Indicates whether this ingredient holds a valid Kosher certification. True = Kosher certified; False = not certified. Required for menu compliance in markets with Kosher dietary requirements.
attributes.references: Orthodox Union (OU) Kosher Certification; Internal Dietary Compliance Policy

attributes.name: is_organic
attributes.description: Indicates whether this ingredient is certified organic under USDA National Organic Program (NOP) standards. True = USDA Organic certified; False = conventional. Supports menu labeling claims and premium ingredient sourcing tracking.
attributes.references: USDA National Organic Program (NOP); 7 CFR Part 205

attributes.name: is_substitution_allowed
attributes.description: Indicates whether this ingredient may be substituted with an approved alternative ingredient without altering the recipe's quality, taste profile, or regulatory compliance. True = substitution permitted; False = ingredient is mandatory and cannot be substituted.
attributes.references: Internal Recipe Governance Policy; FDA Food Labeling Regulations

attributes.name: line_sequence
attributes.description: Ordinal position of this ingredient within the recipe Bill of Materials (BOM). Governs the assembly and preparation sequence displayed on Kitchen Display System (KDS) and Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) documentation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — KDS Configuration; Internal SOP Standards

attributes.name: min_internal_temp_f
attributes.description: Minimum required internal cooking temperature in degrees Fahrenheit for this ingredient as mandated by FDA Food Code and HACCP plan. Applicable when haccp_critical_control_point is True. Enforced via Zenput food safety task management.
attributes.references: FDA Food Code; HACCP; USDA FSIS Safe Minimum Internal Temperatures

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for additional preparation instructions, handling notes, quality specifications, or sourcing requirements specific to this ingredient within the recipe (e.g., 'slice to 1/4 inch thickness', 'use Grade A only', 'apply after cooking'). Supports kitchen SOP documentation.
attributes.references: Internal SOP Standards; NRA ServSafe Certification

attributes.name: par_level_quantity
attributes.description: Periodic Automatic Replenishment (PAR) level quantity for this ingredient at the restaurant level, expressed in the ingredient's unit of measure. Drives automated reorder triggers in MarketMan and procurement planning in Coupa.
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management — PAR Level Management; Internal Procurement Policy

attributes.name: prep_state
attributes.description: Preparation state of the ingredient at the point of use in the recipe (e.g., raw, cooked, prepped, frozen, thawed). Drives kitchen workflow sequencing, food safety HACCP critical control point documentation, and yield calculations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: raw|cooked|prepped|frozen|thawed|marinated|portioned — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points); FDA Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA); Zenput Food Safety Audits

attributes.name: quantity
attributes.description: Specified quantity of the ingredient required per one unit of the parent recipe, expressed in the designated unit of measure. Used as the basis for COGS calculations, procurement planning, and PAR level management.
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management; SAP S/4HANA MM — BOM

attributes.name: shelf_life_days
attributes.description: Maximum number of days this ingredient remains safe and usable from the date of receipt or preparation, under specified storage conditions. Used for PAR level management, waste reduction, and FIFO inventory rotation in MarketMan.
attributes.references: FDA Food Code; MarketMan Inventory Management — Shelf Life Tracking; HACCP

attributes.name: storage_temperature_max_f
attributes.description: Maximum allowable storage temperature in degrees Fahrenheit for this ingredient. Exceeding this threshold triggers a food safety violation per HACCP plan and FDA Food Code requirements.

attributes.name: storage_temperature_min_f
attributes.description: Minimum allowable storage temperature in degrees Fahrenheit for this ingredient to maintain food safety and quality standards. Used in HACCP temperature monitoring and cold chain compliance tracking.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Unit of measure in which the ingredient quantity is expressed (e.g., oz, g, ml, each). Must align with the unit of measure used in procurement and inventory systems to enable accurate COGS and PAR level calculations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: oz|lb|g|kg|ml|L|fl_oz|cup|tsp|tbsp|each|slice|portion|pkg — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Unit of Measure; USDA Measurement Standards

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to this recipe ingredient BOM line record, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Supports change tracking, data lineage, and Silver Layer incremental processing in Databricks.
attributes.references: Internal Data Governance Standard; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: waste_factor_pct
attributes.description: Percentage of the ingredient quantity expected to be lost during preparation, trimming, cooking, or handling (e.g., 5.00 = 5%). Applied in COGS calculations and procurement planning to account for Food Waste Percentage (Waste%). Sourced from MarketMan waste tracking.
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management — Waste Tracking; NRA Food Waste Guidelines

attributes.name: yield_pct
attributes.description: Percentage of the as-purchased ingredient quantity that results in usable product after preparation (e.g., 80.00 = 80% yield). Complements waste_factor_pct and is used in Yield Management calculations to determine actual cost per usable unit.
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management; USDA Yield Factors for Food Calculations

products.name: item_price
products.description: Transactional pricing record capturing the effective price of a menu item for a specific restaurant, channel, daypart, and date range. Tracks base price, promotional price, price tier, currency, effective start/end dates, price change reason, approval status, 3PD commission markup percentage, delivery surcharge amount, and dynamic pricing eligibility flag. Supports channel-specific pricing (DT vs OLO vs 3PD with commission pass-through), daypart pricing, regional price variation, and franchise price compliance monitoring. SSOT for what the guest pays per item per context.

attributes.name: item_price_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each item price record in the menu pricing table. Primary key for the item_price data product.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: Brand-level price compliance and suggested retail price enforcement are named processes in franchise foodservice. item_price has suggested_retail_price and price_region_code indicating brand-level pri

attributes.name: financial_period_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.financial_period. Business justification: Price change reporting and revenue planning require anchoring item prices to fiscal periods. Foodservice finance analysts run period-over-period price variance reports and budget vs. actual price anal

attributes.name: franchisee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: Franchisee Pricing Audit Report tracks price overrides and royalty calculations per franchisee, requiring a direct FK.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Revenue recognition requires mapping each item price record to a revenue GL account for sales posting and P&L reporting. Foodservice finance teams map menu item prices to specific revenue accounts by

attributes.name: menu_item_id
attributes.description: Reference to the menu item for which this price record applies. Links the pricing record to the specific product being sold.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: primary_item_approved_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Reference to the employee or user who approved this price record. Supports pricing governance and audit trail requirements.

attributes.name: promotion_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.promotion. Business justification: Promotional pricing process: a promotion directly authorizes a promotional_price on an item_price record. Pricing analysts and marketing teams must trace which promotion governs each price change for

attributes.name: site_id
attributes.description: Reference to the specific restaurant location where this price is effective. Supports regional and location-level price variation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; FranConnect — Site Management

attributes.name: territory_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.territory. Business justification: Territory-based pricing is a named franchise pricing process — franchisors set price tiers by territory (e.g., high-cost-of-living markets). item_price.price_region_code is a denormalized territory re

attributes.name: unit_id
attributes.description: Reference to the specific restaurant location where this price is effective. Supports regional and location-level price variation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; FranConnect — Site Management

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Current workflow state of the price record in the pricing governance process. Tracks whether the price is in draft, awaiting approval, approved for use, rejected, or superseded by a newer record.
attributes.references: Internal Pricing Governance Policy; FTC Advertising Regulations

attributes.name: approved_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this price record was formally approved by the authorized approver. Null when the record has not yet been approved. Supports pricing governance audit trail.

attributes.name: base_price
attributes.description: The standard selling price of the menu item before any promotional discounts, modifiers, or channel surcharges are applied. Represents the menu board price for the item at this restaurant.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: channel_surcharge
attributes.description: Additional amount added to the base price for specific ordering channels such as Third-Party Delivery (3PD) or Online Ordering (OLO) to offset platform fees or delivery costs. Zero when no surcharge applies.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform; Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: cogs_pct
attributes.description: The ratio of Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) to the base selling price, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.28 = 28%). A key menu engineering metric used to assess item profitability and pricing adequacy.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — CO Module; NRA Industry Standards; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: cost_of_goods
attributes.description: The direct food and packaging cost associated with producing this menu item at the time of pricing. Used to calculate Cost of Goods Sold Percentage (CoGS%) and support menu engineering decisions.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — CO/MM Module; MarketMan Inventory Management; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the country in which this price is applicable. Supports international pricing management across global restaurant operations.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this price record was first created in the system. Audit field supporting data lineage and pricing history tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code in which the price is denominated (e.g., USD, CAD, GBP). Supports multi-currency pricing for international restaurant operations.

attributes.name: daypart
attributes.description: The meal period or time segment during which this price is applicable. Daypart pricing enables different price points for the same item across Breakfast, Lunch, Afternoon, Dinner, and Late Night periods.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; NRA Industry Standards

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: The calendar date on which this price record expires and is no longer applied at the point of sale. Null for open-ended pricing records with no defined expiration.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: The calendar date on which this price record becomes active and the price is applied at the point of sale. Used to schedule future price changes and manage price transitions.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: franchise_price_deviation_pct
attributes.description: The percentage deviation of the franchisee's actual price from the franchisor's Suggested Retail Price (SRP). Positive values indicate pricing above SRP; negative values indicate pricing below SRP. Used in franchise compliance monitoring.
attributes.references: FranConnect — Franchise Compliance Tracking; IFA Franchise Best Practices; FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations

attributes.name: is_active
attributes.description: Indicates whether this price record is currently active and eligible to be applied at the Point of Sale (POS). False for expired, superseded, or deactivated price records. Distinct from approval_status — a record may be approved but not yet active.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: is_lto
attributes.description: Indicates whether this price record is associated with a Limited Time Offer (LTO) promotion. True when the price is part of a time-bound promotional campaign; False for standard menu pricing.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; FTC Advertising Regulations

attributes.name: is_price_override_allowed
attributes.description: Indicates whether a cashier or manager is permitted to manually override this price at the Point of Sale (POS). Controls POS-level price override permissions for this item.
