attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Internal POS Controls Policy

attributes.name: lto_campaign_code
attributes.description: Alphanumeric identifier linking this price record to a specific Limited Time Offer (LTO) marketing campaign. Populated only when is_lto is True. Enables PMIX and revenue analysis by LTO campaign.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Salesforce CRM — Marketing Automation

attributes.name: max_order_quantity
attributes.description: The maximum number of units that can be ordered at this price point per transaction. Used to enforce promotional price limits and prevent abuse of discounted pricing.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; FTC Advertising Regulations

attributes.name: menu_engineering_category
attributes.description: Menu engineering classification of the item based on its profitability and popularity (Product Mix / PMIX). Stars are high-profit/high-popularity; Plow Horses are low-profit/high-popularity; Puzzles are high-profit/low-popularity; Dogs are low-profit/low-popularity.
attributes.references: NRA Industry Standards; Internal Menu Engineering Framework

attributes.name: min_order_quantity
attributes.description: The minimum number of units that must be ordered for this price to apply. Used for bulk pricing, catering orders, or combo deal minimum quantity thresholds.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: ordering_channel
attributes.description: The sales channel for which this price record applies. Supports channel-specific pricing strategies across Dine-In, Drive-Thru (DT), Online Ordering (OLO), Third-Party Delivery (3PD), Kiosk, and Catering.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: ownership_type
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant location is company-owned or franchised. Franchise pricing may be subject to different governance rules and royalty implications.
attributes.references: FranConnect — Franchise Management; IFA Franchise Best Practices

attributes.name: pos_price_level
attributes.description: The POS system price level code assigned to this price record in Oracle MICROS POS (e.g., PRICE_LEVEL_1, HAPPY_HOUR). Maps the price record to the POS configuration layer for terminal-level price application.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: price_change_reason
attributes.description: Business justification or reason code explaining why this price was set or changed. Common reasons include commodity cost increase, competitive repositioning, LTO activation, regional adjustment, or franchise directive. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: commodity_cost|competitive_repositioning|lto_activation|regional_adjustment|franchise_directive|menu_engineering|regulatory_compliance|other — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: Internal Pricing Governance Policy; SAP S/4HANA — CO Module

attributes.name: price_change_reason_notes
attributes.description: Free-text narrative providing additional context or detail for the price change reason. Supplements the structured reason code with qualitative business commentary.

attributes.name: price_display_label
attributes.description: The formatted price string as it should appear on the menu board, digital display, or OLO/3PD platform (e.g., '$5.99', 'From $4.99'). Supports localized and channel-specific price presentation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform; FDA Menu Labeling Regulations

attributes.name: price_elasticity_band
attributes.description: Classification of the menu item's demand sensitivity to price changes. Used in menu engineering and revenue management to guide pricing decisions and promotional strategy.
attributes.references: NRA Industry Standards; Internal Menu Engineering Framework

attributes.name: price_override_limit
attributes.description: The maximum price value to which a POS operator may override this item's price when is_price_override_allowed is True. Null when price override is not permitted.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Internal POS Controls Policy

attributes.name: price_record_code
attributes.description: Externally-known alphanumeric business identifier for this price record, used in POS configuration exports, pricing change communications, and audit references. Follows the format PRC-XXXXXXXX.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: price_source_system
attributes.description: Identifies the operational system of record from which this price record originated. Supports data lineage tracking and reconciliation between Oracle MICROS POS, SAP S/4HANA, Olo, and FranConnect.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; SAP S/4HANA; Olo Digital Ordering Platform; FranConnect

attributes.name: price_version
attributes.description: Sequential version number for this price record, incremented each time the price is updated. Supports price history tracking and audit trail requirements for the same item-restaurant-channel-daypart combination.

attributes.name: promotional_price
attributes.description: The discounted or special selling price applied during a promotional period or Limited Time Offer (LTO). Null when no active promotion applies to this item at this location.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; FTC Advertising Regulations

attributes.name: restaurant_format
attributes.description: The restaurant service format to which this price applies. Supports format-specific pricing across Quick-Service Restaurant (QSR), Casual Dining, Fine Dining, and Fast Casual establishments.
attributes.references: NRA Industry Standards; FranConnect — Franchise Development

attributes.name: source_system_price_code
attributes.description: The native identifier of this price record in the originating operational system (e.g., MICROS POS price record ID, SAP condition record number). Enables traceability and reconciliation back to the system of record.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; SAP S/4HANA — MM/SD Condition Records

attributes.name: suggested_retail_price
attributes.description: The franchisor-recommended selling price for this menu item. For franchised locations, this is the corporate-suggested price that franchisees may adopt or deviate from within permitted bounds.
attributes.references: FranConnect — Franchise Management; IFA Franchise Best Practices; FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations

attributes.name: tax_category_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the applicable tax category or tax class for this menu item price. Used by the POS system to apply the correct tax rate at the time of sale based on jurisdiction and item type.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; FDA Food Labeling Regulations; Local Tax Authorities

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this price record was last modified. Audit field supporting change tracking and data lineage for pricing governance.

products.name: nutrition_profile
products.description: Master nutritional data record for each menu item as required by FDA menu labeling regulations. Captures calories, total fat, saturated fat, trans fat, cholesterol, sodium, total carbohydrates, dietary fiber, total sugars, added sugars, protein, and serving size per FDA Nutrition Facts panel standards. Includes data source, lab analysis date, and regulatory approval status.
products.reference: FDA Nutrition Facts / Menu Labeling Compliance

attributes.name: nutrition_profile_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each nutrition profile record in the Silver Layer lakehouse. Primary key for the nutrition_profile data product.

attributes.name: created_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Nutrition data is compiled by a nutritionist or chef; linking to the employee enables traceability for audits.

attributes.name: menu_item_id
attributes.description: Reference to the menu item for which this nutrition profile applies. Links the nutritional data to the specific sellable item on the menu.

attributes.name: recipe_id
attributes.description: Reference to the standardized recipe or Bill of Materials (BOM) version from which this nutrition profile was derived. Ensures traceability between formulation and declared nutritional values.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101 – Food Labeling; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management

attributes.name: added_sugars_g
attributes.description: Added sugars content per declared serving size in grams. Mandatory declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel per 2016 labeling rule update. Critical for compliance with FDA dietary guidelines and sugar-reduction reformulation tracking.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(6)(iii) – Added Sugars Declaration; FDA 2016 Nutrition Facts Rule

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the nutrition profile in the regulatory review and approval workflow. Only profiles in 'approved' status may be published to customer-facing menu boards and digital ordering channels (OLO, 3PD) as required by FDA menu labeling rules.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.11 – Restaurant Menu Labeling; ACA Section 4205

attributes.name: approved_by
attributes.description: Name or employee identifier of the Registered Dietitian, Quality Assurance Manager, or Regulatory Affairs Officer who approved this nutrition profile for publication. Supports regulatory audit trail and accountability.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.11; NRA ServSafe Standards

attributes.name: approved_date
attributes.description: Date on which the nutrition profile received final regulatory or internal quality assurance approval for publication on customer-facing menu boards and digital ordering channels. Required for FDA menu labeling compliance audit trails.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.11 – Restaurant Menu Labeling; ACA Section 4205

attributes.name: calcium_mg
attributes.description: Calcium content per declared serving size in milligrams. Mandatory micronutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel per 2016 labeling rule update. Supports bone-health menu claims and dietary compliance reporting.

attributes.name: calorie_range_high
attributes.description: Upper bound of the calorie range for menu items with variability in preparation. Used alongside calorie_range_low to display a calorie range on FDA-compliant menu boards when a single calorie value is not applicable.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.11(b)(2)(ii) – Calorie Range Declaration

attributes.name: calorie_range_low
attributes.description: Lower bound of the calorie range for menu items with variability in preparation (e.g., customizable items, combo meals with choice components). Required for FDA menu board labeling when a single calorie value cannot be declared due to preparation variability.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.11(b)(2)(ii) – Calorie Range Declaration

attributes.name: calories
attributes.description: Total caloric content per declared serving size, expressed in kilocalories (kcal). Mandatory disclosure on FDA Nutrition Facts panel and on customer-facing menu boards for restaurant chains with 20 or more locations.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(1) – Calorie Declaration; ACA Section 4205

attributes.name: calories_from_fat
attributes.description: Calories derived from total fat content per serving, expressed in kilocalories. Historically required on FDA Nutrition Facts panels; retained for legacy reporting, menu engineering analysis, and international market compliance.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(1)(i) – Calories from Fat

attributes.name: cholesterol_mg
attributes.description: Cholesterol content per declared serving size in milligrams. Mandatory nutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Critical for heart-health dietary compliance and menu engineering decisions.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this nutrition profile record was first created in the system. Supports regulatory audit trail, data lineage tracking in the Silver Layer lakehouse, and compliance with FDA record-keeping requirements.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management; GAAP Record Retention

attributes.name: daily_value_basis_calories
attributes.description: Reference caloric intake used to calculate percent Daily Value (%DV) figures on the FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Standard FDA reference is 2,000 kcal/day for adults. Stored to support accurate %DV recalculation if FDA reference values are updated.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(d) – Percent Daily Value

attributes.name: data_source
attributes.description: Method by which the nutritional values in this profile were determined. Drives confidence level and regulatory defensibility of declared values. Lab analysis is the gold standard for FDA compliance; recipe calculation is acceptable for composite items. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: lab_analysis|database_lookup|recipe_calculation|supplier_provided|literature_value — promote to reference product if values expand]
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9 – Nutrition Labeling; USDA FoodData Central

attributes.name: dietary_fiber_g
attributes.description: Dietary fiber content per declared serving size in grams. Mandatory sub-component of total carbohydrate on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Supports high-fiber menu claims and dietary guideline alignment.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(6)(i) – Dietary Fiber Declaration

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: Date from which this nutrition profile version is the active, published record for the associated menu item. Used to manage version transitions when recipes are reformulated or ingredients change, ensuring correct values are displayed on menu boards.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.11 – Restaurant Menu Labeling

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: Date on which this nutrition profile version expires and must be superseded by a new analysis or re-approval. Nullable for profiles with no defined expiry. Triggers re-analysis workflow when recipe changes occur or when regulatory re-certification is required.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management

attributes.name: insoluble_fiber_g
attributes.description: Insoluble fiber content per declared serving size in grams. Voluntary sub-component of dietary fiber on FDA Nutrition Facts panel; supports digestive health menu claims.

attributes.name: iron_mg
attributes.description: Iron content per declared serving size in milligrams. Mandatory micronutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel per 2016 labeling rule update. Key metric for dietary adequacy reporting and menu engineering.

attributes.name: is_current_version
attributes.description: Indicates whether this nutrition profile record is the currently active and published version for the associated menu item. Supports Slowly Changing Dimension (SCD) Type 2 versioning in the Silver Layer lakehouse, ensuring only one active profile per menu item at any point in time.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.11 – Restaurant Menu Labeling

attributes.name: lab_accreditation_number
attributes.description: Accreditation number of the third-party laboratory that performed the nutritional analysis. Supports regulatory audit defensibility and ensures analysis was conducted by an ISO 17025-accredited or FDA-recognized laboratory.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9; ISO/IEC 17025 – Laboratory Competence

attributes.name: lab_analysis_date
attributes.description: Date on which the laboratory analysis was conducted to determine the nutritional values in this profile. Required for regulatory audit trails and to determine when re-analysis is needed due to recipe changes or ingredient substitutions.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9 – Nutrition Labeling; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this nutrition profile record was most recently updated. Supports change detection, incremental ETL processing in the Databricks Silver Layer, and regulatory audit trail for nutrition data modifications.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management

attributes.name: menu_board_calorie_display
attributes.description: Formatted calorie string as it must appear on FDA-compliant customer-facing menu boards and digital ordering platforms (e.g., '540 Cal', '430-780 Cal'). Derived from calories or calorie range fields; stored as the authoritative display string to ensure consistent rendering across POS, OLO, and 3PD channels.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.11 – Restaurant Menu Labeling; ACA Section 4205

attributes.name: monounsaturated_fat_g
attributes.description: Monounsaturated fat content per declared serving size in grams. Voluntary declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel; supports heart-healthy menu claims and nutritional transparency for guests.

attributes.name: polyunsaturated_fat_g
attributes.description: Polyunsaturated fat content per declared serving size in grams. Voluntary declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel; included to support health-conscious menu positioning and nutritional transparency initiatives.

attributes.name: potassium_mg
attributes.description: Potassium content per declared serving size in milligrams. Mandatory micronutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel per 2016 labeling rule update. Supports heart-health and blood-pressure-related menu claims.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(8)(v) – Potassium Declaration; FDA 2016 Nutrition Facts Rule

attributes.name: profile_code
attributes.description: Externally-known alphanumeric business identifier for this nutrition profile record, used in regulatory submissions, lab reports, and cross-system references (e.g., NP-BURG001). Distinct from the surrogate primary key.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101 – Food Labeling; NRA ServSafe Standards

attributes.name: profile_name
attributes.description: Human-readable label for this nutrition profile, typically combining the menu item name and serving configuration (e.g., 'Classic Cheeseburger – Regular Serving'). Used in regulatory filings and internal reporting.

attributes.name: profile_type
attributes.description: Classification of the nutrition profile indicating whether it represents a standard menu item, a customized build, a Limited Time Offer (LTO), a regional variant, or a test/pilot item. Drives which profiles are published to FDA-mandated menu boards. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: standard|customized|limited_time_offer|regional|test — promote to reference product if values expand]
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101 – Food Labeling; FTC Menu Labeling Regulations

attributes.name: protein_g
attributes.description: Protein content per declared serving size in grams. Mandatory nutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Key metric for high-protein menu positioning and athletic/dietary segment marketing.

attributes.name: saturated_fat_g
attributes.description: Saturated fat content per declared serving size in grams. Mandatory sub-component of total fat on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Key metric for heart-health menu engineering and dietary guideline compliance.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(2)(i) – Saturated Fat Declaration

attributes.name: serving_size_description
attributes.description: Household measure description of the serving size as it appears on the FDA Nutrition Facts panel (e.g., '1 sandwich', '1 cup (240 mL)'). Required for consumer-facing menu labeling compliance.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(b)(1) – Serving Size Declaration

attributes.name: serving_size_g
attributes.description: Gram weight of the declared serving size as required by FDA Nutrition Facts panel standards. Used as the basis for all per-serving nutrient calculations and regulatory compliance reporting.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(b)(1) – Serving Size Declaration

attributes.name: sodium_mg
attributes.description: Sodium content per declared serving size in milligrams. Mandatory nutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. High-priority metric for menu reformulation initiatives, dietary guideline compliance, and public health reporting.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(4) – Sodium Declaration; FDA Sodium Reduction Guidance

attributes.name: soluble_fiber_g
attributes.description: Soluble fiber content per declared serving size in grams. Voluntary sub-component of dietary fiber on FDA Nutrition Facts panel; supports heart-health and cholesterol-reduction menu claims.

attributes.name: total_carbohydrate_g
attributes.description: Total carbohydrate content per declared serving size in grams. Mandatory nutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Includes dietary fiber, total sugars, and added sugars as sub-components.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(6) – Total Carbohydrate Declaration

attributes.name: total_fat_g
attributes.description: Total fat content per declared serving size in grams. Mandatory nutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Includes saturated fat, trans fat, polyunsaturated fat, and monounsaturated fat.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(2) – Total Fat Declaration

attributes.name: total_sugars_g
attributes.description: Total sugars content per declared serving size in grams. Mandatory sub-component of total carbohydrate on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Includes both naturally occurring and added sugars.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(6)(ii) – Total Sugars Declaration

attributes.name: trans_fat_g
attributes.description: Trans fat content per declared serving size in grams. Mandatory sub-component of total fat on FDA Nutrition Facts panel. Regulatory threshold: items with less than 0.5g may declare 0g per FDA rounding rules.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(2)(ii) – Trans Fat Declaration; FDA Trans Fat Final Rule

attributes.name: version_number
attributes.description: Sequential version number of this nutrition profile for the associated menu item. Incremented each time a recipe reformulation, ingredient substitution, or regulatory re-analysis results in a new nutrition profile. Supports historical audit trail and regulatory change management.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management

attributes.name: vitamin_d_mcg
attributes.description: Vitamin D content per declared serving size in micrograms. Mandatory micronutrient declaration on FDA Nutrition Facts panel per 2016 labeling rule update. Expressed as micrograms (mcg) with percent Daily Value (%DV) calculated separately.
attributes.references: FDA 21 CFR Part 101.9(c)(8)(ii) – Vitamin D Declaration; FDA 2016 Nutrition Facts Rule

products.name: allergen_declaration
products.description: Regulatory master record capturing the allergen profile for each menu item per FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA) requirements. Tracks the presence, may-contain, and absence status for the 9 major FDA allergens (milk, eggs, fish, shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, sesame), cross-contact risk level, declaration date, and regulatory review status.
products.reference: FALCPA Allergen Declaration / FDA Major Food Allergens

attributes.name: allergen_declaration_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each allergen declaration record. Primary key for the allergen_declaration data product in the menu domain.
attributes.references: FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA) 2004

attributes.name: created_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Allergen declarations are authored by a qualified employee; tracking origin supports regulatory reporting.

attributes.name: critical_control_point_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to foodsafety.critical_control_point. Business justification: Allergen cross-contact prevention is a recognized HACCP CCP. allergen_declaration has a plain-text 'haccp_ccp_reference' column — a denormalization of critical_control_point. A proper FK enables aller

attributes.name: menu_item_id
attributes.description: Reference to the menu item for which this allergen declaration applies. Links the allergen profile to the specific sellable item in the menu master.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management

attributes.name: recipe_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to menu.recipe. Business justification: Allergen declarations are recipe-version-specific — when a recipe changes (new ingredients, substitutions), a new allergen declaration must be issued per FDA FALCPA requirements. Adding recipe_id to a

attributes.name: superseded_by_allergen_declaration_id
attributes.description: Reference to the allergen_declaration_id of the newer declaration that supersedes this record when a recipe change or regulatory update requires a revised allergen profile. Null if this is the current active declaration. Enables full version history traversal.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; ISO 22000; HACCP Change Management

attributes.name: triggering_ingredient_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.ingredient. Business justification: FDA allergen labeling compliance: when an ingredient's allergen status changes, all affected allergen_declarations must be reviewed and reissued. Linking declaration to the triggering ingredient enabl

attributes.name: approved_by
attributes.description: Name or employee identifier of the authorized approver (e.g., Director of Food Safety, QA Manager) who granted final approval for this allergen declaration. Required for regulatory audit compliance.

attributes.name: channel_applicability
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of service channels for which this allergen declaration is applicable (e.g., DT, OLO, 3PD, dine-in, catering). Supports channel-specific menu publishing and allergen disclosure requirements across Drive-Thru (DT), Online Ordering (OLO), and Third-Party Delivery (3PD) platforms. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: dt|olo|3pd|dine_in|catering|kiosk|mobile_app — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FTC Advertising Regulations; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this allergen declaration record was first created in the system. Supports audit trail, data lineage, and regulatory compliance documentation requirements.
attributes.references: ISO 22000; FDA FALCPA 2004; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: cross_contact_risk_level
attributes.description: Assessed risk level for unintentional allergen cross-contact during food preparation in the restaurant kitchen (BOH). Determined through HACCP analysis of shared equipment, preparation surfaces, and ingredient handling procedures. Drives operational protocols and guest advisories.
attributes.references: HACCP Principles; FDA Food Code; ISO 22000; NRA ServSafe; Zenput Food Safety Audits

attributes.name: cross_contact_source
attributes.description: Free-text description of the identified source(s) of potential allergen cross-contact risk in the kitchen environment (e.g., shared fryer oil, shared prep surfaces, shared utensils, proximity to allergen-containing ingredients). Supports HACCP documentation and staff training.
attributes.references: HACCP Principles; FDA Food Code; ISO 22000; Zenput Operational Compliance

attributes.name: daypart_applicability
attributes.description: Daypart(s) during which this allergen declaration is applicable (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner, late_night, all_day). Relevant when the same menu item has different ingredient formulations by daypart, resulting in different allergen profiles. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: breakfast|lunch|dinner|late_night|snack|all_day — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management

attributes.name: declaration_date
attributes.description: The business date on which this allergen declaration was formally issued or last certified by the food safety team. Used for regulatory compliance tracking and HACCP documentation.

attributes.name: declaration_number
attributes.description: Externally-known business identifier for this allergen declaration record, used in regulatory submissions, audit trails, and cross-system references. Format: ALGN-{YYYY}-{NNNNNN}.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; ISO 22000 Food Safety Management Systems

attributes.name: declaration_status
attributes.description: Current regulatory review and approval lifecycle status of this allergen declaration. Controls whether the declaration is active and publishable to guests and regulatory bodies. Valid values: draft, pending_review, approved, superseded, withdrawn.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; Zenput Operational Compliance; ISO 22000

attributes.name: declaration_type
attributes.description: Classification of the allergen declaration by menu item category context. Standard declarations apply to core menu items; LTO (Limited Time Offer) declarations apply to temporary promotional items; seasonal and regional declarations apply to market-specific or time-limited variants; custom applies to made-to-order or catering items.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FTC Advertising Regulations; Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: The date from which this allergen declaration is binding and must be communicated to guests across all channels (DT, OLO, 3PD, in-restaurant). Aligns with menu item launch or recipe change effective date.

attributes.name: eggs_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of eggs allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements. Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: The date on which this allergen declaration expires and must be reviewed or renewed. Null indicates the declaration remains valid until superseded. Supports periodic review cycles mandated by food safety SOPs.

attributes.name: fish_species
attributes.description: Specific fish species present in the menu item (e.g., salmon, tuna, tilapia, cod) when fish_status is 'contains'. FDA FALCPA requires species-level disclosure for fish allergens on food labels.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101

attributes.name: fish_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of fish allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements. Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: gluten_free_certified
attributes.description: Indicates whether this menu item has been certified as gluten-free per FDA gluten-free labeling rule (21 CFR Part 101.91), requiring less than 20 ppm gluten. Distinct from wheat allergen status — an item may be wheat-free but not certified gluten-free.
attributes.references: FDA Gluten-Free Labeling Rule 21 CFR Part 101.91; FDA FALCPA 2004

attributes.name: guest_advisory_text
attributes.description: Standardized guest-facing allergen advisory statement for this menu item, suitable for display on menus, digital ordering platforms (OLO, 3PD), and in-restaurant signage. Drafted in compliance with FDA menu labeling and FTC advertising regulations.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Menu Labeling Rule 21 CFR Part 101.11; FTC Advertising Regulations

attributes.name: internal_notes
attributes.description: Internal food safety team notes regarding this allergen declaration, including rationale for cross-contact risk assessments, supplier-provided allergen data caveats, or pending ingredient change investigations. Not for guest-facing use. Classified as confidential business information.

attributes.name: may_contain_allergen_count
attributes.description: Count of the 9 FDA major allergens declared as 'may_contain' (cross-contact risk) status for this menu item. Supports risk stratification, guest advisory communications, and HACCP reporting.

attributes.name: milk_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of milk (dairy) allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements. Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: peanuts_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of peanuts allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements. Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: regulatory_submission_date
attributes.description: The date on which this allergen declaration was formally submitted to the relevant regulatory authority (e.g., FDA, local health department). Null if regulatory_submission_required is false or submission is pending.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Menu Labeling Rule 21 CFR Part 101.11

attributes.name: regulatory_submission_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether this allergen declaration requires formal submission to a regulatory body (e.g., FDA, local health department) as part of menu labeling compliance. Drives workflow routing to the regulatory affairs team.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Menu Labeling Rule 21 CFR Part 101.11; Local Health Department Requirements

attributes.name: restaurant_format_applicability
attributes.description: Restaurant format(s) for which this allergen declaration applies. QSR (Quick-Service Restaurant), casual dining, fine dining, or all formats. Supports multi-format operations where the same menu item may have different preparation methods and allergen profiles by format.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; NRA Industry Standards; Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: review_date
attributes.description: The date on which this allergen declaration was last reviewed by the food safety or regulatory compliance team. Supports audit readiness and HACCP critical control point documentation.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; HACCP; ISO 22000; Zenput Food Safety Audits

attributes.name: reviewed_by
attributes.description: Name or employee identifier of the food safety officer or regulatory compliance specialist who last reviewed and certified this allergen declaration. Supports audit trail and accountability.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; HACCP; ISO 22000; NRA ServSafe

attributes.name: sesame_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of sesame allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements (sesame added as the 9th major allergen effective January 1, 2023 under FASTER Act). Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FASTER Act 2021; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: shellfish_species
attributes.description: Specific shellfish species present in the menu item (e.g., shrimp, crab, lobster, crayfish) when shellfish_status is 'contains'. FDA FALCPA requires species-level disclosure for crustacean shellfish allergens.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101

attributes.name: shellfish_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of shellfish (crustacean shellfish) allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements. Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Identifies the operational system of record from which this allergen declaration data originated. Supports data lineage tracking in the Databricks Silver Layer. Primary sources include Zenput (food safety audits), Oracle MICROS POS (menu management), MarketMan (ingredient/BOM data), or manual entry.
attributes.references: Databricks Lakehouse Silver Layer Data Lineage Standards

attributes.name: soybeans_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of soybeans allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements. Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: total_allergen_count
attributes.description: Count of the 9 FDA major allergens declared as 'contains' status for this menu item. Used in menu engineering, guest-facing allergen filtering tools, and regulatory reporting to quickly identify high-allergen items.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101

attributes.name: tree_nut_varieties
attributes.description: Specific tree nut varieties present in the menu item (e.g., almonds, cashews, walnuts, pecans, pistachios) when tree_nuts_status is 'contains'. FDA FALCPA requires variety-level disclosure for tree nut allergens.
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101

attributes.name: tree_nuts_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of tree nuts allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements. Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this allergen declaration record was last modified. Tracks the most recent change to any allergen status, cross-contact risk assessment, or regulatory review field. Supports change management and audit compliance.
attributes.references: ISO 22000; FDA FALCPA 2004; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: wheat_status
attributes.description: Declares the presence status of wheat allergen in this menu item per FDA FALCPA major allergen requirements. Values: contains (intentionally present), may_contain (cross-contact risk), free_from (absent and no cross-contact risk).
attributes.references: FDA FALCPA 2004; FDA Food Labeling Regulations 21 CFR Part 101; ISO 22000

attributes.name: zenput_audit_task_code
attributes.description: Reference identifier for the Zenput food safety audit task or operational compliance checklist item associated with the verification of this allergen declaration in restaurant operations. Supports traceability between the master declaration and field-level compliance verification.
attributes.references: Zenput Food Safety Audits and Operational Compliance; FDA Food Code

products.name: menu_lto
products.description: Master record for each Limited Time Offer (LTO) — a time-bounded promotional menu item or bundle. Captures LTO name, concept description, target daypart, target channel, planned and actual launch/end dates, LTO type (new item/returning item/bundle), constituent menu item references with item roles (hero/side/beverage/component), marketing campaign reference, test market flag, rollout scope (national/regional/franchise group), and performance targets. Governs the full LTO lifecycle from ideation through execution to sunset analysis.
products.reference: LTO (Limited Time Offer) / Promotional Menu Item

attributes.name: menu_lto_id
attributes.description: Unique system-generated surrogate key identifying each Limited Time Offer (LTO) record. Primary key for the lto data product.

attributes.name: approved_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: LTO launch approval is a formal menu governance process requiring sign-off from a named menu director or VP. Tracing approvals to a specific employee supports governance audits and accountability in m

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Reference to the associated marketing campaign in Salesforce CRM that supports this LTO. Links LTO performance data to marketing spend, campaign reach, and promotional ROI analytics.

attributes.name: financial_period_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.financial_period. Business justification: LTO P&L reporting requires anchoring each LTO to a fiscal period for revenue, food cost, and marketing spend variance analysis. Foodservice finance teams produce LTO post-launch financial reviews by f

attributes.name: food_safety_audit_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to foodsafety.food_safety_audit. Business justification: LTO launch approval workflows require a food safety audit sign-off before a new item goes live. menu_lto has a 'food_safety_approved' flag that is a denormalized signal; a direct FK to the approving f

attributes.name: franchisee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: LTO rollout tracking per franchisee needs to associate each limited‑time offer with the responsible franchisee.

attributes.name: loyalty_offer_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to loyalty.offer. Business justification: LTO loyalty offer coordination: QSR operators pair LTO launches with specific loyalty offers (e.g., double points during launch week). Marketing operations require this link to execute integrated LTO+

attributes.name: menu_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to menu.menu. Business justification: A Limited Time Offer is published on a specific menu (e.g., the national QSR lunch menu, the OLO digital menu, or a regional franchise menu). menu_lto currently has no FK to the menu product, creating

attributes.name: menu_item_id
attributes.description: Reference to the primary menu item record associated with this LTO in the menu domain. For bundle LTOs, references the parent bundle item. Links LTO governance to the underlying menu item master data including BOM, nutritional data, and allergen declarations.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management; Internal Menu Domain

attributes.name: nro_project_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.nro_project. Business justification: Grand opening LTO planning is a named QSR business process: NRO project teams coordinate with marketing to launch location-specific LTOs tied to new restaurant openings. This link enables grand openin

attributes.name: previous_lto_menu_lto_id
attributes.description: Self-referencing identifier pointing to the prior LTO record if this is a returning or re-run offer. Enables lineage tracking of recurring LTOs, year-over-year performance comparison, and fan-favorite lifecycle analysis.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Engineering Framework; Internal Data Governance Standard

attributes.name: promotion_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.promotion. Business justification: LTO promotion linkage: every LTO item is backed by a specific promotion defining its discount mechanics and eligibility. Marketing and menu teams must link menu_lto to its governing promotion for laun

attributes.name: supplier_contract_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.supplier_contract. Business justification: LTO launch approval gate: menu planning and procurement teams must validate that a supplier contract covers the full LTO window (planned_launch_date to planned_end_date) before approving launch. This

attributes.name: target_guest_segment_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to guest.guest_segment. Business justification: LTO launches are planned and evaluated against specific guest segments (e.g., loyalty members, value seekers). Linking menu_lto to guest_segment enables segment-targeted rollout planning and post-laun

attributes.name: unit_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.unit. Business justification: Needed to track LTO launch and performance per restaurant unit for regional rollout analysis.

attributes.name: actual_end_date
attributes.description: The actual calendar date on which the LTO was removed from menus. May differ from planned_end_date due to early discontinuation, extended popularity, or supply constraints. Used for LTO lifecycle duration analysis.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management; Internal Audit Trail

attributes.name: actual_launch_date
attributes.description: The actual calendar date on which the LTO went live in restaurants. May differ from planned_launch_date due to supply chain delays, regulatory approvals, or operational readiness issues. Used for post-launch performance analysis.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management; Internal Audit Trail

attributes.name: allergen_reviewed
attributes.description: Indicates whether a formal allergen review has been completed (True) for this LTO item, confirming all major allergens (per FDA FALCPA — Big 9 allergens) are identified and declared. Required for regulatory compliance and guest safety.
attributes.references: FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA); ISO 22000; HACCP

attributes.name: approval_date
attributes.description: Calendar date on which the LTO received final business approval to proceed. Used to measure ideation-to-approval cycle time and track governance compliance.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Development SOP; Internal Governance Framework

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Current approval workflow status of the LTO concept: pending (awaiting review), approved (cleared for production), rejected (not approved for launch), or on_hold (paused pending additional information). Distinct from lifecycle_status which tracks operational deployment state.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Development SOP; Zenput Operational Compliance

attributes.name: concept_description
attributes.description: Internal narrative describing the culinary concept, inspiration, and strategic rationale behind the LTO. Used by Menu Development and Engineering teams during ideation and approval stages.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 three-letter country code identifying the primary country of LTO deployment (e.g., 'USA', 'CAN', 'GBR'). Supports international menu localization, regulatory compliance tracking, and cross-border PMIX analysis.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; FDA Food Labeling Regulations; USDA Inspection Standards

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this LTO record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Provides the audit trail entry point for the LTO lifecycle and supports data lineage tracking in the Databricks Silver Layer.

attributes.name: daypart
attributes.description: The primary daypart during which the LTO is intended to be sold and promoted. Daypart segmentation drives kitchen prep scheduling, labor planning, and marketing campaign timing. Aligns with Oracle MICROS POS daypart configuration.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS Daypart Configuration; NRA Operational Standards

attributes.name: estimated_weekly_units
attributes.description: Forecasted number of LTO units expected to be sold per restaurant per week during the active offer period. Used for supply chain procurement planning, PAR level setting in MarketMan, and labor scheduling in Planday.
attributes.references: MarketMan Inventory Management; Planday Workforce Scheduling; Internal Demand Planning

attributes.name: food_safety_approved
attributes.description: Indicates whether the LTO item has received food safety clearance (True) per HACCP protocols and FDA/USDA regulatory requirements before launch. Tracked via Zenput food safety audit workflows. No LTO may go active without this flag being True.
attributes.references: FDA Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA); USDA FSIS; HACCP; ISO 22000; Zenput Food Safety Audits

attributes.name: is_national_launch
attributes.description: Indicates whether this LTO is a full national launch (True) as opposed to a regional, franchise group, or test market deployment (False). Used for executive reporting, national marketing budget allocation, and supply chain capacity planning.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Development SOP; FranConnect Franchise Development

attributes.name: is_returning_item
attributes.description: Indicates whether this LTO features an item that has been previously offered (True) or is a brand-new menu introduction (False). Supports fan-favorite tracking, nostalgia marketing strategies, and historical PMIX benchmarking.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Engineering Framework; Salesforce CRM Campaign Management

attributes.name: is_test_market
attributes.description: Indicates whether this LTO is currently in a limited test market phase (True) or has been deployed beyond test market scope (False). Used to segregate test performance data from production PMIX reporting.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Engineering Framework; NRA Industry Standards

attributes.name: launch_lead_time_days
attributes.description: Number of calendar days between the LTO approval date and the planned launch date. Used by supply chain and procurement teams to validate that sufficient lead time exists for ingredient sourcing, supplier onboarding, and distribution via Coupa Procurement.
attributes.references: Coupa Procurement; SAP S/4HANA MM Module; Internal Supply Chain SOP

attributes.name: lifecycle_status
attributes.description: Current state of the LTO in its end-to-end lifecycle: ideation (concept under development), approved (greenlit for production), in_test (active in test markets only), active (live in production rollout), sunset (offer period ended naturally), cancelled (discontinued before planned end).
attributes.references: Internal Menu Development SOP; FranConnect Compliance Tracking

attributes.name: lto_code
attributes.description: Externally-known alphanumeric business identifier for the LTO, used in Oracle MICROS POS menu management, Salesforce CRM campaign references, and Olo Digital Ordering Platform configurations. Serves as the cross-system reference key.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS Menu Management; Internal Naming Convention

attributes.name: lto_type
attributes.description: Classification of the LTO by its nature: new_item (first-time introduction), returning_item (previously offered item brought back), bundle (combination of existing items at a promotional price), promotional_price (existing item at a temporary price), or seasonal (tied to a calendar season or holiday).
attributes.references: Internal Menu Engineering Framework; NRA Industry Standards

attributes.name: marketing_headline
attributes.description: Short consumer-facing promotional tagline or headline used in advertising, in-restaurant POP (Point of Purchase) materials, and digital marketing for this LTO (e.g., 'Back by Popular Demand — For a Limited Time Only!'). Sourced from Salesforce CRM campaign assets.
attributes.references: Salesforce CRM Marketing Automation; FTC Advertising Regulations

attributes.name: menu_lto_name
attributes.description: Consumer-facing marketing name of the Limited Time Offer as it appears on menus, POS displays, digital ordering platforms, and promotional materials (e.g., 'Spicy Crispy Chicken Sandwich LTO').
attributes.references: NRA Menu Labeling Standards; Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: nutritional_approved
attributes.description: Indicates whether the LTO item's nutritional profile has been reviewed and approved (True) for menu labeling compliance per FDA menu labeling regulations (21 CFR Part 101). Required before consumer-facing publication.
attributes.references: FDA Menu Labeling Rule (21 CFR Part 101); NRA ServSafe Standards

attributes.name: olo_item_code
attributes.description: The item identifier assigned to this LTO in the Olo Digital Ordering Platform for online ordering and third-party delivery (3PD) channel activation. Used to synchronize LTO availability across digital channels.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform; Internal Digital Channel Management

attributes.name: ownership_model
attributes.description: Indicates whether the LTO applies to franchise-operated restaurants, company-owned restaurants, or both. Governs FranConnect compliance tracking, royalty rate applicability, and franchise disclosure obligations under FTC regulations.
attributes.references: FranConnect Franchise Development; FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations; IFA Best Practices

attributes.name: planned_duration_days
attributes.description: Total number of calendar days the LTO is planned to be active, calculated as the difference between planned_end_date and planned_launch_date. Used for supply chain volume forecasting, marketing campaign budgeting, and franchisee communication planning.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Development SOP; MarketMan Inventory Management

attributes.name: planned_end_date
attributes.description: The originally scheduled calendar date on which the LTO was planned to be removed from menus. Drives supply chain wind-down, inventory PAR level adjustments, and marketing campaign sunset planning.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Development SOP; MarketMan Inventory Management

attributes.name: planned_launch_date
attributes.description: The originally scheduled calendar date on which the LTO was planned to go live in restaurants. Used for supply chain procurement lead time planning, marketing campaign scheduling, and NRO coordination.
attributes.references: Internal Menu Development SOP; SAP S/4HANA MM Module

attributes.name: pmix_target_pct
attributes.description: The target Product Mix (PMIX) percentage representing the share of total transactions this LTO is expected to capture during its active period. Used by Menu Engineering to set performance benchmarks and evaluate LTO success post-launch.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS PMIX Reporting; Internal Menu Engineering Framework

attributes.name: pos_item_code
attributes.description: The item code assigned to this LTO in Oracle MICROS POS for order capture, menu display, and PMIX reporting. This is the operational identifier used by cashiers, KDS (Kitchen Display System), and sales reporting.

attributes.name: region_code
attributes.description: Geographic region code identifying the market(s) where this LTO is deployed (e.g., 'US-NORTHEAST', 'EMEA', 'APAC'). Used for regional rollout scoping, localized marketing campaign alignment, and regional P&L reporting.
attributes.references: FranConnect Site Selection; Internal Geographic Hierarchy

attributes.name: restaurant_format
attributes.description: The restaurant service format(s) for which this LTO is applicable: qsr (Quick-Service Restaurant), casual_dining, fine_dining, or all_formats. Governs which restaurant types are eligible to activate the LTO in Oracle MICROS POS.
attributes.references: Internal Restaurant Operations SOP; NRA Industry Classification

attributes.name: rollout_scope
attributes.description: Geographic and operational scope of the LTO deployment: national (all restaurants), regional (specific geographic region), franchise_group (specific franchisee group), company_owned (company-operated units only), or test_market (limited pilot locations). Governs FranConnect franchise compliance and royalty tracking.
attributes.references: FranConnect Franchise Development; IFA Franchise Best Practices

attributes.name: season_or_occasion
attributes.description: The seasonal period or consumer occasion this LTO is designed to capitalize on (e.g., 'Summer 2025', 'Super Bowl', 'Halloween', 'Valentine's Day', 'Back to School'). Supports marketing calendar planning and year-over-year seasonal PMIX trend analysis.
attributes.references: Internal Marketing Calendar; Salesforce CRM Campaign Management

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Identifies the operational system of record from which this LTO record originated: oracle_micros_pos (menu management), salesforce_crm (campaign-driven LTO creation), franconnect (franchise-initiated LTO), olo (digital channel LTO), or manual (direct data entry). Supports data lineage and reconciliation.
attributes.references: Internal Data Governance Standard; Internal Data Lineage Framework

attributes.name: suggested_retail_price
attributes.description: The recommended consumer-facing selling price for the LTO item or bundle, expressed in the local operating currency (USD for domestic operations). Used as the baseline for franchisee pricing guidance and competitive pricing analysis. Actual price may vary by market.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO Module; GAAP/IFRS Financial Reporting Standards; FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations

attributes.name: target_channel
attributes.description: The primary ordering channel(s) for which the LTO is available: dine_in (Front of House), drive_thru (DT), olo (Online Ordering via Olo Digital Ordering Platform), third_party_delivery (3PD aggregators), or all_channels. Governs channel-specific menu activation in Oracle MICROS POS and Olo.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform; Oracle MICROS POS Channel Management

attributes.name: target_food_cost_pct
attributes.business_glossary_term: Target Cost of Goods Sold Percentage (CoGS%)
attributes.description: The planned food cost as a percentage of the LTO selling price, representing the target CoGS% for this offer. Used by Menu Engineering to evaluate profitability and ensure the LTO meets financial thresholds before approval.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO Module; Internal Menu Engineering Framework; GAAP/IFRS

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this LTO record was most recently modified, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Used to detect changes, trigger downstream refresh processes, and support audit compliance in the Databricks Silver Layer.

products.name: modifier_group
products.description: Master record for groups of customization options (modifiers) applicable to menu items — e.g., Protein Choice, Sauce Selection, Size Upgrade, Add-Ons. Captures group name, selection type (single/multi-select), min/max selections, display name, and item applicability rules (which menu items this group attaches to, display order, required/optional flag, channel-specific overrides). Drives POS and OLO customization logic and item-to-modifier mapping.
products.reference: Modifier Group / Condiment Group / POS Modifier Set

attributes.name: modifier_group_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for the modifier group record. Primary key for the modifier_group data product in the menu domain. Role: MASTER_RESOURCE.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: approved_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Modifier group approval is part of menu governance in franchise systems where POS configuration changes require sign-off. Linking to employee supports change management audit trails required by franch

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: Modifier groups are brand-defined master data. modifier_group.is_franchise_configurable indicates brand-level configurability governance. Brand-level modifier compliance audits and franchise modifier

attributes.name: franchisee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: modifier_group.is_franchise_configurable indicates franchisee-specific modifier configurations exist as a named business process (franchise menu customization governance). A franchisee_id FK identifie

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Modifier upcharges (upcharge_basis attribute) generate incremental revenue that must be posted to specific revenue GL accounts. Foodservice finance teams map modifier revenue to GL accounts for accura

attributes.name: allergen_relevance_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether any modifier options within this group may introduce allergen variations that require disclosure to guests. True = allergen-relevant group requiring allergen declaration logic at POS/OLO; False = no allergen impact. Supports FDA food labeling compliance and HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points) protocols.
attributes.references: FDA Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act (FALCPA); ISO 22000 Food Safety Management; HACCP Principles

attributes.name: approved_date
attributes.description: The date on which this modifier group configuration was formally approved for production deployment by the authorized menu engineering or operations team. Supports menu governance workflows and audit compliance.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; NRA SOP Standards

attributes.name: calorie_impact_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether modifier selections within this group materially affect the calorie count of the parent menu item, triggering calorie range display requirements on menus and digital ordering platforms. Supports FDA menu labeling compliance (21 CFR Part 101).
attributes.references: FDA Menu Labeling Rule (21 CFR Part 101.11); NRA Nutrition Labeling Standards

attributes.name: channel_applicability
attributes.description: Defines which ordering channels (DT = Drive-Thru, OLO = Online Ordering, 3PD = Third-Party Delivery, POS = in-store Point of Sale) this modifier group is active on. Enables channel-specific menu configuration and supports omnichannel menu engineering. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: all|pos_only|olo_only|dt_only|3pd_only|pos_olo|pos_dt — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Olo Digital Ordering Platform; NRA Digital Ordering Standards

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this modifier group record was first created in the system of record. Serves as the RECORD_AUDIT_CREATED category for this MASTER_RESOURCE entity. Stored in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: daypart_applicability
attributes.description: Indicates which daypart(s) this modifier group is available during. Dayparts are standard foodservice time segments (breakfast, lunch, dinner, late-night, snack) used for menu engineering, PMIX analysis, and POS time-based menu activation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; NRA Daypart Standards

attributes.name: default_modifier_code
attributes.description: The business code of the modifier option that is pre-selected by default when a guest views this modifier group on POS or OLO. Supports speed of service (SOS) optimization by pre-populating the most common selection. Null if no default applies.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: display_name
attributes.description: Customer-facing label shown on POS screens, KDS (Kitchen Display System), OLO (Online Ordering) interfaces, and 3PD (Third-Party Delivery) menus. May differ from the internal group_name for marketing or localization purposes. Example: 'Choose Your Protein', 'Pick a Sauce'.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform; NRA ServSafe Standards

attributes.name: display_sequence
attributes.description: Numeric ordering position that controls the sequence in which this modifier group is presented to the guest on POS screens, KDS, OLO, and 3PD interfaces. Lower values appear first. Enables menu engineers to control the customization flow and upsell sequencing.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: The date after which this modifier group configuration is no longer valid. Null for open-ended configurations. Supports scheduled menu deactivation, LTO (Limited Time Offer) lifecycle management, and menu version control.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: The date from which this modifier group configuration is considered active and valid for use in POS, OLO, and 3PD channels. Supports menu lifecycle management, scheduled menu changes, and NRO (New Restaurant Opening) menu activation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: free_modifier_limit
attributes.description: Number of modifier selections within this group that are included at no additional charge. Selections beyond this limit may incur an upcharge per the individual modifier's pricing. A value of 0 means all selections are charged; null means unlimited free selections. Supports COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) management and pricing strategy.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; SAP S/4HANA — CO (Controlling)

attributes.name: group_code
attributes.description: Externally-known alphanumeric business identifier for the modifier group, used in POS configuration, OLO platform integration, and 3PD channel mapping. Serves as the BUSINESS_IDENTIFIER category for this MASTER_RESOURCE entity. Example: 'PROT-CHOICE', 'SAUCE-SEL', 'SIZE-UPG'.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: group_name
attributes.description: Internal business name for the modifier group used in back-office systems, menu engineering reports, and POS configuration. Serves as the IDENTITY_LABEL category for this MASTER_RESOURCE entity. Example: 'Protein Choice', 'Sauce Selection', 'Size Upgrade'.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: group_type
attributes.description: Categorical classification of the modifier group by its culinary or operational function. Drives menu engineering analysis (PMIX), reporting by customization category, and POS screen layout. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: protein|sauce|size|add_on|side|beverage|preparation|topping|crust|dietary — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; NRA Menu Engineering Standards

attributes.name: image_url
attributes.description: URL pointing to the visual asset (image) representing this modifier group on digital ordering platforms (OLO, kiosk, 3PD). Used to enhance the guest customization experience on digital channels. Null if no image is assigned.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform — Digital Asset Management

attributes.name: is_collapsible
attributes.description: Indicates whether this modifier group can be collapsed or hidden in the guest-facing UI when not interacted with. True = group can be collapsed to reduce screen clutter on OLO and kiosk interfaces; False = always fully expanded. Supports UX optimization for digital ordering channels.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform — UI Configuration

attributes.name: is_franchise_configurable
attributes.description: Indicates whether franchise operators are permitted to modify the configuration of this modifier group (e.g., adjust min/max selections, add local modifiers) within the bounds of the franchise agreement. True = franchisee may configure; False = corporate-locked configuration. Supports franchise management and brand standards compliance.
attributes.references: FranConnect — Franchise Compliance Tracking; IFA Franchise Best Practices; FTC Franchise Disclosure Regulations

attributes.name: is_kds_displayed
attributes.description: Indicates whether this modifier group and its selected options are displayed on the KDS (Kitchen Display System) in the BOH (Back of House). True = modifier group selections are shown to kitchen staff; False = suppressed from KDS display (e.g., packaging or FOH-only modifiers). Supports BOH operational efficiency.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — KDS Integration; NRA SOP Standards

attributes.name: is_lto
attributes.description: Indicates whether this modifier group is associated with a Limited Time Offer (LTO) promotional campaign. True = LTO modifier group with defined start/end dates; False = permanent menu modifier group. Supports marketing campaign execution and menu lifecycle management.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Salesforce CRM — Marketing Automation

attributes.name: is_printed_on_receipt
attributes.description: Indicates whether the modifier group's selected options are printed on the guest receipt. True = selections appear on receipt for guest reference; False = suppressed from receipt printing. Supports guest transparency and order accuracy.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Receipt Configuration; FDA Food Labeling Regulations

attributes.name: is_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether the guest must make at least one selection from this modifier group before the parent menu item can be added to the order. True = mandatory selection; False = optional. Derived operationally from min_selections > 0 but stored explicitly for POS/OLO rendering logic.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: localization_key
attributes.description: Reference key used to look up translated display names and descriptions for this modifier group in multi-language markets. Supports international franchise operations and localized guest-facing menu presentation across global markets.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Localization Module; IFA International Franchise Standards

attributes.name: lto_end_date
attributes.description: The date on which this modifier group is deactivated as part of a Limited Time Offer (LTO) promotion. Null for permanent modifier groups. Used by POS and OLO systems for automated menu deactivation scheduling.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Salesforce CRM — Marketing Automation

attributes.name: lto_start_date
attributes.description: The date on which this modifier group becomes available as part of a Limited Time Offer (LTO) promotion. Null for permanent modifier groups. Used by POS and OLO systems for automated menu activation scheduling.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Salesforce CRM — Marketing Automation

attributes.name: max_selections
attributes.description: Maximum number of modifier options a guest may select from this group. For single-select groups this is typically 1. For multi-select groups this caps the number of add-ons or customizations. Enforced at POS and OLO order validation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: min_selections
attributes.description: Minimum number of modifier options a guest must select from this group to complete an order. A value of 0 indicates the group is optional. A value of 1 or more makes the group mandatory. Enforced at POS and OLO order validation.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: modifier_group_description
attributes.description: Detailed narrative description of the modifier group's purpose, scope, and applicable customization context. Used by menu engineers and franchise operators for documentation and training materials.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: modifier_group_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the modifier group. Serves as the LIFECYCLE_STATUS category for this MASTER_RESOURCE entity. 'active' = currently in use on POS/OLO; 'inactive' = temporarily disabled; 'draft' = under menu engineering review; 'archived' = retired from all channels; 'suspended' = paused due to supply or compliance issue.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for operational notes, menu engineering commentary, or franchise-specific instructions related to this modifier group. Used by menu engineers, franchise business consultants, and operations teams for context that does not fit structured fields.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: olo_group_ref
attributes.description: Native identifier assigned to this modifier group within the Olo Digital Ordering Platform. Used for synchronization between the enterprise menu master and the OLO channel, ensuring consistent customization options across in-store and digital ordering.
attributes.references: Olo Digital Ordering Platform — Menu Management

attributes.name: pmix_tracking_enabled
attributes.description: Indicates whether modifier selections within this group are tracked in PMIX (Product Mix) reporting for menu engineering analysis. True = modifier selection data flows into PMIX analytics; False = excluded from PMIX reporting (e.g., administrative or packaging modifiers). Supports menu engineering and revenue management decisions.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Reporting Module; NRA Menu Engineering Standards

attributes.name: pos_group_ref
attributes.business_glossary_term: Point of Sale (POS) Modifier Group Reference
attributes.description: Native identifier or reference code assigned to this modifier group within the Oracle MICROS POS system. Used for reconciliation between the lakehouse silver layer and the POS system of record during menu synchronization and audit processes.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module

attributes.name: restaurant_format_applicability
attributes.description: Specifies which restaurant format(s) — QSR (Quick-Service Restaurant), casual dining, or fine dining — this modifier group applies to. Supports multi-format menu governance across the enterprise's diverse restaurant portfolio.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; NRA Industry Standards

attributes.name: selection_type
attributes.description: Defines whether a guest may select only one modifier (single-select, e.g., Size Upgrade) or multiple modifiers (multi-select, e.g., Add-Ons, Sauce Selection) from this group. Drives POS and OLO customization logic and guest-facing UI rendering.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: sort_order_method
attributes.description: Defines how individual modifier options within this group are sorted when displayed to the guest. 'manual' = display_sequence on each modifier; 'alphabetical' = A-Z by modifier name; 'price_asc/desc' = by price; 'popularity' = by historical selection frequency from PMIX data. Supports menu engineering and upsell optimization.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; Olo Digital Ordering Platform

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Identifies the operational system of record from which this modifier group record originated. Supports data lineage tracking, reconciliation, and master data management in the lakehouse silver layer. Values: 'micros_pos' = Oracle MICROS POS; 'olo' = Olo Digital Ordering Platform; 'franconnect' = FranConnect; 'manual' = manually entered.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS; Olo Digital Ordering Platform; FranConnect; Databricks Lakehouse Data Lineage Standards

attributes.name: upcharge_basis
attributes.description: Defines how additional charges are applied when a guest selects modifiers beyond the free_modifier_limit. 'per_item' = each additional modifier is charged individually; 'flat_group' = a single flat charge applies to the group regardless of count; 'none' = no upcharges apply. Drives POS pricing logic and revenue management.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; SAP S/4HANA — SD (Sales and Distribution)

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this modifier group record was last modified in the system of record. Used for change tracking, incremental data pipeline processing, and audit compliance in the lakehouse silver layer.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; GAAP/IFRS Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: version_number
attributes.description: Monotonically incrementing version counter for this modifier group record. Incremented each time the group configuration is updated. Supports menu change management, audit trails, and rollback capabilities in the lakehouse silver layer.
attributes.references: Oracle MICROS POS — Menu Management Module; SAP S/4HANA — Change Management

products.name: menu_modifier
products.description: Master record for each individual modifier option within a modifier group — e.g., 'Extra Cheese', 'No Onions', 'Large Size', 'Gluten-Free Bun'. Captures modifier name, modifier group reference, price delta (upcharge or discount), calorie delta, default selection flag, availability status, and channel applicability. Feeds Oracle MICROS POS and Olo Digital Ordering Platform for guest customization.

attributes.name: menu_modifier_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each modifier option record in the master modifier catalog. Serves as the primary key for all downstream references from Oracle MICROS POS and Olo Digital Ordering Platform.

attributes.name: created_by_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Modifiers (e.g., add‑ons) are defined by a chef or manager; tracking creator aids cost and allergen management.

attributes.name: ingredient_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.ingredient. Business justification: Modifier COGS and 86 suppression: each modifier option (e.g., add avocado, substitute protein) maps to a specific ingredient for food cost calculation and automatic POS/OLO suppression when that ingre

attributes.name: menu_item_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent menu item to which this modifier is applicable. Enables PMIX (Product Mix) analysis and menu engineering decisions at the item-modifier level.
