attributes.description: Numeric ranking of this vendor for this item when multiple vendors supply the same SKU (1=first choice, 2=second choice, etc.).

attributes.name: vendor_product_category
attributes.description: The vendor's classification or category for this item in their catalog structure.

attributes.name: vendor_sku
attributes.description: The supplier's unique item code or SKU for this product. Used in purchase orders and receiving documents.

products.name: physical_count_line
products.description: This association product represents the line-level Event between physical_count and stock_item in restaurant inventory operations. It captures the per-SKU count result for each physical inventory count event, including the counted quantity, system (book) quantity, variance, lot and expiration data, and recount disposition. Each record links one physical_count event to one stock_item and carries the operational data required for COGS% analysis, MarketMan reconciliation, variance investigation workflows, and period-end food cost reporting. Without this entity, the model cannot represent per-SKU variance, recount flags, or lot-level count data.. Existence Justification: A physical inventory count in foodservice operations produces one count line per SKU per storage location — a physical_count event covers many stock_items, and each stock_item appears across many physical_count events over time. This line-level detail (counted_quantity, system_quantity, variance_quantity, variance_value, recount_required_flag) is the operational record that drives COGS% reporting, MarketMan reconciliation, and variance investigation workflows. The relationship is universally recognized in foodservice inventory management as a 'physical_count_line' or 'count_detail' — a first-class operational entity that humans create, review, and act upon.

attributes.name: physical_count_line_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Physical Count Line - Physical Count Line Id
attributes.description: Primary key for the physical_count_line association

attributes.name: physical_count_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Physical Count Line - Physical Count Id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking this count line to its parent physical count event header.

attributes.name: stock_item_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Physical Count Line - Stock Item Id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking this count line to the specific SKU being counted.

attributes.name: count_uom
attributes.description: The unit of measure used by the counting team for this SKU during this count event (e.g., each, case, lb). May differ from the stock item's standard UOM and is specific to this count line.

attributes.name: counted_quantity
attributes.description: The physical quantity of this SKU observed and recorded by the counting team during the count event. Belongs to the line, not the header or the stock item master.

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: The expiration or use-by date of the lot being counted. Captured at count time to support FIFO rotation compliance and waste tracking. Belongs to the count line.

attributes.name: lot_number
attributes.description: The supplier or internal lot identifier for the batch of this SKU being counted. Required for lot-level traceability and HACCP compliance. Belongs to the count line, not the stock item master.

attributes.name: recount_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this specific SKU line requires a recount due to excessive variance or counting error. This is a per-SKU-per-count flag that belongs to the line, not the count header.

attributes.name: system_quantity
attributes.description: The inventory system's expected on-hand quantity for this SKU at the time of the count event. Captured at count time and belongs to this specific count line, not the stock item master.

attributes.name: variance_quantity
attributes.description: The difference between counted_quantity and system_quantity for this SKU in this count event. Positive indicates overage; negative indicates shortage.

attributes.name: variance_value
attributes.description: The dollar value of the variance for this SKU line, calculated as variance_quantity multiplied by the unit cost at count time. Feeds period-end COGS% and GL journal entry.

domains.name: restaurant
domains.description: Master record for every restaurant unit — company-owned and franchised — including location attributes, format (QSR/casual/fine-dining), FOH/BOH configuration, operating hours, daypart schedules, equipment, throughput capacity, speed-of-service (SOS) benchmarks, table turns, cover counts, AUV, SSS, and comp sales. Operational anchor for brand standards and SOPs.
domains.references: NRA Operational Standards, OSHA, Local Health Departments

products.name: unit
products.description: Master record for every restaurant unit — company-owned and franchised. The authoritative identity of each physical location including unit number, brand, concept type (QSR/casual/fine-dining), ownership model (company-owned vs. franchised), legal entity name, trade name, opening date, closure date, current operational status, and geographic coordinates. This is the operational anchor for the entire restaurant domain and the primary FK target for all cross-domain joins (order, inventory, workforce, finance, franchise). One row per physical restaurant location. All other restaurant domain products reference this entity.

attributes.name: unit_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the restaurant unit. Primary key for the unit master record.

attributes.name: area_management_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.area_management. Business justification: Every restaurant unit belongs to an area/district management hierarchy — this is a fundamental operational relationship in foodservice. The area_management product defines the geographic and operation

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: Unit should reference its brand via a foreign key rather than a free‑text code; brand_id provides referential integrity.

attributes.name: brand_standard_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand_standard. Business justification: Units must be linked to the applicable brand standard for compliance tracking.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Cost accounting reports allocate expenses per unit via a cost center; linking unit to cost_center enables accurate budgeting and variance analysis.

attributes.name: department_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.department. Business justification: Linking a unit to its department enables organizational reporting and eliminates the department table silo.

attributes.name: facility_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.facility. Business justification: Facility‑to‑Unit link required for building‑level maintenance, energy‑rating compliance, and health‑inspection tracking.

attributes.name: franchisee_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the franchisee entity that owns and operates this unit. Null for company-owned units.

attributes.name: landlord_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.landlord. Business justification: Landlord‑to‑Unit link supports landlord contact management, rent negotiations, and compliance audits; each unit has a responsible landlord.

attributes.name: lease_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.lease. Business justification: Lease‑to‑Unit association needed for lease‑expiry alerts, rent schedule generation, and financial reporting; each unit operates under a specific lease.

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Required for consolidated financial statements and tax compliance; each restaurant unit must be mapped to its legal entity for reporting.

attributes.name: primary_distribution_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.distribution_center. Business justification: DC-to-unit routing assignment: supply chain operations require knowing each unit's primary distribution center for inbound shipment routing, emergency replenishment planning, and freight cost allocati

attributes.name: program_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to loyalty.program. Business justification: Program Assignment per Restaurant Unit: needed for reporting which loyalty program each unit runs, enabling rollout planning and performance tracking.

attributes.name: site_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.site. Business justification: Site‑to‑Unit link required for property‑level rent, CAPEX, and compliance reporting; experts expect each restaurant unit to be tied to its real‑estate site.

attributes.name: address_line1
attributes.description: Primary street address of the restaurant unit including street number and name.

attributes.name: address_line2
attributes.description: Secondary address information such as suite number, building name, or floor.

attributes.name: average_cover_count
attributes.description: Average number of guests (covers) served per day. Used for labor planning and revenue forecasting in table-service restaurants.

attributes.name: average_ticket_time_seconds
attributes.description: Average time in seconds for a customer order to be completed from entry to fulfillment, tracked via KDS (Kitchen Display System).

attributes.name: average_unit_volume_usd
attributes.description: Average annual sales revenue for this unit in US dollars. Key performance metric for franchise valuation and benchmarking.

attributes.name: city
attributes.description: City or municipality where the restaurant unit is located.

attributes.name: closure_date
attributes.description: The date this restaurant unit permanently ceased operations. Null for active units.

attributes.name: concept_type
attributes.description: The restaurant format classification. QSR (Quick-Service Restaurant) for fast food, casual dining for table service, fast casual for counter service with higher quality, fine dining for upscale full service, food court for mall locations, ghost kitchen for delivery-only.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code where the restaurant unit is located.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this unit record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: daypart_schedule
attributes.description: Structured schedule defining daypart time windows (breakfast, lunch, dinner, late night) for menu and pricing management.

attributes.name: drive_thru_lanes
attributes.description: Number of drive-thru lanes available at this unit. Zero indicates no drive-thru capability.

attributes.name: email_address
attributes.description: Primary email address for the restaurant unit used for operational communications.

attributes.name: haccp_certified
attributes.business_glossary_term: Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points (HACCP) Certified
attributes.description: Indicates whether this unit maintains current HACCP certification for food safety management.

attributes.name: has_online_ordering
attributes.description: Indicates whether this unit supports online ordering through web or mobile app channels.

attributes.name: has_third_party_delivery
attributes.description: Indicates whether this unit is enabled for third-party delivery services such as DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub.

attributes.name: health_inspection_score
attributes.description: Most recent health inspection score from local health department. Scale and passing thresholds vary by jurisdiction.

attributes.name: kds_station_count
attributes.description: Number of KDS stations installed in the BOH for order routing and kitchen workflow management.

attributes.name: last_inspection_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent health and safety inspection by local regulatory authority.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this unit record was most recently updated.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the restaurant unit in decimal degrees.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the restaurant unit in decimal degrees.

attributes.name: opening_date
attributes.description: The date this restaurant unit first opened for business to customers.

attributes.name: operating_hours
attributes.description: Standard operating hours for the unit, typically formatted as day ranges with time windows (e.g., Mon-Fri 6:00-22:00, Sat-Sun 7:00-23:00).

attributes.name: operational_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the restaurant unit. Active indicates normal operations, temporarily closed for renovations or seasonal closure, permanently closed for shut down units, under construction for new builds, pending opening for units awaiting launch.

attributes.name: ownership_model
attributes.description: The operating model for this unit: company-owned (corporate operated), franchised (independent franchisee), joint venture (shared ownership), or licensed (brand licensing agreement).

attributes.name: parking_spaces
attributes.description: Number of dedicated parking spaces available for guest use at this location.

attributes.name: phone_number
attributes.description: Primary contact phone number for the restaurant unit.

attributes.name: pos_system_version
attributes.description: Version identifier of the POS system software deployed at this unit.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code for the restaurant unit location.

attributes.name: same_store_sales_pct
attributes.description: Year-over-year comparable store sales growth percentage. Measures organic growth for units open at least 12 months.

attributes.name: seating_capacity
attributes.description: Maximum number of guest seats available in the FOH (Front of House) dining area.

attributes.name: speed_of_service_seconds
attributes.description: Average time in seconds from order placement to order delivery. Critical QSR operational metric for customer satisfaction.

attributes.name: square_footage
attributes.description: Total interior floor space of the restaurant unit in square feet, including FOH and BOH (Back of House) areas.

attributes.name: state_province
attributes.description: Two-letter state or province code where the restaurant unit is located.

attributes.name: table_turn_rate
attributes.description: Average number of times a table is occupied by different parties during a service period. Relevant for casual and fine-dining concepts.

attributes.name: throughput_capacity_orders_per_hour
attributes.description: Maximum number of customer orders this unit can process per hour at peak efficiency, based on equipment and staffing design.

attributes.name: trade_name
attributes.description: The customer-facing name of the restaurant unit as displayed on signage and marketing materials.

attributes.name: unit_number
attributes.description: Business identifier for the restaurant unit. Externally-known unique code used across operational systems and franchise communications.

products.name: location_profile
products.description: Physical and geographic attributes of each restaurant unit including full street address, city, state, province, postal code, country, DMA (Designated Market Area), trade area classification, latitude/longitude, timezone, locale, accessibility features, parking capacity, drive-thru lane count, patio seating availability, and proximity to key landmarks. Supports site analytics, delivery radius configuration, and regional reporting.

attributes.name: location_profile_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the restaurant location profile. Primary key for this entity.

attributes.name: lease_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.lease. Business justification: location_profile.lease_expiration_date is a denormalized field from realestate.lease. A direct lease_id FK enforces referential integrity and supports lease-location profile reconciliation for franchi

attributes.name: primary_location_restaurant_unit_id
attributes.description: Reference to the master restaurant unit record. Links this location profile to the operational restaurant entity.

attributes.name: site_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.site. Business justification: location_profile is used for site selection validation, market analysis, and trade area reporting. A direct site_id FK enables site-level location profile management and market classification reportin

attributes.name: territory_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.territory. Business justification: Each restaurant location falls within a franchise territory for royalty allocation, territory compliance, and development rights management. Franchise operations teams need to know which territory a l

attributes.name: address_line_1
attributes.description: Primary street address of the restaurant location including street number and name. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: address_line_2
attributes.description: Secondary address information such as suite, unit, or building number. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: building_ownership_type
attributes.description: Type of ownership or lease arrangement for the restaurant building. Impacts financial reporting and CapEx decisions.

attributes.name: city
attributes.description: City or municipality where the restaurant is located. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code identifying the country where the restaurant operates.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this location profile record was first created in the system. Audit trail for data lineage.

attributes.name: delivery_radius_km
attributes.description: Maximum delivery radius in kilometers for online ordering and third-party delivery services. Configured per location based on geography and capacity.

attributes.name: dma_code
attributes.description: Nielsen Designated Market Area code identifying the media market. Used for marketing campaign planning and regional media analysis.

attributes.name: drive_thru_lane_count
attributes.description: Number of drive-thru lanes at the restaurant. Critical for throughput capacity planning and speed of service benchmarking.

attributes.name: email_address
attributes.description: Primary email address for the restaurant location. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: fax_number
attributes.description: Fax number for the restaurant location if applicable. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: has_accessible_parking
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant has ADA-compliant accessible parking spaces. Required for regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: has_drive_thru
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant has drive-thru service capability. Key differentiator for QSR format and operational model.

attributes.name: has_patio_seating
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant has outdoor patio seating available. Impacts cover count and seasonal capacity.

attributes.name: has_playground
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant has a children's playground. Differentiator for family-oriented locations.

attributes.name: has_restroom
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant has customer restroom facilities. Impacts guest experience and local health code compliance.

attributes.name: has_wheelchair_access
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant has wheelchair-accessible entrances and facilities. Required for ADA compliance.

attributes.name: has_wifi
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant offers guest WiFi service. Enhances guest experience and supports digital ordering.

attributes.name: last_remodel_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent major remodel or renovation. Used for CapEx tracking and brand standard compliance.

attributes.name: last_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this location profile record was last modified. Audit trail for data lineage and change tracking.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the restaurant location in decimal degrees. Used for mapping, delivery radius calculation, and proximity analytics.

attributes.name: locale
attributes.description: Locale identifier for language and regional formatting preferences. Used for menu display, signage, and customer communications.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the restaurant location in decimal degrees. Used for mapping, delivery radius calculation, and proximity analytics.

attributes.name: lot_size_sqft
attributes.description: Total lot size in square feet including building, parking, and landscaping. Used for site selection and property management.

attributes.name: parking_capacity
attributes.description: Total number of parking spaces available at or near the restaurant location. Influences site selection and accessibility.

attributes.name: patio_seat_count
attributes.description: Number of seats available on the outdoor patio. Used for capacity planning and table turn analysis.

attributes.name: phone_number
attributes.description: Primary contact phone number for the restaurant location. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code for the restaurant location. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: proximity_to_airport_km
attributes.description: Distance in kilometers from the restaurant to the nearest airport. Influences traveler traffic and site classification.

attributes.name: proximity_to_highway_km
attributes.description: Distance in kilometers from the restaurant to the nearest major highway. Used for site selection and trade area analysis.

attributes.name: proximity_to_mall_km
attributes.description: Distance in kilometers from the restaurant to the nearest shopping mall. Impacts foot traffic and co-location strategy.

attributes.name: restaurant_number
attributes.description: Business identifier for the restaurant unit. Externally-known code used in operations, reporting, and franchise communications.

attributes.name: site_closed_date
attributes.description: Date when the restaurant location permanently closed. Used for portfolio analysis and historical reporting.

attributes.name: site_opened_date
attributes.description: Date when the restaurant location first opened for business. Used for NRO tracking, maturity analysis, and comp sales calculations.

attributes.name: site_status
attributes.description: Current operational status of the restaurant site. Used for reporting, site portfolio management, and NRO tracking.

attributes.name: square_footage
attributes.description: Total interior square footage of the restaurant building. Used for real estate valuation, CapEx planning, and operational benchmarking.

attributes.name: state_province
attributes.description: State, province, or administrative region code. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: timezone
attributes.description: IANA timezone identifier for the restaurant location. Used for daypart scheduling, operating hours, and time-based reporting.

attributes.name: trade_area_classification
attributes.description: Classification of the trade area type where the restaurant is located. Influences site selection, menu offerings, and operational strategies. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: urban|suburban|rural|highway|airport|mall|downtown|neighborhood — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

products.name: format_config
products.description: Defines the operational format, physical configuration, and total capacity of a restaurant unit. Includes dining format (QSR, fast-casual, casual, fine-dining), service model (counter, table, drive-thru, kiosk), FOH layout (total indoor seating capacity, outdoor/patio seating capacity, bar seating count, private dining room capacity, ADA-compliant seating count, table count, cover count), BOH layout (kitchen footprint sq ft, cooking lines, prep stations), drive-thru configuration (lane count, stacking capacity for vehicles), kiosk count, counter service positions, and maximum cover count per daypart. This is the single source of truth for all physical capacity and layout attributes of a unit — governs brand standard compliance, throughput benchmarking, labor staffing ratios, health department permit compliance, and fire marshal occupancy limits.

attributes.name: format_config_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the restaurant format configuration record. Primary key.

attributes.name: brand_standard_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand_standard. Business justification: format_config already carries brand_standard_compliance_status, which is an execution-specific compliance assessment against a brand standard. Adding brand_standard_id FK directly to format_config all

attributes.name: primary_format_restaurant_unit_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the restaurant unit to which this format configuration applies.

attributes.name: alcohol_service_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant format is licensed and configured to serve alcoholic beverages.

attributes.name: boh_cooking_line_count
attributes.business_glossary_term: Back of House (BOH) Cooking Line Count
attributes.description: Number of cooking lines or production stations in the Back of House (BOH) kitchen.

attributes.name: boh_kitchen_sq_ft
attributes.business_glossary_term: Back of House (BOH) Kitchen Square Footage
attributes.description: Total square footage of the Back of House (BOH) kitchen and food preparation area.

attributes.name: boh_prep_station_count
attributes.business_glossary_term: Back of House (BOH) Prep Station Count
attributes.description: Number of food preparation stations in the Back of House (BOH) kitchen.

attributes.name: brand_standard_compliance_status
attributes.description: Current compliance status of the format configuration against brand standards and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).

attributes.name: breakfast_daypart_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant format operates during the breakfast daypart and serves breakfast menu items.

attributes.name: config_version
attributes.description: Version identifier for this format configuration, used to track changes and updates over time.

attributes.name: cover_count_capacity_per_daypart
attributes.description: Maximum number of covers (individual meals served) the restaurant can accommodate during a single daypart (breakfast, lunch, dinner) based on seating and throughput.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this format configuration record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: curbside_pickup_enabled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant format supports curbside pickup service for online orders.

attributes.name: dining_format_type
attributes.description: The primary dining format classification of the restaurant unit: Quick-Service Restaurant (QSR), fast-casual, casual dining, or fine-dining.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Restaurant Industry Standards

attributes.name: drive_thru_lane_config
attributes.description: Drive-Thru (DT) lane configuration: none (no drive-thru), single lane, dual lane, or triple lane.

attributes.name: drive_thru_window_count
attributes.description: Number of Drive-Thru (DT) service windows available for order pickup.

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: Date when this format configuration became or will become effective for the restaurant unit.

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: Date when this format configuration expires or is superseded by a new configuration. Null indicates current active configuration.

attributes.name: foh_bar_seating_count
attributes.business_glossary_term: Front of House (FOH) Bar Seating Count
attributes.description: Number of bar seats available in the Front of House (FOH) area, if applicable.

attributes.name: foh_outdoor_seating_count
attributes.business_glossary_term: Front of House (FOH) Outdoor Seating Count
attributes.description: Number of outdoor patio or sidewalk seats available in the Front of House (FOH) area.

attributes.name: foh_seating_capacity
attributes.description: Total number of guest seats available in the Front of House (FOH) dining area, including indoor and outdoor seating.

attributes.name: foh_table_count
attributes.description: Total number of dining tables in the Front of House (FOH) area.

attributes.name: format_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name or label for this format configuration (e.g., 'Standard QSR with DT', 'Urban Fast-Casual').

attributes.name: kds_screen_count
attributes.description: Number of Kitchen Display System (KDS) screens installed in the Back of House (BOH) for order routing and production management.

attributes.name: kiosk_count
attributes.description: Number of self-service digital ordering kiosks installed in the restaurant.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this format configuration record was last updated or modified.

attributes.name: last_remodel_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent remodel or renovation that affected the format configuration of the restaurant.

attributes.name: late_night_daypart_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant format operates during late-night hours (typically after 10 PM).

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments regarding special considerations, exceptions, or unique characteristics of this format configuration.

attributes.name: olo_enabled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant format supports Online Ordering (OLO) through web or mobile app channels.

attributes.name: parking_space_count
attributes.description: Number of parking spaces available for guest use at the restaurant location.

attributes.name: pos_terminal_count
attributes.description: Number of Point of Sale (POS) terminals installed for order capture and payment processing.

attributes.name: service_model
attributes.description: Primary service delivery model: counter service, table service, drive-thru, self-service kiosk, or hybrid combination.

attributes.name: sos_benchmark_seconds
attributes.description: Target Speed of Service (SOS) benchmark in seconds from order placement to order delivery, based on format and service model.

attributes.name: table_turn_target_minutes
attributes.description: Target table turn time in minutes for table-service formats, representing the average time from guest seating to table availability.

attributes.name: third_party_delivery_enabled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant format supports Third-Party Delivery (3PD) integration with external delivery platforms.

attributes.name: throughput_capacity_per_hour
attributes.description: Maximum number of customer transactions the restaurant can process per hour under optimal conditions, based on format configuration.

attributes.name: twenty_four_hour_operation_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant operates 24 hours per day, 7 days per week.

products.name: operating_hours
products.description: Scheduled operating hours for each restaurant unit by day of week and daypart (breakfast, lunch, dinner, late-night, 24hr). Captures open time, close time, daypart start/end times, holiday schedule overrides, seasonal hour adjustments, drive-thru-specific hours, delivery window hours, and last-order cutoff times. Used for order routing, labor scheduling, and SSS (Same-Store Sales) period alignment.

attributes.name: operating_hours_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the operating hours record. Primary key.

attributes.name: primary_operating_approved_by_user_employee_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the user who approved this operating hours schedule. Used for audit trail and compliance tracking.

attributes.name: primary_operating_restaurant_unit_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the restaurant unit to which these operating hours apply. Links to the restaurant master record.

attributes.name: approved_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this operating hours schedule was approved, in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format. Used for audit trail and compliance tracking.

attributes.name: close_time
attributes.description: The time the restaurant closes for the specified day and daypart, in 24-hour HH:mm format (e.g., 22:00). May extend past midnight for late-night operations.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this operating hours record was first created in the system, in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format. Used for audit trail and data lineage.

attributes.name: day_of_week
attributes.description: The day of the week for which these operating hours are defined. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: monday|tuesday|wednesday|thursday|friday|saturday|sunday — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: daypart
attributes.description: The daypart segment (breakfast, lunch, dinner, late-night, all-day, overnight) for which these hours apply. Used for menu availability, labor scheduling, and Same-Store Sales (SSS) period alignment.

attributes.name: daypart_end_time
attributes.description: The end time of the specific daypart window (e.g., breakfast ends at 11:00), in 24-hour HH:mm format. Used for menu engineering and Product Mix (PMIX) analysis.

attributes.name: daypart_start_time
attributes.description: The start time of the specific daypart window (e.g., breakfast starts at 06:00), in 24-hour HH:mm format. Used for menu engineering and Product Mix (PMIX) analysis.

attributes.name: delivery_window_close_time
attributes.description: The time the restaurant stops accepting delivery orders (Online Ordering (OLO) and Third-Party Delivery (3PD)), in 24-hour HH:mm format. May differ from dine-in hours.

attributes.name: delivery_window_open_time
attributes.description: The time the restaurant begins accepting delivery orders (Online Ordering (OLO) and Third-Party Delivery (3PD)), in 24-hour HH:mm format. May differ from dine-in hours.

attributes.name: drive_thru_close_time
attributes.description: The time the Drive-Thru (DT) lane closes, in 24-hour HH:mm format. May differ from Front of House (FOH) close time for QSR (Quick-Service Restaurant) units.

attributes.name: drive_thru_open_time
attributes.description: The time the Drive-Thru (DT) lane opens, in 24-hour HH:mm format. May differ from Front of House (FOH) open time for QSR (Quick-Service Restaurant) units.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: The date on which these operating hours expire, in yyyy-MM-dd format. Null for open-ended schedules. Used for temporary hour changes and seasonal adjustments.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: The date from which these operating hours become effective, in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for scheduling future hour changes and seasonal adjustments.

attributes.name: expected_cover_count
attributes.description: The expected number of covers (individual diners served) during this daypart for casual and fine-dining establishments. Used for labor scheduling and inventory planning.

attributes.name: expected_table_turn_count
attributes.description: The expected number of table turns (times a table is occupied and vacated) during this daypart for casual and fine-dining establishments. Used for capacity planning and revenue forecasting.

attributes.name: holiday_name
attributes.description: The name of the holiday for which this schedule override applies (e.g., Christmas, Thanksgiving, New Year's Day). Null if not a holiday override.

attributes.name: holiday_schedule_override_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether these operating hours represent a holiday schedule override. True if this is a holiday exception, False for regular schedule.

attributes.name: is_24_hour_operation
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant operates 24 hours a day for the specified day. True if open continuously, False otherwise.

attributes.name: is_closed
attributes.description: Indicates whether the restaurant is closed for the specified day and daypart. True if closed, False if open.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this operating hours record was last modified, in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format. Used for audit trail and change tracking.

attributes.name: last_order_cutoff_time
attributes.description: The time by which the last order must be placed before the restaurant stops accepting new orders, in 24-hour HH:mm format. Used for Online Ordering (OLO) and Third-Party Delivery (3PD) routing.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments about this operating hours schedule. May include reasons for schedule changes, special instructions, or operational context.

attributes.name: open_time
attributes.description: The time the restaurant opens for the specified day and daypart, in 24-hour HH:mm format (e.g., 06:00).

attributes.name: schedule_status
attributes.description: The current lifecycle status of this operating hours record. Active schedules are in effect; pending schedules are future-dated; expired schedules are past their end date; suspended schedules are temporarily disabled.

attributes.name: schedule_type
attributes.description: The type of operating hours schedule. Regular for standard weekly hours, holiday for holiday overrides, seasonal for seasonal adjustments, temporary for one-time changes, special_event for event-driven hours.

attributes.name: seasonal_adjustment_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether these operating hours represent a seasonal adjustment (e.g., extended summer hours, reduced winter hours). True if seasonal, False for standard schedule.

attributes.name: seasonal_period_name
attributes.description: The name of the seasonal period for which this schedule adjustment applies (e.g., Summer, Winter, Back-to-School). Null if not a seasonal adjustment.

attributes.name: special_event_name
attributes.description: The name of the special event for which these operating hours apply (e.g., Super Bowl Sunday, Local Festival, Grand Opening). Null if not a special event schedule.

attributes.name: target_speed_of_service_seconds
attributes.description: The target Speed of Service (SOS) in seconds for this daypart. Represents the benchmark time from order placement to order fulfillment. Used for operational performance tracking.

attributes.name: target_ticket_time_seconds
attributes.description: The target ticket time in seconds for this daypart. Represents the benchmark time from order entry to Kitchen Display System (KDS) completion. Used for Back of House (BOH) performance tracking.

attributes.name: throughput_capacity_per_hour
attributes.description: The estimated number of customer transactions the restaurant can process per hour during this daypart. Used for labor scheduling and Speed of Service (SOS) benchmarking.

products.name: equipment_asset
products.description: Inventory of all BOH and FOH equipment assets installed at each restaurant unit including all equipment types (fryer, grill, oven, KDS stations, POS terminals, refrigeration units, ice machines, espresso machines, drive-thru timers). Captures make, model, serial number, installation date, warranty expiry, last service date, next scheduled maintenance date, asset condition rating, replacement cost, software version (for digital equipment), and equipment-specific configuration attributes. Supports R&M (Repairs and Maintenance) planning, CapEx forecasting, PCI DSS compliance for payment terminals, and food safety compliance for temperature-critical equipment.

attributes.name: equipment_asset_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the equipment asset record. Primary key.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: equipment_asset tracks acquisition_cost, maintenance costs, and depreciation. Equipment maintenance and depreciation expenses are allocated to cost centers for restaurant-level cost accounting. No exi

attributes.name: facility_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.facility. Business justification: Facility-level equipment audits (health inspection, fire safety, ADA compliance) require knowing all equipment assets within a facility. In foodservice, equipment is physically tied to a facility for

attributes.name: fixed_asset_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.fixed_asset. Business justification: Asset depreciation and financial reporting require each physical equipment asset to be tied to a fixed‑asset record in finance.

attributes.name: haccp_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to foodsafety.haccp_plan. Business justification: Critical equipment (fryers, coolers, holding units) is governed by specific HACCP plans and CCPs. Linking equipment assets to their governing HACCP plan enables targeted corrective actions, maintenanc

attributes.name: primary_equipment_restaurant_unit_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the restaurant unit where this equipment asset is installed.

attributes.name: acquisition_cost_usd
attributes.description: Original purchase price paid for the equipment asset in US dollars, used for CapEx (Capital Expenditure) tracking and depreciation calculations.

attributes.name: asset_condition_rating
attributes.description: Current physical and operational condition assessment of the equipment asset based on inspection and performance criteria.

attributes.name: asset_tag_number
attributes.description: Externally visible unique asset tag or barcode identifier affixed to the equipment for tracking and inventory purposes.

attributes.name: compliance_certification_expiry_date
attributes.description: Date when the current compliance certification expires and recertification or inspection is required.

attributes.name: compliance_certification_number
attributes.description: Certification or approval number from regulatory bodies (FDA, NSF, UL, OSHA) confirming the equipment meets safety and sanitation standards.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this equipment asset record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: depreciation_method
attributes.description: Accounting method used to allocate the cost of the equipment asset over its useful life for financial reporting and tax purposes.

attributes.name: disposal_date
attributes.description: Date when the equipment asset was decommissioned and removed from the restaurant, marking the end of its operational lifecycle.

attributes.name: disposal_method
attributes.description: Method by which the equipment was disposed of at end of life, supporting asset lifecycle tracking and environmental compliance.

attributes.name: energy_rating
attributes.description: Energy efficiency rating or certification (e.g., Energy Star rating) indicating the equipment's power consumption performance.

attributes.name: equipment_category
attributes.description: High-level classification grouping equipment by operational domain (cooking, refrigeration, POS systems, etc.). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: cooking|refrigeration|food_prep|beverage|pos_system|kitchen_display|sanitation|hvac — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: equipment_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name or designation of the equipment asset (e.g., Fryer Station 1, POS Terminal 3, Walk-in Cooler).

attributes.name: equipment_type
attributes.description: Category of equipment asset distinguishing its primary function within BOH (Back of House) or FOH (Front of House) operations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: fryer|grill|oven|refrigeration_unit|freezer|ice_machine|pos_terminal|kds_display|espresso_machine|beverage_dispenser|dishwasher|ventilation_hood|warming_cabinet|prep_table — 14 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: installation_date
attributes.description: Date when the equipment asset was installed and commissioned at the restaurant location.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this equipment asset record was most recently updated.

attributes.name: last_service_date
attributes.description: Most recent date when preventive maintenance or repair service was performed on this equipment asset.

attributes.name: last_temperature_check_timestamp
attributes.description: Most recent date and time when temperature was verified for temperature-critical equipment, supporting food safety audit trails.

attributes.name: lease_expiry_date
attributes.description: Date when the lease or rental agreement for this equipment expires, requiring renewal or return of the asset.

attributes.name: location_zone
attributes.description: Physical zone within the restaurant where the equipment is installed: BOH (Back of House), FOH (Front of House), Drive-Thru, Storage, or Outdoor.

attributes.name: maintenance_frequency_days
attributes.description: Number of days between scheduled preventive maintenance services as defined by manufacturer guidelines or internal SOPs.

attributes.name: manufacturer_name
attributes.description: Name of the company that manufactured the equipment asset.

attributes.name: model_number
attributes.description: Manufacturer-assigned model number or designation for the equipment.

attributes.name: next_scheduled_maintenance_date
attributes.description: Planned date for the next preventive maintenance service visit based on manufacturer recommendations and SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) schedules.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for additional comments, special handling instructions, or historical context about the equipment asset.

attributes.name: operational_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status indicating whether the equipment is actively in use, under maintenance, or retired from service.

attributes.name: ownership_type
attributes.description: Indicates whether the equipment is owned outright by the restaurant, leased under a capital or operating lease, or rented short-term.

attributes.name: power_consumption_watts
attributes.description: Rated electrical power consumption of the equipment in watts under normal operating conditions, used for energy cost forecasting.

attributes.name: replacement_cost_usd
attributes.description: Estimated current market cost to replace this equipment asset with a comparable new unit, used for R&M (Repairs and Maintenance) budgeting and insurance valuation.

attributes.name: serial_number
attributes.description: Unique serial number assigned by the manufacturer to this specific equipment unit for warranty and service tracking.

attributes.name: service_contract_number
attributes.description: Reference number of the active service or maintenance contract covering this equipment asset, if applicable.

attributes.name: temperature_critical_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this equipment maintains temperature-sensitive food products and requires continuous monitoring for HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points) compliance.

attributes.name: temperature_max_f
attributes.description: Maximum safe operating temperature threshold in Fahrenheit for temperature-critical equipment, above which food safety is compromised.

attributes.name: temperature_min_f
attributes.description: Minimum safe operating temperature threshold in Fahrenheit for temperature-critical equipment, below which food safety is compromised.

attributes.name: useful_life_years
attributes.description: Expected operational lifespan of the equipment asset in years, used for depreciation calculations and replacement planning.

attributes.name: warranty_expiry_date
attributes.description: Date when the manufacturer or vendor warranty coverage ends, after which repairs and parts are at the restaurant's expense.

attributes.name: warranty_start_date
attributes.description: Date when the manufacturer or vendor warranty coverage begins for this equipment asset.

products.name: brand_standard
products.description: Defines the brand standards and SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) applicable to each restaurant unit by concept type and ownership model. Captures standard code, standard name, standard category (food quality, cleanliness, service, safety, brand presentation), applicable format (QSR/casual/fine-dining), compliance requirement level (mandatory/recommended), effective date, expiry date, governing body reference (NRA, FDA, OSHA), and linked SOP document reference. Operational anchor for audit and compliance workflows.

attributes.name: brand_standard_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the brand standard record. Primary key.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: Brand standards are defined and owned by a specific brand — a brand standard for a QSR brand is distinct from one for a casual dining brand. brand_standard has applicable_format and applicable_ownersh

attributes.name: owner_department_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.department. Business justification: brand_standard carries an owner_department STRING column representing the department responsible for maintaining the standard (e.g., Operations, Food Safety, Marketing). The department product exists

attributes.name: superseded_by_standard_brand_standard_id
attributes.description: Reference to the brand_standard_id of the newer standard that replaces this one. Null if this standard is current and has not been superseded.

attributes.name: applicable_format
attributes.description: Restaurant format(s) to which this brand standard applies. QSR (Quick-Service Restaurant) for fast food, casual for casual dining, fine_dining for upscale establishments, or combinations/all formats. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: all|qsr|casual|fine_dining|qsr_casual|qsr_fine_dining|casual_fine_dining — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: applicable_ownership_model
attributes.description: Ownership model(s) to which this standard applies: company-owned units, franchised units, or all units regardless of ownership.
attributes.references: Franchise Agreement Terms; Internal Operations Manual

attributes.name: audit_frequency
attributes.description: Expected frequency at which compliance with this standard should be audited or inspected (e.g., daily temperature logs, monthly cleanliness audits, annual safety inspections). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: daily|weekly|monthly|quarterly|semi_annual|annual|ad_hoc — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: brand_standard_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the brand standard. Active standards are in force. Inactive standards are no longer enforced. Draft standards are under development. Under_review standards are being revised. Superseded standards have been replaced by a newer version.

attributes.name: certification_body
attributes.description: Name of the external organization or authority that issues the required certification (e.g., National Restaurant Association ServSafe, OSHA, Local Health Department). Null if no certification is required.
attributes.references: NRA ServSafe; OSHA; Local Health Departments

attributes.name: certification_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether staff must obtain a formal certification to perform tasks related to this standard (e.g., ServSafe Food Handler certification for food safety standards). True if certification is mandatory, False otherwise.

attributes.name: compliance_requirement_level
attributes.description: Enforcement level of the standard. Mandatory standards must be met for operational compliance and are subject to audit consequences. Recommended standards are best practices encouraged but not enforced. Aspirational standards represent future-state goals.
attributes.references: Internal Brand Standards Framework; Franchise Agreement

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this brand standard record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: Date on which this brand standard becomes active and enforceable. Standards are not applicable before this date.

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: Date on which this brand standard is no longer active or enforceable. Null indicates an open-ended standard with no planned expiration.

attributes.name: governing_body_reference
attributes.description: External regulatory or industry body that mandates or influences this standard (e.g., FDA, USDA, OSHA, NRA ServSafe, Local Health Department, ISO 22000). Null if the standard is purely internal.
attributes.references: FDA Food Code; OSHA Standards; NRA ServSafe; ISO 22000

attributes.name: guest_facing_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this standard directly impacts the guest experience and is visible or perceptible to customers (e.g., FOH cleanliness, service speed, food presentation). True if guest-facing, False if back-of-house or internal only.

attributes.name: last_review_date
attributes.description: Date on which this brand standard was last reviewed for accuracy, relevance, and compliance with current regulations. Used to track review cycles and ensure standards remain current.

attributes.name: measurement_method
attributes.description: Method by which compliance with this standard is assessed: direct observation (visual inspection), checklist (structured audit form), measurement (thermometer, timer), testing (lab analysis, swab test), documentation review (log verification), or guest feedback (CSAT, NPS).

attributes.name: next_review_date
attributes.description: Scheduled date for the next formal review of this brand standard. Ensures periodic reassessment to maintain relevance and regulatory alignment.

attributes.name: non_compliance_consequence
attributes.description: Consequence or remediation action triggered when a unit fails to meet this standard. Ranges from warnings and corrective action plans to financial penalties, operational suspension, or franchise termination for critical violations.

attributes.name: priority_level
attributes.description: Business priority level of the standard. Critical standards directly impact guest safety or regulatory compliance. High standards affect brand reputation or operational efficiency. Medium and low standards are important but less urgent.

attributes.name: sop_document_reference
attributes.description: Reference identifier or URI to the detailed SOP document that operationalizes this brand standard. May be a document management system ID, SharePoint link, or file path.

attributes.name: standard_category
attributes.description: High-level classification of the brand standard into operational domains: food quality (taste, temperature, freshness), food safety (HACCP compliance, contamination prevention), cleanliness (sanitation, hygiene), service excellence (guest interaction, speed of service), brand presentation (signage, uniforms, decor), workplace safety (OSHA compliance, injury prevention), or equipment maintenance (preventive maintenance, calibration). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: food_quality|food_safety|cleanliness|service_excellence|brand_presentation|workplace_safety|equipment_maintenance — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: NRA ServSafe Standards; FDA Food Code; OSHA Guidelines

attributes.name: standard_code
attributes.description: Unique business identifier code for the brand standard, typically following a category-number pattern (e.g., FS-001 for Food Safety standard 001, CL-042 for Cleanliness standard 042).

attributes.name: standard_description
attributes.description: Detailed narrative description of the brand standard, including the specific requirement, rationale, and expected outcome. May reference specific procedures, thresholds, or quality criteria.

attributes.name: standard_name
attributes.description: Full descriptive name of the brand standard (e.g., 'Proper Handwashing Protocol', 'Drive-Thru Speed of Service Target', 'Uniform and Appearance Guidelines').

attributes.name: target_metric_unit
attributes.description: Unit of measure for the target metric value (e.g., degrees Fahrenheit, seconds, percentage, count). Null if the standard does not have a quantitative metric.

attributes.name: target_metric_value
attributes.description: Specific quantitative or qualitative target that defines compliance with this standard (e.g., 'Food temperature >= 165°F', 'Speed of Service <= 90 seconds', 'Cleanliness score >= 95%', 'Zero critical violations'). Null if the standard is qualitative without a numeric threshold.

attributes.name: training_module_reference
attributes.description: Reference identifier to the training module or course that covers this brand standard. May be an LMS (Learning Management System) course ID or training document reference. Null if no formal training module exists.

attributes.name: training_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether formal training is required for staff to understand and comply with this standard. True if training is mandatory, False otherwise.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this brand standard record was last modified in the system.

attributes.name: version_number
attributes.description: Version identifier for the standard, following semantic versioning (e.g., 1.0, 2.1, 3.0). Incremented when the standard is revised or updated.

products.name: unit_performance
products.description: Periodic operational and financial performance record for each restaurant unit capturing AUV (Average Unit Volume), SSS (Same-Store Sales) growth %, comp sales (Comparable Store Sales) vs. prior period, ADT (Average Daily Transactions), ATC (Average Transaction Count), ACV (Average Check Value), COGS% (Cost of Goods Sold Percentage), Labor% (Labor Cost Percentage), Waste% (Food Waste Percentage), EBITDA, and net revenue. Sourced from Oracle MICROS POS and SAP S/4HANA. Primary performance scorecard for unit-level P&L management.

attributes.name: unit_performance_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the unit performance record. Primary key for this periodic operational and financial performance snapshot.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: unit_performance tracks labor_cost_amount, cogs_amount, utility_expense_amount — all cost-center-level actuals. Linking to cost_center enables cost center variance analysis against budget targets (cog

attributes.name: financial_period_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.financial_period. Business justification: Unit performance records are period-close financial snapshots. Linking to financial_period enables SSS calculations, period-over-period variance reporting, and fiscal calendar alignment — a core requi

attributes.name: primary_restaurant_unit_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the restaurant unit for which this performance record is captured. Links to the restaurant master record.

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Unit P&L KPIs (EBITDA, net income, operating income) in unit_performance roll up to profit centers for segment reporting and brand-level P&L consolidation. A foodservice finance controller expects uni

attributes.name: acv_amount
attributes.description: Average Check Value (ACV) - average revenue per customer transaction during the performance period. Calculated as total revenue divided by transaction count.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: adt_count
attributes.description: Average Daily Transactions (ADT) - average number of customer transactions processed per day during the performance period.

attributes.name: atc_count
attributes.description: Average Transaction Count (ATC) - total number of customer transactions during the performance period.

attributes.name: auc_amount
attributes.description: Average Unit Volume (AUV) - total revenue generated by the restaurant unit during the performance period. Key metric for unit-level revenue performance.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: cogs_amount
attributes.description: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) - total cost of food and beverage inventory consumed during the performance period.

attributes.name: cogs_percent
attributes.description: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) Percentage - COGS as a percentage of total revenue. Key metric for food cost management.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: comp_sales_amount
attributes.description: Comparable Store Sales (Comp Sales) - revenue for the current period for units that were operational in both the current and prior comparison period.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: comp_sales_variance_amount
attributes.description: Variance in Comparable Store Sales between current period and prior period, expressed as an absolute amount.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this performance record (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

attributes.name: ebitda_amount
attributes.business_glossary_term: Earnings Before Interest Taxes Depreciation and Amortization (EBITDA) Amount
attributes.description: Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization (EBITDA) - key profitability metric for unit-level P&L management.

attributes.name: gross_revenue_amount
attributes.description: Gross revenue before any deductions (discounts, promotions, refunds, voids) during the performance period.

attributes.name: labor_cost_amount
attributes.description: Total labor cost including wages, benefits, and payroll taxes for the performance period.

attributes.name: labor_percent
attributes.description: Labor Cost Percentage - total labor cost as a percentage of total revenue. Key metric for workforce efficiency.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: marketing_expense_amount
attributes.description: Marketing and promotional expenses allocated to this unit during the performance period, including local store marketing and national campaign contributions.

attributes.name: net_income_amount
attributes.description: Net income (profit after all expenses, taxes, interest, depreciation, and amortization) for the performance period.

attributes.name: net_revenue_amount
attributes.description: Net revenue after deducting discounts, promotions, refunds, and voids during the performance period.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments regarding this performance period, including explanations for anomalies, special events, or operational issues.

attributes.name: operating_income_amount
attributes.description: Operating income (revenue minus operating expenses) for the performance period. Excludes interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization.

attributes.name: performance_status
attributes.description: Status of the performance record indicating whether the data is draft, preliminary, final, revised, or archived.

attributes.name: record_created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this performance record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: record_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this performance record was last updated in the system.

attributes.name: rent_expense_amount
attributes.description: Rent or lease expense for the restaurant facility during the performance period. Includes base rent and Common Area Maintenance (CAM) charges for leased locations.

attributes.name: rm_expense_amount
attributes.description: Repairs and Maintenance (R&M) expense for equipment, facilities, and infrastructure during the performance period.

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Primary source system from which this performance data was extracted. Oracle MICROS POS for transaction data, SAP S/4HANA for financial data, or Integrated for combined sources.

attributes.name: sss_growth_percent
attributes.description: Same-Store Sales (SSS) growth percentage comparing current period revenue to the same period in the prior year for units open at least 12 months. Excludes new restaurant openings.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) Financial Reporting Standards

attributes.name: total_operating_expenses_amount
attributes.description: Total operating expenses including COGS, labor, utilities, rent, repairs and maintenance, and other operational costs.

attributes.name: utility_expense_amount
attributes.description: Total utility expenses (electricity, gas, water, waste disposal) during the performance period.

attributes.name: waste_amount
attributes.description: Total cost of food waste (spoilage, preparation errors, expired inventory) during the performance period.

attributes.name: waste_percent
attributes.description: Food Waste Percentage - waste cost as a percentage of total COGS. Key metric for inventory and quality management.

products.name: capacity_config
products.description: Defines the seating and service capacity configuration for each restaurant unit including total indoor seating capacity, outdoor/patio seating capacity, bar seating count, private dining room capacity, drive-thru stacking capacity (number of vehicles), kiosk count, counter service positions, maximum cover count per daypart, and ADA-compliant seating count. Used for throughput planning, labor staffing ratios, and health department permit compliance.

attributes.name: capacity_config_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the capacity configuration record. Primary key.

attributes.name: primary_capacity_restaurant_unit_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the restaurant unit to which this capacity configuration applies.

attributes.name: ada_compliant_seating_count
attributes.business_glossary_term: ADA (Americans with Disabilities Act) Compliant Seating Count
attributes.description: Number of seating positions that meet ADA accessibility requirements for guests with disabilities.

attributes.name: avg_party_size
attributes.description: Average number of guests per dining party used for capacity planning and labor forecasting.

attributes.name: bar_seating_count
attributes.description: Number of seats available at the bar or counter service area.

attributes.name: config_effective_date
attributes.description: The date from which this capacity configuration becomes effective for the restaurant unit.

attributes.name: config_end_date
attributes.description: The date on which this capacity configuration ceases to be effective. Null indicates the configuration is currently active.

attributes.name: config_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes documenting special considerations, constraints, or context for this capacity configuration.

attributes.name: config_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the capacity configuration record.

attributes.name: counter_service_positions
attributes.description: Number of staffed counter service positions available for order taking and guest interaction.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this capacity configuration record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: curbside_pickup_spaces
attributes.description: Number of designated parking spaces available for curbside pickup and online ordering (OLO) fulfillment.

attributes.name: delivery_staging_capacity
attributes.description: Number of completed delivery orders that can be staged simultaneously in the designated pickup area for third-party delivery (3PD) drivers.

attributes.name: drive_thru_sos_target_seconds
attributes.description: Target time in seconds for drive-thru order fulfillment from order point to pickup window.

attributes.name: drive_thru_stacking_capacity
attributes.description: Maximum number of vehicles that can queue in the drive-thru lane before reaching the order point.

attributes.name: fire_code_occupancy_limit
attributes.description: Maximum number of occupants (guests and staff) permitted in the facility as determined by local fire safety regulations.

attributes.name: health_permit_capacity
attributes.description: Maximum seating capacity approved by the local health department on the restaurant operating permit.

attributes.name: indoor_seating_capacity
attributes.description: Total number of indoor seats available for guest dining in the Front of House (FOH) area.

attributes.name: kiosk_count
attributes.description: Number of self-service ordering kiosks available in the Front of House (FOH) for guest order placement.

attributes.name: kitchen_production_capacity_orders_per_hour
attributes.description: Maximum number of orders the Back of House (BOH) kitchen can produce per hour at full operational capacity.

attributes.name: labor_staffing_ratio
attributes.description: Target ratio of Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) staff to seating capacity or covers, used for workforce scheduling and labor cost planning.

attributes.name: max_cover_count_breakfast
attributes.description: Maximum number of guest covers (individual diners) that can be served during the breakfast daypart based on seating and throughput capacity.

attributes.name: max_cover_count_dinner
attributes.description: Maximum number of guest covers that can be served during the dinner daypart based on seating and throughput capacity.

attributes.name: max_cover_count_late_night
attributes.business_glossary_term: Maximum Cover Count - Late Night Daypart
attributes.description: Maximum number of guest covers that can be served during the late night daypart based on seating and throughput capacity.

attributes.name: max_cover_count_lunch
attributes.description: Maximum number of guest covers that can be served during the lunch daypart based on seating and throughput capacity.

attributes.name: outdoor_seating_capacity
attributes.description: Total number of outdoor or patio seats available for guest dining.

attributes.name: peak_hour_throughput_capacity
attributes.description: Maximum number of guest transactions or covers that can be processed during the busiest hour of operation.

attributes.name: private_dining_capacity
attributes.description: Total seating capacity in private dining rooms or event spaces within the restaurant.

attributes.name: sos_target_seconds
attributes.description: Target time in seconds from order placement to order delivery, used as a key operational performance metric.

attributes.name: table_turn_target_minutes
attributes.description: Target time in minutes for a complete table turn cycle from guest seating to table reset for the next guest.

attributes.name: total_seating_capacity
attributes.description: Aggregate seating capacity across all dining areas including indoor, outdoor, bar, and private dining.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this capacity configuration record was last modified.

products.name: area_management
products.description: Defines the operational management hierarchy above the restaurant unit level. Captures area/district/region boundaries, area manager assignment (name, employee ID, assignment effective dates), number of units in area, geographic region, division, brand, and area performance targets (AUV target, SSS target, CSAT target, Labor% target). Supports multi-unit management accountability, area manager performance reviews, regional performance rollups, and franchise territory alignment. One row per area/district assignment period.

attributes.name: area_management_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the area management record. Primary key.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: area_management currently carries a 'brand' STRING column which is a denormalized brand name. In a multi-brand foodservice operator, each area/district management structure is typically aligned to a s

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Area management holds financial targets (auv_target, cogs_percent_target, labor_percent_target, marketing_fund_contribution_percent). Areas map to cost centers for area-level budget roll-up and field

attributes.name: parent_area_area_management_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the parent area in the management hierarchy. Null for top-level areas.

attributes.name: area_code
attributes.description: Business identifier code for the area or district. Used in operational reporting and area manager assignment.

attributes.name: area_name
attributes.description: Descriptive name of the area or district (e.g., 'Northeast Metro', 'Southern California Region').

attributes.name: area_status
attributes.description: Current operational status of the area management record.

attributes.name: area_type
attributes.description: Classification of the area management level within the organizational hierarchy.

attributes.name: auv_target
attributes.description: Target Average Unit Volume (AUV) for restaurants in this area, representing expected annual sales per unit.

attributes.name: cogs_percent_target
attributes.business_glossary_term: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) Percentage Target
attributes.description: Target Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) as a percentage of sales for restaurants in this area.

attributes.name: company_owned_unit_count
attributes.description: Number of company-owned restaurant units within this area.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code for the primary country in which this area operates.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this area management record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: csat_target_score
attributes.description: Target Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) score for this area, typically measured on a scale of 0-100.

attributes.name: division
attributes.description: Corporate division or business unit to which this area is assigned.

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: Date when this area management configuration became effective.

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: Date when this area management configuration expires or is superseded. Null for current configurations.

attributes.name: franchise_agreement_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this area is governed by a franchise area development agreement.

attributes.name: franchise_unit_count
attributes.description: Number of franchised restaurant units within this area.

attributes.name: geographic_region
attributes.description: Broader geographic region to which this area belongs (e.g., 'West Coast', 'Midwest', 'Southeast').

attributes.name: hierarchy_level
attributes.description: Numeric level in the area management hierarchy, with 1 being the top level (e.g., national) and higher numbers representing more granular levels (e.g., region, district).

attributes.name: labor_percent_target
attributes.description: Target labor cost as a percentage of sales for restaurants in this area.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this area management record was last updated.

attributes.name: marketing_fund_contribution_percent
attributes.description: Percentage of sales contributed to the marketing fund by units in this area.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Additional notes or comments regarding this area management record.

attributes.name: nps_target_score
attributes.description: Target Net Promoter Score (NPS) for this area, measuring customer loyalty and likelihood to recommend.

attributes.name: nro_target_count
attributes.description: Target number of New Restaurant Openings (NRO) planned for this area within the current fiscal year.

attributes.name: royalty_rate_percent
attributes.description: Standard royalty rate percentage applied to franchise units in this area.

attributes.name: sos_target_seconds
attributes.description: Target Speed of Service (SOS) in seconds for restaurants in this area, measuring average transaction time.

attributes.name: sss_target_percent
attributes.description: Target Same-Store Sales (SSS) growth percentage for this area, used to measure year-over-year comparable store performance.

attributes.name: state_province
attributes.description: Primary state or province for this area. May be null for multi-state areas.

attributes.name: territory_boundary_description
attributes.description: Textual description of the geographic or operational boundaries defining this area (e.g., 'All units within 50 miles of downtown Chicago').

attributes.name: unit_count
attributes.description: Total number of restaurant units (company-owned and franchised) within this area.

products.name: unit_ownership
products.description: Tracks the ownership and operational control history of each restaurant unit including ownership type (company-owned, franchised, licensed, joint-venture), franchise partner reference, ownership effective start date, ownership effective end date, transfer reason (new franchise award, resale, corporate acquisition, closure), and operating entity legal name. Provides the authoritative ownership timeline for royalty calculation, P&L attribution, and franchise compliance reporting. Complements the franchise domain without duplicating franchise partner master data.

attributes.name: unit_ownership_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for each unit ownership record. Primary key for the unit ownership history table.

attributes.name: agreement_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.agreement. Business justification: Unit ownership is governed by a specific franchise agreement defining royalty rates, term, and operating obligations. Franchise compliance and legal teams require the direct link between a unit's owne

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
