attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Promotions are launched under a campaign; linking enables aggregation of promotion performance.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Promotion discount costs (e.g., LTO price reductions) must be allocated to a cost center for marketing P&L reporting and budget variance analysis. QSR finance teams track promotional spend by cost cen

attributes.name: franchisee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to franchise.franchisee. Business justification: Allows tracking of promotions originated by individual franchisees, supporting franchisee-specific performance dashboards and reimbursement of promotion costs.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Promotion discount amounts are posted to specific GL accounts (promotional discount expense, contra-revenue). Finance reconciles total promotion liability and discount expense against GL balances duri

attributes.name: ingredient_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.ingredient. Business justification: Promotions featuring specific ingredients (e.g., 'Angus Beef LTO') require supply readiness validation before launch. The 'Promotion Supply Readiness Review' process — confirming ingredient availabili

attributes.name: nro_project_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.nro_project. Business justification: Grand opening promotions (BOGO, free item offers) are standard NRO marketing tools in QSR/casual dining. Linking promotion directly to nro_project supports grand opening promotional planning, redempti

attributes.name: owner_employee_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Promotions are created, owned, and approved by specific marketing employees. Tracking the owning employee enables approval workflows, compliance audits, and accountability reporting. In restaurant mar

attributes.name: segment_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to guest.guest_segment. Business justification: Promotions define eligibility by guest segment. This FK replaces the denormalized eligible_guest_segments text field, enabling proper eligibility enforcement, segment-based promotion targeting reports

attributes.name: site_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.site. Business justification: Local promotions are often site‑specific (e.g., store‑level discounts); linking allows promotion scheduling, audit, and performance tracking per restaurant site.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.supply_supplier. Business justification: Supplier‑Sponsored Promotions require tracking which supplier funded the promotion; creates a FK to the supplier entity.

attributes.name: unit_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.unit. Business justification: Store‑specific promotions must be tied to the unit for performance tracking, local compliance, and redemption reporting.

attributes.name: applicable_channels
attributes.description: Sales channels where the promotion can be redeemed (POS, online ordering, third‑party delivery, mobile app).
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: discount_amount
attributes.description: Fixed monetary discount applied when the promotion is used.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: discount_percentage
attributes.description: Percentage discount applied when the promotion is used.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: eligibility_criteria
attributes.description: Business rules defining eligibility (e.g., purchase of specific SKU, time of day).

attributes.name: end_date

attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: is_exclusive

attributes.name: is_stackable

attributes.name: minimum_purchase_amount
attributes.description: Minimum order total required for the promotion to be eligible.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: promo_category
attributes.description: High‑level business grouping of the promotion for reporting purposes.

attributes.name: promo_source
attributes.description: Origin of the promotion (e.g., corporate, franchisee, external partner).

attributes.name: promotion_code
attributes.description: Business code used to reference the promotion in POS and reporting systems.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: promotion_description
attributes.description: Detailed marketing description of the promotion displayed to guests.

attributes.name: promotion_name
attributes.description: Human‑readable name of the promotional offer.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: promotion_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the promotion.

attributes.name: promotion_type
attributes.description: Category of the promotion defining the pricing mechanic (e.g., discount, buy‑one‑get‑one).

attributes.name: record_audit_created
attributes.description: Timestamp when the promotion record was first created in the system.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: record_audit_updated
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the promotion record.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: redemption_count
attributes.description: Running total of how many times the promotion has been redeemed.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: redemption_limit_per_customer
attributes.description: Maximum number of times a single guest may redeem the promotion.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: start_date
attributes.description: Date when the promotion becomes effective and can be redeemed.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

attributes.name: total_redemption_limit
attributes.description: Overall cap on the number of redemptions across all guests.
attributes.references: System of Record: Oracle MICROS POS

products.name: promotion_redemption
products.description: Transactional record capturing each instance of a guest redeeming a promotional offer at a restaurant. Captures redemption timestamp, channel (POS/OLO/3PD/app), restaurant unit, promotion redeemed, discount amount applied, order value before and after discount, guest identifier (if known), and loyalty member flag. Enables measurement of promotion uptake, discount liability, and incremental traffic driven by promotional activity.

attributes.name: promotion_redemption_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the promotion redemption record.

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the marketing campaign linked to the promotion.

attributes.name: channel_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to order.channel. Business justification: Channel-level promotion redemption analytics: marketing teams report promotion performance by channel (mobile app vs. in-store vs. drive-thru) to optimize channel-specific offers. The plain 'channel'

attributes.name: coupon_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.coupon. Business justification: A promotion redemption is frequently triggered by the presentation of a specific coupon (physical or digital). Linking promotion_redemption directly to coupon enables fraud prevention validation (chec

attributes.name: digital_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to guest.digital_account. Business justification: Digital channel promotion redemptions are tied to a specific digital account (app/web). This link supports per-account redemption limit enforcement, fraud prevention, and digital channel attribution r

attributes.name: employee_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the employee who processed the redemption.

attributes.name: guest_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to order.guest_order. Business justification: Promotion redemption reconciliation: marketing ops and finance teams reconcile every redemption event against the actual order for ROI calculation, fraud detection, and redemption validation. A foodse

attributes.name: primary_promotion_guest_profile_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the guest who redeemed the promotion.

attributes.name: primary_promotion_loyalty_member_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the loyalty member associated with the redemption.

attributes.name: primary_promotion_restaurant_unit_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the restaurant unit where redemption occurred.

attributes.name: promotion_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the promotion that was redeemed.

attributes.name: visit_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to guest.guest_visit. Business justification: Promotion redemptions occur during a specific guest visit. Linking redemption to guest_visit enables visit-level promotion attribution reporting — a core restaurant marketing analytics process measuri

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the redemption record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values.

attributes.name: daypart
attributes.description: Meal period during which the redemption occurred.

attributes.name: device_code
attributes.description: Identifier of the POS or kiosk device that captured the redemption.

attributes.name: discount_amount
attributes.description: Monetary value of the discount applied.

attributes.name: discount_percent
attributes.description: Percentage discount applied when discount is percent‑based.

attributes.name: discount_type
attributes.description: Indicates whether the discount is a fixed amount or a percentage.

attributes.name: is_test_redemption
attributes.description: True if the redemption was a test or training transaction.

attributes.name: loyalty_member_flag
attributes.description: Indicates if the guest is a loyalty program member at the time of redemption.

attributes.name: promotion_redemption_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the redemption.

attributes.name: redemption_number
attributes.description: Business identifier for the redemption event, often displayed to staff.

attributes.name: redemption_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the promotion was redeemed.

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: System of record that originated the redemption data (e.g., MICROS, OLO).

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the redemption record.

products.name: coupon
products.description: Master record for physical and digital coupons issued as part of marketing campaigns or standalone promotional activity. Captures coupon code, coupon type (single-use/multi-use/loyalty-exclusive/app-only/printed), face value or discount type, eligible menu items or categories, channel restrictions (POS/OLO/3PD/app), issue date, expiry date, maximum redemption count, and fraud prevention flags. Distinct from promotion (which defines the offer mechanic) — coupon is the specific issued instrument.

attributes.name: coupon_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the coupon record.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: Coupons are brand-specific in multi-brand restaurant groups; brand-level coupon liability reporting, redemption rate analysis, and franchise marketing fund compliance require knowing which brand each

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the marketing campaign that issued the coupon.

attributes.name: channel_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to order.channel. Business justification: Channel-restricted coupon management: marketing teams configure coupons valid only on specific channels (e.g., app-only coupons, drive-thru exclusives). A proper FK to order.channel enforces referenti

attributes.name: menu_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to menu.menu_item. Business justification: Required for Coupon Management: link item‑specific coupons to the menu item they discount, enabling redemption tracking, inventory impact analysis, and compliance reporting.

attributes.name: offer_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to loyalty.offer. Business justification: Marketing coupons are a distribution channel for loyalty offers (e.g., a coupon code activates a loyalty offer). Linking coupon to offer enables tracking of which loyalty offers were distributed via c

attributes.name: promotion_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.promotion. Business justification: A coupon is the physical or digital instrument that operationalizes a promotion. The coupon currently links to campaign_id but not directly to the governing promotion record. Adding promotion_id to co

attributes.name: reward_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to loyalty.reward. Business justification: Marketing coupons in restaurant operations frequently distribute loyalty rewards (e.g., a coupon code that redeems a free item reward). Linking coupon to reward enables reconciliation of coupon redemp

attributes.name: coupon_code
attributes.description: Human‑readable code assigned to the coupon for issuance and redemption tracking.

attributes.name: coupon_description
attributes.description: Full marketing description and terms of the coupon.

attributes.name: coupon_name
attributes.description: Descriptive name of the coupon used in marketing materials.

attributes.name: coupon_status
attributes.business_glossary_term: Coupon Lifecycle Status (e.g., Active, Expired, Revoked, Pending, Cancelled)
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the coupon.

attributes.name: coupon_type
attributes.business_glossary_term: Coupon Type (e.g., Single‑Use, Multi‑Use, Loyalty‑Exclusive, App‑Only, Printed)
attributes.description: Classification of the coupon indicating its usage rules.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the coupon record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: discount_amount
attributes.description: Monetary value of the discount when discount_type is fixed_amount.

attributes.name: discount_percentage
attributes.description: Percentage value of the discount when discount_type is percentage.

attributes.name: discount_type
attributes.business_glossary_term: Discount Type (Percentage, Fixed Amount, Free Item)
attributes.description: Mechanism by which the coupon provides a discount.

attributes.name: eligible_item_category
attributes.business_glossary_term: Eligible Item Category (Menu Category or SKU)
attributes.description: Menu category or SKU that the coupon can be applied to.

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: Date after which the coupon can no longer be redeemed.

attributes.name: fraud_prevention_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Fraud Prevention Flag (Indicates Potential Fraudulent Use)
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether the coupon is subject to fraud monitoring.

attributes.name: is_exclusive
attributes.business_glossary_term: Exclusive Flag (Indicates if Coupon Excludes Other Promotions)
attributes.description: Indicates whether the coupon excludes the use of other promotions.

attributes.name: is_stackable
attributes.business_glossary_term: Stackable Flag (Indicates if Coupon Can Be Combined with Others)
attributes.description: Indicates whether the coupon can be used together with other promotions.

attributes.name: issue_date
attributes.description: Date the coupon was generated and made available.

attributes.name: max_redemptions
attributes.description: Total number of times the coupon may be redeemed across all customers.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free‑form field for internal remarks about the coupon.

attributes.name: per_customer_limit
attributes.description: Maximum number of redemptions allowed per individual guest.

attributes.name: redemption_count
attributes.description: Number of times the coupon has already been redeemed.

attributes.name: redemption_window_end
attributes.description: End date of the period during which the coupon may be redeemed.

attributes.name: redemption_window_start
attributes.description: Start date of the period during which the coupon may be redeemed.

attributes.name: store_scope
attributes.business_glossary_term: Store Scope (All Stores, Selected Stores, Specific Stores)
attributes.description: Geographic or store‑level scope where the coupon is valid.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the coupon record.

attributes.name: usage_limit_type
attributes.description: Specifies whether the coupon has a usage limit.

domains.name: finance
domains.description: Authoritative domain for general ledger (GL), accounts payable (AP), accounts receivable (AR), fixed assets (FA), cost center management, budgeting, P&L reporting, EBITDA tracking, CapEx/OpEx classification, revenue management, royalty income accounting, and multi-entity consolidation via SAP S/4HANA. GAAP/IFRS compliant financial statements.

products.name: gl_account
products.description: Chart of accounts master record for the general ledger in SAP S/4HANA (CO/GL modules). Defines every account code used across all legal entities, including P&L accounts, balance sheet accounts, cost element accounts, and statistical accounts. Supports multi-entity consolidation, GAAP/IFRS dual-ledger reporting, and account group hierarchies. Each record carries account type (asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense), functional area, account group, and currency settings.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the general ledger account record. Primary key.

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Reference to the legal entity (company code) to which this GL account belongs. Supports multi-entity consolidation across franchise and company-owned operations.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Company Code; GAAP/IFRS Consolidation Requirements

attributes.name: parent_account_gl_account_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent account in the account hierarchy for roll-up reporting. Null for top-level accounts. Enables multi-level account group hierarchies.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Account Hierarchy; GAAP/IFRS Financial Statement Aggregation

attributes.name: account_currency
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for accounts that manage balances in a specific currency (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR', 'GBP'). Null for accounts managed only in company code currency.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA Currency Management

attributes.name: account_description
attributes.description: Detailed business description of the account purpose, usage guidelines, and what types of transactions should be posted to this account.

attributes.name: account_group
attributes.description: SAP account group code that defines the account's characteristics, field status, and number range. Controls account behavior and validation rules in SAP S/4HANA.

attributes.name: account_name
attributes.description: Human-readable short name or title of the GL account (e.g., 'Food Cost - Beef', 'Franchise Royalty Revenue', 'Depreciation - Equipment').

attributes.name: account_number
attributes.description: The externally-known unique account code used across all legal entities in the chart of accounts. Typically 6-10 digit numeric code following SAP S/4HANA GL numbering convention.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Chart of Accounts; GAAP/IFRS Account Structure

attributes.name: account_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the GL account: 'active' for normal use, 'blocked' for temporarily suspended, 'closed' for permanently retired, 'pending_activation' for newly created accounts awaiting approval.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA GL Master Data Lifecycle

attributes.name: account_type
attributes.description: High-level classification of the account into one of the five fundamental financial statement categories: asset, liability, equity, revenue, or expense.

attributes.name: alternate_account_number
attributes.description: Alternative or legacy account code used for cross-reference, migration mapping, or external reporting (e.g., mapping to previous ERP system account numbers).
attributes.references: Data Migration Standards; Legacy System Integration

attributes.name: balance_sheet_classification
attributes.description: Specific balance sheet line item classification for asset, liability, and equity accounts. Set to 'not_applicable' for P&L (Profit and Loss) accounts (revenue/expense).

attributes.name: cash_flow_classification
attributes.description: Classification of this account for cash flow statement presentation: 'operating' for operational cash flows, 'investing' for CapEx (Capital Expenditure) and asset transactions, 'financing' for debt and equity, 'not_applicable' for non-cash accounts.

attributes.name: consolidation_account_number
attributes.description: Mapped account number used in corporate consolidation reporting to standardize accounts across multiple legal entities and chart of accounts structures.
attributes.references: GAAP/IFRS Consolidation Standards (ASC 810 / IFRS 10); SAP S/4HANA Consolidation

attributes.name: cost_element_category
attributes.description: Classification of cost element: 'primary' for costs posted from external transactions (FI to CO), 'secondary' for internal allocations and assessments, 'not_applicable' if not a cost element.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO Cost Element Categories

attributes.name: cost_element_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this GL account is also defined as a cost element in SAP Controlling (CO) module for cost center and internal order postings.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO (Controlling) Cost Element Master

attributes.name: created_by_user
attributes.description: User ID or name of the person who created this GL account record. Supports accountability and audit requirements.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA User Audit; SOX Compliance

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this GL account record was first created in the system. Audit trail for account master data governance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Audit Trail; SOX Compliance

attributes.name: field_status_group
attributes.description: SAP field status group code that controls which fields are required, optional, or suppressed when posting transactions to this account.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Field Status Variant Configuration

attributes.name: financial_statement_category
attributes.description: Detailed sub-classification within the account type for financial statement presentation (e.g., 'Current Assets', 'Long-Term Liabilities', 'Operating Revenue', 'Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)', 'Selling General and Administrative (SG&A)').
attributes.references: GAAP/IFRS Financial Statement Presentation; SAP S/4HANA Financial Statement Version

attributes.name: functional_area
attributes.description: Business function or operational area this account supports (e.g., 'Restaurant Operations', 'Franchise', 'Supply Chain', 'Marketing', 'Corporate', 'Real Estate'). Used for segment reporting and management accounting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Functional Area; GAAP/IFRS Segment Reporting (ASC 280 / IFRS 8)

attributes.name: gaap_account_indicator
attributes.business_glossary_term: Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) Account Indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this account is used in GAAP-compliant financial statements. Supports dual-ledger reporting for companies reporting under both GAAP and IFRS.

attributes.name: ifrs_account_indicator
attributes.business_glossary_term: International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) Account Indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this account is used in IFRS-compliant financial statements. Supports dual-ledger reporting for companies reporting under both GAAP and IFRS.

attributes.name: intercompany_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this account is used for intercompany transactions between legal entities that require elimination during consolidation.

attributes.name: last_modified_by_user
attributes.description: User ID or name of the person who last modified this GL account record. Supports change tracking and accountability.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA User Audit; SOX Compliance

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this GL account record was last updated. Tracks changes to account master data for audit and compliance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Audit Trail; SOX Compliance

attributes.name: line_item_display_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether individual line item details are stored and displayed for this account. True for most operational accounts; false for summary accounts.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for additional notes, special instructions, or business context about this GL account (e.g., usage guidelines, approval requirements, historical context).

attributes.name: open_item_management_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this account uses open item management for tracking and clearing individual transactions (e.g., for clearing accounts, suspense accounts).

attributes.name: planning_level
attributes.description: Granularity level at which budget planning and forecasting is performed for this account (e.g., 'corporate', 'region', 'restaurant', 'cost_center').
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Budget Planning; Management Accounting Best Practices

attributes.name: posting_allowed_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether direct transaction postings are allowed to this account. False for summary/header accounts that only receive totals from sub-accounts.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA GL Account Master Field Status

attributes.name: profit_loss_classification
attributes.description: Specific P&L statement line item classification for revenue and expense accounts (e.g., 'Sales Revenue', 'COGS (Cost of Goods Sold)', 'Labor Cost', 'Occupancy Cost', 'EBITDA (Earnings Before Interest Taxes Depreciation and Amortization)'). Null for balance sheet accounts.
attributes.references: GAAP/IFRS Income Statement Structure; Restaurant Industry P&L Format

attributes.name: reconciliation_account_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this is a reconciliation account (subledger control account) that summarizes detailed transactions from AP (Accounts Payable), AR (Accounts Receivable), or FA (Fixed Assets) subledgers.

attributes.name: segment_reporting_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether transactions posted to this account are included in segment reporting for business unit, geographic, or product line analysis.

attributes.name: sort_key
attributes.description: SAP sort key that determines the default sorting and grouping of line items posted to this account (e.g., by posting date, document number, or business partner).
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Line Item Display Configuration

attributes.name: statistical_account_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this is a statistical account used for tracking non-monetary quantities (e.g., headcount, transaction counts, cover counts) without affecting financial balances.

attributes.name: tax_category
attributes.description: Tax treatment classification for this account (e.g., 'taxable_revenue', 'non_taxable_revenue', 'input_tax', 'output_tax', 'exempt'). Used for sales tax, VAT, and GST reporting.
attributes.references: IRS Tax Code; State/Local Sales Tax Regulations; SAP S/4HANA Tax Configuration

attributes.name: valid_from_date
attributes.description: Date from which this GL account becomes active and available for transaction posting. Supports time-dependent account master data.

attributes.name: valid_to_date
attributes.description: Date until which this GL account remains active. Null for accounts with no planned end date. Used for account retirement and historical reporting.

products.name: cost_center
products.description: Organizational cost center master data and cost allocation activity from SAP S/4HANA CO module. Represents the smallest unit of cost accountability — individual restaurant units, regional offices, corporate departments, and shared service centers. Master data tracks cost center type (restaurant, regional, corporate), responsible manager, controlling area, profit center assignment, valid-from/to dates, and hierarchy node. Allocation activity captures periodic distributions of shared costs (corporate overhead, IT, HR, marketing fund) using defined allocation keys (headcount, revenue, square footage), including sender/receiver relationships, allocation cycles, allocation rules, basis amounts, and reversal indicators. Enables fully-loaded restaurant P&L, Labor%/COGS%/OpEx allocation, accurate EBITDA by unit, and transparent overhead burden rates for franchise vs. company-owned comparisons.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the cost center. Primary key.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: cost_center has brand_code as a plain denormalized column. Cost centers are structured by brand for brand-level cost allocation and overhead reporting in multi-brand foodservice operations. brand_code

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Cost centers in SAP CO belong to a specific company code (legal entity). The company_code STRING column is denormalized and should be replaced by a FK to the legal_entity master, enabling proper multi

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Cost centers in SAP CO are assigned to profit centers for P&L reporting. The profit_center_code STRING column is denormalized and should be replaced by a FK to the profit_center master, enabling prope

attributes.name: budget_amount
attributes.description: The approved annual budget amount for this cost center in local currency. Used for variance analysis, Labor% and COGS% target setting, and OpEx control. Updated during annual budgeting cycles and mid-year reforecasts.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO Module; Financial Planning

attributes.name: budget_year
attributes.description: The fiscal year for which the budget_amount is applicable. Enables multi-year budget tracking and year-over-year variance analysis.

attributes.name: business_area_code
attributes.description: The SAP business area classification. Used to segment financial reporting by line of business (e.g., QSR, casual dining, catering, franchise operations) for multi-brand or multi-format portfolios.

attributes.name: capex_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this cost center is eligible to receive capital expenditure allocations. True for restaurant units (equipment, R&M), distribution centers, and major corporate facilities. False for pure administrative departments. Used to distinguish CapEx from OpEx in financial reporting.

attributes.name: cogs_percent_target
attributes.business_glossary_term: Cost of Goods Sold Percent (COGS%) Target
attributes.description: The target COGS% (cost of goods sold as a percentage of revenue) for this cost center. Critical KPI for food cost management. Typical QSR targets range from 25-35%. Used for menu engineering, pricing strategy, and supplier negotiations.

attributes.name: controlling_area_code
attributes.description: The SAP Controlling Area to which this cost center belongs. Controlling areas represent the highest level of cost accounting organization, typically aligned with legal entities or major geographic regions for multi-entity consolidation.

attributes.name: cost_center_category
attributes.description: High-level categorization of the cost center's role. Revenue-generating centers (FOH, BOH) directly contribute to sales; support centers (maintenance, training) enable operations; administrative centers (HR, finance) provide governance; overhead centers (facilities, utilities) are indirect; capital project centers track CapEx initiatives.

attributes.name: cost_center_code
attributes.description: The externally-known alphanumeric code for the cost center as defined in SAP S/4HANA Controlling module. Used in financial reporting and P&L statements.

attributes.name: cost_center_description
attributes.description: Free-text description providing additional context about this cost center's purpose, scope, or special characteristics. Used for documentation and reporting clarity.

attributes.name: cost_center_name
attributes.description: The full business name of the cost center (e.g., 'Store #1234 - Downtown Chicago', 'Regional Office - Midwest', 'Corporate HR Department').

attributes.name: cost_center_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the cost center. Active centers accept cost postings; inactive centers are temporarily disabled; pending centers are awaiting approval; closed centers are permanently retired; suspended centers are on hold; planned centers are scheduled for future activation (e.g., NRO pipeline).

attributes.name: cost_center_type
attributes.description: Classification of the cost center by organizational function. Restaurant units are individual QSR locations; regional offices manage geographic territories; corporate departments are headquarters functions; shared service centers provide centralized support; distribution centers handle supply chain; franchise support manages franchisee relations.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where this cost center operates. Used for multi-country consolidation, currency translation, and jurisdiction-specific compliance (FDA, USDA, local health departments).

attributes.name: created_by_user
attributes.description: The user ID of the person who created this cost center record. Used for audit trails and accountability.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this cost center record was first created in the system. Used for audit trails and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for this cost center's local currency. Used for budget planning, cost allocation, and multi-currency consolidation in GAAP/IFRS financial statements.

attributes.name: drive_thru_lanes
attributes.description: The number of drive-thru lanes at this location. Nullable for non-DT formats. Critical for SOS (Speed of Service) analysis, throughput capacity planning, and DT-specific cost allocation.

attributes.name: format_code
attributes.description: The restaurant format classification. Examples: DT (Drive-Thru), DINE_IN, KIOSK, FOOD_COURT, AIRPORT, GHOST_KITCHEN. Used for format-specific cost benchmarking, throughput analysis, and real estate site selection.

attributes.name: franchise_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this cost center represents a franchise-owned unit (true) or a company-owned unit (false). Critical for revenue recognition (royalty income vs direct sales), P&L consolidation, and franchise compliance tracking.

attributes.name: functional_area_code
attributes.description: The functional area classification for cross-company-code reporting. Typical values include operations, marketing, R&D, administration, IT, finance. Used for functional P&L views and OpEx analysis.

attributes.name: labor_percent_target
attributes.description: The target Labor% (labor cost as a percentage of revenue) for this cost center. Critical KPI for restaurant operations. Typical QSR targets range from 20-30%. Used for workforce scheduling optimization and P&L performance evaluation.

attributes.name: last_modified_by_user
attributes.description: The user ID of the person who last modified this cost center record. Used for audit trails and change accountability.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this cost center record was last updated. Used for change tracking and data freshness validation.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for operational notes, special instructions, or historical context. Examples: 'Undergoing renovation Q2 2024', 'Pilot location for new POS system', 'Seasonal closure Nov-Mar'.

attributes.name: opex_allocation_method
attributes.description: The method used to allocate shared operating expenses to this cost center. Direct costs are posted directly; allocated methods distribute corporate overhead based on revenue, headcount, square footage, transaction volume, or fixed percentages. Used for full-absorption P&L reporting.

attributes.name: parent_cost_center_code
attributes.description: The cost center code of the immediate parent in the organizational hierarchy. Nullable for top-level cost centers. Enables recursive hierarchy traversal for regional and corporate rollups.

attributes.name: region_code
attributes.description: The geographic region code for this cost center. Used for regional P&L rollups, SSS (Same-Store Sales) analysis, and regional manager accountability. Examples: NEAST, SWEST, MIDWEST, INTL.

attributes.name: seating_capacity
attributes.description: The number of customer seats available at this cost center location. Nullable for non-dine-in formats (drive-thru only, ghost kitchens). Used for cover count analysis, table turn calculations, and throughput benchmarking.

attributes.name: square_footage
attributes.description: The total interior square footage of this cost center facility. Used for OpEx allocation (utilities, CAM charges), productivity metrics (sales per square foot), and real estate valuation.

attributes.name: valid_from_date
attributes.description: The date from which this cost center becomes effective and can accept cost postings. Aligns with NRO (New Restaurant Opening) dates for restaurant units or organizational change effective dates for corporate centers.

attributes.name: valid_to_date
attributes.description: The date through which this cost center remains effective. Nullable for open-ended cost centers. Populated when a restaurant closes, a department is dissolved, or a regional office is consolidated.

products.name: profit_center
products.description: Profit center master record from SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA module. Represents a business segment for internal P&L reporting — individual restaurant units, brand segments, geographic regions, or franchise vs. company-owned groupings. Supports SSS (Same-Store Sales) reporting, AUV (Average Unit Volume) tracking, and EBITDA decomposition by segment. Carries hierarchy assignment, controlling area, and responsible executive.

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the profit center. Primary key for the profit center master record in SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA module.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA Master Data Standard

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to restaurant.brand. Business justification: profit_center has brand_code as a plain denormalized column. Profit centers are organized by brand for brand-level segment P&L reporting — a regulatory and management reporting requirement in multi-br

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Profit centers in SAP EC-PCA belong to a specific company code (legal entity). The company_code STRING column is denormalized and should be replaced by a FK to the legal_entity master, enabling proper

attributes.name: parent_profit_center_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent profit center in the organizational hierarchy. Enables recursive roll-up for regional and brand-level P&L aggregation.

attributes.name: aov_target_amount
attributes.description: Target annual revenue for this profit center expressed in the profit center's functional currency. Used for AUV benchmarking and performance variance analysis.

attributes.name: business_area_code
attributes.description: SAP business area code for cross-company-code reporting. Enables consolidated P&L views across multiple legal entities within the same business segment.

attributes.name: closure_date
attributes.description: Date the profit center ceased operations. Null for active profit centers. Used for historical P&L analysis and closed-unit portfolio reporting.

attributes.name: closure_reason
attributes.description: Business reason for profit center closure (e.g., lease expiration, underperformance, market exit, franchise termination). Used for portfolio optimization analysis.

attributes.name: consolidation_unit_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the consolidation unit for multi-entity financial consolidation. Used in GAAP/IFRS-compliant consolidated financial statement preparation.

attributes.name: controlling_area_code
attributes.description: SAP controlling area to which this profit center is assigned. Controlling area represents the organizational unit for cost accounting and internal reporting.

attributes.name: cost_center_group_code
attributes.description: Code of the cost center group associated with this profit center. Links profit center P&L to underlying cost center actuals for COGS and OpEx analysis.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this profit center record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for P&L reporting (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Determines the functional currency for this profit center's financial transactions.

attributes.name: ebitda_target_amount
attributes.business_glossary_term: Earnings Before Interest Taxes Depreciation and Amortization (EBITDA) Target Amount
attributes.description: Target EBITDA for this profit center expressed in the profit center's functional currency. Used for profitability benchmarking and executive performance evaluation.
attributes.references: GAAP; IFRS; Restaurants Financial Planning Standard

attributes.name: geographic_region_code
attributes.description: Code representing the geographic region (e.g., Northeast, Southwest, EMEA, APAC). Used for regional P&L consolidation and market performance analysis.

attributes.name: last_modified_by_user
attributes.description: Username or identifier of the user who last modified this profit center record. Used for audit trail and accountability.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this profit center record was last updated. Used for change tracking and data quality monitoring.

attributes.name: lock_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether the profit center is locked for transaction posting. Locked centers cannot receive new P&L entries but remain visible for historical reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA Master Data Standard

attributes.name: marketing_fund_rate_percent
attributes.description: Marketing fund contribution rate percentage for franchise profit centers. Represents the percentage of gross sales contributed to the brand marketing fund.
attributes.references: FTC Franchise Rule; IFA Franchise Agreement Standards

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes and comments about the profit center. Used to document special circumstances, organizational changes, or reporting exceptions.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA Master Data Standard

attributes.name: opening_date
attributes.description: Date the profit center commenced operations. Used to calculate operating tenure for SSS eligibility and maturity-based performance benchmarking.

attributes.name: ownership_model
attributes.description: Ownership structure of the profit center. Determines revenue recognition treatment, royalty income accounting, and CapEx/OpEx allocation rules.
attributes.references: GAAP ASC 606; IFRS 15; Restaurants Franchise Accounting Policy

attributes.name: profit_center_category
attributes.description: Functional category of the profit center. Operating centers generate direct revenue; non-operating centers represent overhead or shared services allocated to operating units.

attributes.name: profit_center_code
attributes.description: Business identifier code for the profit center as defined in SAP controlling area. Used in financial reporting and P&L statements.

attributes.name: profit_center_name
attributes.description: Full descriptive name of the profit center (e.g., 'Downtown Chicago QSR Unit 1234', 'Northeast Regional Franchise Group', 'Company-Owned Casual Dining Segment').
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA Master Data Standard

attributes.name: profit_center_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the profit center. Active centers participate in P&L reporting; inactive centers are excluded from current period consolidation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA Master Data Standard

attributes.name: royalty_rate_percent
attributes.description: Royalty rate percentage applied to franchise profit centers. Represents the percentage of gross sales remitted to the franchisor as ongoing royalty income.
attributes.references: FTC Franchise Rule; IFA Franchise Agreement Standards

attributes.name: segment_reporting_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this profit center is a reportable segment under GAAP ASC 280 or IFRS 8. Reportable segments require separate disclosure in external financial statements.

attributes.name: segment_type
attributes.description: Classification of the profit center by business segment type. Determines the level of P&L aggregation and reporting hierarchy.

attributes.name: short_name
attributes.description: Abbreviated name or alias for the profit center used in reports and dashboards for space-constrained displays.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA Master Data Standard

attributes.name: sss_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this profit center is included in Same-Store Sales (SSS) / Comparable Store Sales (Comp Sales) calculations. Typically requires 12+ months of operating history.
attributes.references: NRA (National Restaurant Association) SSS Reporting Standard

attributes.name: tax_jurisdiction_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the primary tax jurisdiction for this profit center. Determines applicable sales tax, VAT, and income tax treatment in P&L reporting.
attributes.references: GAAP ASC 740; IFRS IAS 12; Local Tax Authority Standards

attributes.name: valid_from_date
attributes.description: Effective start date for this profit center record. Profit center becomes active for P&L posting and reporting from this date forward.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA Master Data Standard

attributes.name: valid_to_date
attributes.description: Effective end date for this profit center record. Profit center is excluded from P&L posting and reporting after this date. Null for open-ended validity.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EC-PCA Master Data Standard

products.name: legal_entity
products.description: Master record for each legal entity (company code) within the Restaurants corporate structure and intercompany transaction activity from SAP S/4HANA FI. Covers company-owned operating entities, holding companies, franchise subsidiaries, and joint ventures across all geographies. Entity master stores fiscal year variant, chart of accounts assignment, local currency, tax jurisdiction, GAAP/IFRS reporting standard, and consolidation group membership. Intercompany activity captures management fee charges, shared service allocations, intercompany loans, cross-entity food supply transfers, netting status, elimination flags, and reconciliation periods. Foundation for multi-entity financial consolidation, intercompany elimination in consolidated financial statements, and segment reporting.

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the legal entity record. Primary key.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code Master

attributes.name: parent_entity_legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the parent legal entity in the corporate hierarchy. Null for the ultimate parent company.

attributes.name: primary_ultimate_parent_entity_legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the top-level parent entity in the corporate structure. Used for ultimate consolidation and group reporting.

attributes.name: accounting_standard
attributes.description: Primary accounting framework used for financial statement preparation. GAAP for US entities, IFRS for international, or local statutory standards.

attributes.name: address_line_1
attributes.description: First line of the legal entity's registered office address as filed with corporate registry.

attributes.name: address_line_2
attributes.description: Second line of the legal entity's registered office address (suite, floor, building name).

attributes.name: city
attributes.description: City or municipality of the legal entity's registered office.

attributes.name: company_code
attributes.description: Four-character alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the legal entity in SAP S/4HANA FI. Used as the organizational unit for financial accounting and external reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code Configuration

attributes.name: consolidation_group_code
attributes.description: Identifier of the consolidation group or reporting segment this entity belongs to for multi-entity financial consolidation.

attributes.name: consolidation_method
attributes.description: Method used to consolidate this entity's financial results into group reporting. Full for subsidiaries, equity for associates, none for non-consolidated entities.
attributes.references: GAAP ASC 810 Consolidation; IFRS IFRS 10; IFRS IAS 28

attributes.name: controlling_area
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA organizational unit for cost accounting, internal reporting, and profitability analysis. May span multiple company codes.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO Controlling Area Configuration

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the legal entity's registered office address.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this legal entity record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: credit_control_area
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA organizational unit for managing customer credit limits and credit exposure across one or more company codes.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Credit Management Configuration

attributes.name: dissolution_date
attributes.description: Date the legal entity was officially dissolved or ceased operations. Null for active entities.

attributes.name: duns_number
attributes.description: Nine-digit unique identifier assigned by Dun & Bradstreet for business credit and supplier management.

attributes.name: effective_from_date
attributes.description: Date from which this legal entity record is effective for financial posting and reporting. Used for time-dependent organizational changes.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code Master

attributes.name: effective_to_date
attributes.description: Date until which this legal entity record is effective. Null for currently active entities. Used for historical tracking of organizational changes.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code Master

attributes.name: entity_status
attributes.description: Current operational and legal status of the entity. Active entities post transactions; inactive entities are retained for historical reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code Master

attributes.name: entity_type
attributes.description: Classification of the legal entity structure. Determines ownership model, consolidation treatment, and reporting obligations.

attributes.name: fiscal_year_end_month
attributes.description: Month number (1-12) representing the end of the entity's fiscal year. 12 = December for calendar year entities.
attributes.references: GAAP Financial Reporting Standards; IFRS IAS 1

attributes.name: fiscal_year_variant
attributes.description: Code defining the fiscal year calendar structure (e.g., calendar year, 4-4-5 retail calendar, 52/53 week year) used by this entity.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Fiscal Year Variant Configuration

attributes.name: incorporation_date
attributes.description: Date the legal entity was officially registered or incorporated with the governing jurisdiction.

attributes.name: intercompany_clearing_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this entity participates in automated intercompany clearing and reconciliation processes for intra-group transactions.

attributes.name: jurisdiction_country
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the jurisdiction where the entity is incorporated and legally domiciled.

attributes.name: jurisdiction_state_province
attributes.description: State, province, or sub-national jurisdiction where the entity is registered. Relevant for federal systems (USA, Canada, etc.).

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this legal entity record was last updated.

attributes.name: legal_name
attributes.description: Full registered legal name of the entity as filed with government authorities. Used on official financial statements, tax filings, and legal contracts.
attributes.references: GAAP Financial Reporting Standards; IFRS IAS 1

attributes.name: lei_code
attributes.description: 20-character alphanumeric Legal Entity Identifier issued by the Global LEI Foundation for financial transaction reporting and regulatory compliance.
attributes.references: ISO 17442 LEI Standard; Global LEI Foundation

attributes.name: local_currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code representing the entity's functional currency for financial reporting and local statutory books.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; GAAP ASC 830; IFRS IAS 21

attributes.name: ownership_percentage
attributes.description: Percentage of equity ownership held by the parent entity. 100.00 for wholly-owned subsidiaries, less for joint ventures or minority interests.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code of the legal entity's registered office.

attributes.name: primary_contact_email
attributes.description: Email address of the primary business contact for the legal entity.

attributes.name: primary_contact_name
attributes.description: Name of the primary business contact or registered agent for the legal entity.

attributes.name: primary_contact_phone
attributes.description: Phone number of the primary business contact for the legal entity.

attributes.name: profit_center_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether profit center assignment is mandatory for all financial postings in this legal entity. True enforces segment reporting compliance.
attributes.references: GAAP ASC 280 Segment Reporting; IFRS IFRS 8

attributes.name: registration_number
attributes.description: Official registration or incorporation number assigned by the jurisdiction's corporate registry.

attributes.name: reporting_currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code used for consolidated group reporting. Typically USD for US-based parent companies.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; GAAP ASC 830; IFRS IAS 21

attributes.name: segment_reporting_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this entity is subject to segment reporting requirements under GAAP ASC 280 or IFRS 8.
attributes.references: GAAP ASC 280 Segment Reporting; IFRS IFRS 8

attributes.name: short_name
attributes.description: Abbreviated or trade name used for internal reporting and operational reference.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code Master

attributes.name: state_province
attributes.description: State, province, or region of the legal entity's registered office.

attributes.name: tax_identification_number
attributes.description: Government-issued tax identifier (EIN in USA, VAT number in EU, etc.) used for tax filing and reporting.
attributes.references: IRS Publication 1635; Local Tax Authority Standards

attributes.name: vat_registration_number
attributes.description: VAT or GST registration number for entities operating in jurisdictions with value-added tax systems. Used for tax reporting and invoice compliance.
attributes.references: EU VAT Directive; Local VAT/GST Regulations

products.name: journal_entry
products.description: General ledger journal entry from SAP S/4HANA FI-GL, encompassing both header and line-level detail. Captures every financial posting across all legal entities — accruals, reversals, intercompany eliminations, period-end adjustments, and manual corrections. Header stores document type, posting date, fiscal period, reference document, ledger (leading/non-leading), currency, and posting user. Each line carries GL account, cost center, profit center, functional area, business area, debit/credit amount in document and local currency, tax code, assignment field, and line item text. The authoritative audit trail for all GL movements supporting GAAP/IFRS compliance, P&L drill-down, balance sheet construction, intercompany reconciliation, and external audit evidence.

attributes.name: journal_entry_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the journal entry record. Primary key for the journal entry header in SAP S/4HANA FI-GL.

attributes.name: approver_user_employee_id
attributes.description: SAP user ID of the person who approved this journal entry for posting. Populated only for entries requiring approval workflow. Used for segregation of duties compliance.

attributes.name: employee_id
attributes.description: SAP user ID of the person who approved this journal entry for posting. Populated only for entries requiring approval workflow. Used for segregation of duties compliance.

attributes.name: financial_period_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.financial_period. Business justification: Journal entries are posted within a specific financial period. The fiscal_period (INT) and fiscal_year (INT) columns are denormalized period identifiers that should be replaced by a FK to the financia

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Every GL journal entry in SAP FI-GL belongs to a specific company code (legal entity). Adding legal_entity_id normalizes the company_code string into a proper FK reference to the legal_entity master.

attributes.name: primary_journal_employee_id
attributes.description: SAP user ID of the person or system account that posted this journal entry. Used for audit trail and segregation of duties monitoring.
attributes.references: SOX Section 404 User Access Controls; SAP Security Standards

attributes.name: tertiary_journal_last_modified_user_employee_id
attributes.description: SAP user ID of the person who last modified this journal entry header (e.g., added notes, changed status). Blank if never modified after initial posting.

attributes.name: adjustment_period_indicator
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this journal entry was posted in a special adjustment period (periods 13-16) for year-end close. True if adjustment period; False if regular period.

attributes.name: approval_timestamp
attributes.description: Exact date and time when the journal entry was approved. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Null if no approval required or not yet approved.

attributes.name: audit_class
attributes.description: Classification of the journal entry for audit sampling and risk assessment. Values: standard (routine posting), high_risk (unusual or large amount), manual_adjustment (manual journal entry requiring scrutiny), system_generated (automated posting).
attributes.references: SOX Section 404 Risk Assessment; External Audit Standards

attributes.name: baseline_payment_date
attributes.description: The baseline date from which payment terms are calculated (typically document date or posting date). Used to determine net due date and discount periods. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.

attributes.name: batch_input_session
attributes.description: Name of the batch input session if this journal entry was posted via batch processing (e.g., mass upload, automated interface). Blank for manually posted entries.

attributes.name: clearing_date
attributes.description: The date on which this journal entry was cleared. Populated only for cleared documents. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.

attributes.name: clearing_document_number
attributes.description: The document number of the clearing document if this journal entry has been cleared (e.g., open item cleared by payment or offsetting entry). Blank if not cleared.

attributes.name: consolidation_transaction_type
attributes.description: Three-character code classifying the journal entry for consolidation purposes (e.g., 100=standard posting, 200=intercompany elimination, 300=currency translation adjustment, 400=consolidation adjustment). Used in multi-entity financial consolidation.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the document currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). All line item amounts in this journal entry are denominated in this currency.

attributes.name: document_date
attributes.description: The date printed on the source document (invoice date, receipt date, contract date). May differ from posting date. Used for aging analysis and payment terms calculation. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.

attributes.name: document_header_text
attributes.description: Free-text description or memo entered at the document header level. Provides business context for the journal entry (e.g., 'Monthly depreciation run', 'Accrual for Q4 marketing expenses').

attributes.name: document_number
attributes.description: Ten-digit accounting document number assigned by SAP upon posting. The externally-known unique identifier for this journal entry within the company code and fiscal year. Used for audit trail and cross-reference.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Document Management; SOX Section 404 Internal Controls

attributes.name: document_type
attributes.description: Two-character code classifying the nature of the accounting document (e.g., SA=GL account document, KR=vendor invoice, DR=customer invoice, AB=accounting document, AA=asset posting). Controls number ranges and posting keys.

attributes.name: entry_date
attributes.description: The calendar date on which the document was entered into the SAP system by the user. Used for audit trail and processing time analysis. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: The exchange rate applied to convert document currency to local currency at the time of posting. Expressed as local currency per one unit of document currency.

attributes.name: intercompany_indicator
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this journal entry involves intercompany transactions between multiple legal entities within the corporate group. True if intercompany; False otherwise.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Exact date and time of the last modification to this journal entry header. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Null if never modified.

attributes.name: ledger_group
attributes.description: Two-character code identifying the ledger in which this entry is posted (e.g., 0L=leading ledger for GAAP, 2L=IFRS ledger, 3L=management ledger). Supports parallel accounting for multiple reporting standards.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA New GL; GAAP/IFRS Parallel Accounting

attributes.name: local_currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the company code local currency. Used for statutory reporting and consolidation.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; GAAP/IFRS Functional Currency

attributes.name: net_due_date
attributes.description: The calculated due date for payment based on payment terms and baseline date. Used for cash flow forecasting and AP/AR aging. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.

attributes.name: parked_indicator
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this journal entry is in parked status (saved but not yet posted). True if parked; False if posted. Parked documents do not update GL balances until posted.

attributes.name: payment_terms_code
attributes.description: Four-character code defining payment terms for vendor invoices or customer invoices (e.g., net 30, 2/10 net 30). Used to calculate due dates and cash discount eligibility.

attributes.name: posting_date
attributes.description: The date on which the journal entry is posted to the general ledger. Determines the fiscal period assignment and is the primary date for financial reporting. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.
attributes.references: GAAP/IFRS Revenue Recognition; SAP S/4HANA Posting Logic

attributes.name: posting_key
attributes.description: Two-digit numeric code that controls the type of posting (debit or credit) and the account type (e.g., 40=debit GL, 50=credit GL, 01=debit customer, 31=debit vendor). Determines field status and processing logic.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Posting Key Configuration

attributes.name: posting_timestamp
attributes.description: Exact date and time when the journal entry was posted to the general ledger. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Used for audit trail and real-time reporting.

attributes.name: reference_document_number
attributes.description: Free-text field for external reference numbers such as vendor invoice number, purchase order number, or intercompany document reference. Used for reconciliation and audit trail.

attributes.name: reversal_indicator
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this journal entry is a reversal of a prior posting. True if this document reverses another document; False otherwise.

attributes.name: reversal_reason_code
attributes.description: Two-character code explaining why the document was reversed (e.g., 01=reversal in current period, 02=reversal in next period, 03=error correction). Populated only for reversal documents.

attributes.name: reversed_document_number
attributes.description: The document number of the original journal entry that this entry reverses. Populated only when reversal_indicator is True. Maintains audit trail for accrual reversals and error corrections.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Reversal Logic; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: source_system_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the originating system for this journal entry (e.g., SAP_ECC, SAP_S4, LEGACY_GL, COUPA, WORKDAY). Used for data lineage and interface reconciliation.

attributes.name: tax_reporting_date
attributes.description: The date used for tax reporting purposes (may differ from posting date based on jurisdiction rules). Used for VAT/GST returns and sales tax filings. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.

attributes.name: trading_partner_company_code
attributes.description: Four-character company code of the intercompany trading partner. Populated only when intercompany_indicator is True. Used for intercompany reconciliation and elimination entries.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Intercompany Accounting; GAAP/IFRS Consolidation

attributes.name: transaction_code
attributes.description: SAP transaction code (T-code) used to create this journal entry (e.g., FB01, FB50, F-02). Indicates the posting method and user interface path.

attributes.name: workflow_status
attributes.description: Current state of the journal entry in the approval workflow. Values: draft (initial entry), pending_approval (submitted for review), approved (authorized but not posted), posted (final state in GL), rejected (not approved), cancelled (voided before posting).

products.name: journal_entry_line
products.description: Individual debit/credit line items within a GL journal entry from SAP S/4HANA FI-GL. Each line carries GL account, cost center, profit center, functional area, business area, amount in document and local currency, tax code, assignment field, and line item text. Enables granular P&L and balance sheet drill-down, cost center reporting, and intercompany reconciliation at the line level.
products.reference: SAP S/4HANA Journal Entry Line Item (FI-GL)

attributes.name: journal_entry_line_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the journal entry line item. Primary key for granular GL transaction tracking.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-GL Line Item Schema

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Link line to cost_center master to normalize cost center details.

attributes.name: fixed_asset_id
attributes.description: Reference to the fixed asset master record if this line represents a fixed asset transaction (acquisition, depreciation, disposal). Null for non-FA entries.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Replace gl_account_code with authoritative FK to gl_account for detailed account attributes.

attributes.name: journal_entry_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent journal entry header. Links this line to the overall accounting document.

attributes.name: lease_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.lease. Business justification: Under IFRS 16/ASC 842, journal entry lines for ROU amortization, interest expense, and lease liability reduction must reference the specific lease. Lease accounting reconciliation and external audit r

attributes.name: primary_journal_customer_profile_id
attributes.description: Reference to the customer master record if this line represents an accounts receivable transaction. Null for non-AR entries.

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Link line to profit_center master for consistent profit center data.

attributes.name: amount_document_currency
attributes.description: Transaction amount in the original document currency. Used for multi-currency transactions before conversion to local currency.

attributes.name: amount_local_currency
attributes.description: Transaction amount converted to the local reporting currency of the legal entity. Used for consolidated financial statements.

attributes.name: assignment_field
attributes.description: Free-text assignment field for additional reference information. Often used for invoice numbers, PO numbers, or internal tracking codes.

attributes.name: baseline_date
attributes.description: Baseline date for payment terms calculation. Typically the invoice date or goods receipt date.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Payment Terms Calculation

attributes.name: business_area_code
attributes.description: Business area for segment reporting. May represent franchise vs. company-owned, or QSR vs. casual dining divisions.
attributes.references: IFRS 8 Operating Segments; SAP S/4HANA Business Area Configuration

attributes.name: clearing_date
attributes.description: Date on which this open item was cleared (paid or settled). Null if still open.

attributes.name: clearing_document_number
attributes.description: Document number of the clearing entry that settled this open item. Null if the line item is still open.

attributes.name: company_code
attributes.description: Four-character company code representing the legal entity. Required for multi-entity consolidation and statutory reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code Configuration; GAAP Legal Entity Reporting

attributes.name: debit_credit_indicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether this line is a debit (D) or credit (C) entry. Fundamental to double-entry bookkeeping.

attributes.name: document_currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the document currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

attributes.name: document_date
attributes.description: Date of the source document (invoice date, receipt date). May differ from posting date for backdated or future-dated entries.
attributes.references: GAAP Source Document Standards; SAP S/4HANA FI-GL Document Date

attributes.name: due_date
attributes.description: Payment due date for AP/AR line items. Calculated based on posting date and payment terms. Null for non-payable/receivable entries.

attributes.name: entry_date
attributes.description: Date on which the journal entry was created in the system. Audit trail for data entry timing.

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: Currency exchange rate applied to convert document currency to local currency. Null if currencies are the same.

attributes.name: fiscal_period
attributes.description: Fiscal period (month) within the fiscal year. Typically 1-12 for monthly periods, or 1-13 for year-end adjustments.
attributes.references: GAAP Fiscal Period Standards; SAP S/4HANA Posting Period

attributes.name: fiscal_year
attributes.description: Fiscal year to which this line item is posted. Derived from the posting date and fiscal calendar configuration.
attributes.references: GAAP Fiscal Period Standards; SAP S/4HANA Fiscal Year Variant

attributes.name: functional_area_code
attributes.description: Functional area classification for cost-of-sales accounting. Distinguishes COGS, labor, R&M, marketing, and administrative expenses.
attributes.references: GAAP Functional Expense Classification; SAP S/4HANA FI-GL Functional Area

attributes.name: line_item_text
attributes.description: Descriptive text explaining the purpose or nature of this journal entry line. Provides business context for the transaction.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-GL Line Item Text

attributes.name: line_number
attributes.description: Sequential line number within the journal entry. Determines the order of debit and credit entries.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-GL Line Item Numbering

attributes.name: local_currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the local reporting currency.

attributes.name: payment_terms_code
attributes.description: Payment terms code for AP/AR line items. Defines due date calculation and discount terms.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Payment Terms Configuration

attributes.name: posting_date
attributes.description: Date on which this line item was posted to the general ledger. Determines the fiscal period assignment.
attributes.references: GAAP Transaction Date Standards; SAP S/4HANA FI-GL Posting Date

attributes.name: posting_key
attributes.description: Two-digit posting key that controls the account type (GL, vendor, customer, asset) and debit/credit indicator. SAP-specific control field.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-GL Posting Key Configuration

attributes.name: reference_document_number
attributes.description: External reference document number (e.g., vendor invoice number, customer receipt number). Links GL entry to source transaction.

attributes.name: reversal_indicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether this line item is a reversal entry. True if this line reverses a prior posting.

attributes.name: reversed_document_number
attributes.description: Document number of the original entry that this line reverses. Null if not a reversal.

attributes.name: special_gl_indicator
attributes.description: Single-character code for special GL transactions (e.g., down payments, guarantees, bills of exchange). Blank for standard postings.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-GL Special GL Transactions

attributes.name: tax_amount
attributes.description: Tax amount calculated for this line item in local currency. Null if the line is non-taxable.

attributes.name: tax_code
attributes.description: Tax code applied to this line item. Determines sales tax, VAT, or GST treatment for revenue and expense transactions.
attributes.references: IRS Publication 334; Local Sales Tax Regulations; SAP S/4HANA Tax Configuration

attributes.name: trading_partner_code
attributes.description: Trading partner code for intercompany transactions. Identifies the counterparty legal entity for consolidation and elimination entries.
attributes.references: GAAP/IFRS Consolidation Standards; SAP S/4HANA Intercompany Accounting

attributes.name: transaction_code
attributes.description: SAP transaction code (T-code) used to create this entry (e.g., FB01, FB50, MIRO). Audit trail for process identification.

attributes.name: user_name
attributes.description: SAP user ID of the person who created this journal entry line. Audit trail for accountability.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA User Master; SOX Audit Trail Requirements

attributes.name: value_date
attributes.description: Value date for cash management and bank reconciliation. Represents the effective date funds are available or debited.

products.name: ap_invoice
products.description: Accounts payable vendor invoice and payment lifecycle from SAP S/4HANA FI-AP, encompassing invoice header, line-level detail, and outbound payment settlement. Records all supplier invoices for food and beverage purchases, equipment, R&M, utilities, and services. Header stores vendor ID, invoice date, due date, payment terms, gross/net amount, tax, currency, payment block, three-way match status, and dunning level. Each line captures purchased item/service, quantity, unit price, GL account, cost center, PO reference, goods receipt reference, and tax code. Payment data stores payment method (ACH, wire, check), payment date, bank account, cleared invoice references, discount taken, and payment run ID. Enables COGS% analysis by ingredient category, food vs. non-food spend split, three-way match reconciliation, DPO (Days Payable Outstanding) tracking, cash discount optimization, and cash flow forecasting.

attributes.name: ap_invoice_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the accounts payable invoice record. Primary key.

attributes.name: approver_employee_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the employee who approved the invoice for payment. Used for audit trail and segregation of duties compliance.

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Allows AP invoices for marketing media purchases to be tied to the originating campaign, supporting financial reconciliation and campaign ROI calculations.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: FK to finance.cost_center

attributes.name: financial_period_id
