attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.financial_period. Business justification: AP invoices are posted within a specific financial period. The fiscal_period and fiscal_year integer columns are denormalized period identifiers that should be replaced by a FK to the financial_period

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: FK to finance.gl_account

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: AP invoices in SAP FI-AP are posted to a specific company code (legal entity). Adding legal_entity_id normalizes the company_code string into a proper FK to the legal_entity master, enabling multi-ent

attributes.name: maintenance_contract_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to realestate.maintenance_contract. Business justification: AP invoices from maintenance vendors are matched against maintenance contracts for three-way matching and contract spend tracking. Foodservice operators validate vendor invoices against contract terms

attributes.name: primary_ap_created_by_user_employee_id
attributes.description: The user ID of the person who created the invoice record in the system. Used for audit trail and accountability.

attributes.name: primary_ap_restaurant_location_unit_id
attributes.description: Identifier for the restaurant location or unit to which this invoice expense is allocated. Used for unit-level P&L and Average Unit Volume (AUV) analysis.

attributes.name: tertiary_ap_modified_by_user_employee_id
attributes.description: The user ID of the person who last modified the invoice record. Used for audit trail and change accountability.

attributes.name: approval_date
attributes.description: The date the invoice was approved for payment. Used for tracking approval cycle time and compliance with payment policies.

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Status of the invoice approval workflow. Indicates whether the invoice has been reviewed and approved for payment by authorized personnel.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when the invoice record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and record lifecycle tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the invoice amounts (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

attributes.name: discount_amount
attributes.description: Total discount amount applied to the invoice, including early payment discounts, volume discounts, or promotional allowances.

attributes.name: due_date
attributes.description: The date by which payment is due to the vendor per the payment terms. Used for cash flow forecasting and aging analysis.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Baseline Date + Payment Terms

attributes.name: dunning_level
attributes.description: The dunning level or escalation stage for overdue invoices. Zero indicates no dunning. Higher numbers indicate escalated collection efforts.

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: Exchange rate used to convert foreign currency invoice amounts to the company code local currency. Null for invoices in local currency.

attributes.name: expense_category
attributes.description: High-level categorization of the invoice expense type. Used for Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) percentage and Operating Expense (OpEx) tracking.

attributes.name: goods_receipt_number
attributes.description: The goods receipt document number confirming physical receipt of goods or services. Used for three-way matching.

attributes.name: gross_amount
attributes.description: Total invoice amount before any deductions, including line item charges and taxes. Represents the full amount billed by the vendor.

attributes.name: invoice_date
attributes.description: The date the vendor issued the invoice. This is the principal business event timestamp for the invoice transaction.

attributes.name: invoice_description
attributes.description: Free-text description or memo field providing additional context about the invoice, such as the nature of goods or services purchased.

attributes.name: invoice_number
attributes.description: The vendor-assigned invoice number as printed on the supplier invoice document. This is the externally-known business identifier for the invoice.

attributes.name: invoice_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the invoice in the accounts payable workflow.

attributes.name: invoice_type
attributes.description: Classification of the invoice document type (standard invoice, credit memo for returns, debit memo for additional charges, prepayment, or recurring invoice).

attributes.name: local_currency_amount
attributes.description: Net invoice amount converted to the company code local currency using the exchange rate. Used for consolidated financial reporting.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when the invoice record was last modified. Used for audit trail and change tracking.

attributes.name: net_amount
attributes.description: Net amount payable to the vendor after applying discounts and adjustments. This is the amount that will be paid.

attributes.name: payment_block_indicator
attributes.description: Code indicating whether payment is blocked and the reason for the block (e.g., pricing dispute, quantity variance, quality issue). Empty if no block is active.

attributes.name: payment_date
attributes.description: The date the invoice was actually paid to the vendor. Null if the invoice is unpaid.

attributes.name: payment_method
attributes.description: The payment instrument or method used to pay the invoice (check, ACH, wire transfer, credit card, cash).

attributes.name: payment_reference_number
attributes.description: The payment document number or transaction reference assigned when the invoice was paid. Used for payment reconciliation and audit trail.

attributes.name: payment_terms_code
attributes.description: Code representing the payment terms agreed with the vendor (e.g., Net 30, 2/10 Net 30). Determines due date calculation and early payment discount eligibility.

attributes.name: posting_date
attributes.description: The date the invoice was posted to the general ledger. Used for period assignment and financial reporting.

attributes.name: purchase_order_number
attributes.description: The purchase order number against which this invoice is being verified. Used for three-way matching and spend tracking.

attributes.name: reference_document_number
attributes.description: Reference to a related document such as the original invoice for a credit memo, or a contract number. Provides audit trail and document linkage.

attributes.name: tax_amount
attributes.description: Total tax amount charged on the invoice, including sales tax, VAT, GST, or other applicable taxes.

attributes.name: three_way_match_status
attributes.description: Status of the three-way match process comparing purchase order (PO), goods receipt (GR), and invoice. Indicates whether the invoice matches the PO and GR within tolerance or has variances.

attributes.name: withholding_tax_amount
attributes.description: Amount of withholding tax deducted from the invoice payment as required by tax regulations. Reduces the net payment to the vendor.

products.name: ap_payment
products.description: Accounts payable payment run records from SAP S/4HANA FI-AP. Captures outbound payments to food suppliers, equipment vendors, landlords (CAM charges), and service providers. Stores payment method (ACH, wire, check), payment date, bank account, cleared invoice references, discount taken, payment amount in local and document currency, and payment run ID. Supports cash management, DPO (Days Payable Outstanding) tracking, and supplier relationship management.

attributes.name: ap_payment_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the accounts payable payment transaction. Primary key.

attributes.name: bank_account_id
attributes.description: Identifier for the company's bank account from which payment was debited. Used for cash management and bank reconciliation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP House Bank Configuration

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: ap_payment has a cost_center STRING column that stores the cost center code for payment allocation. This should be normalized to a FK reference to the cost_center master. The string cost_center column

attributes.name: employee_id
attributes.description: User ID or system identifier that initiated the payment run or created the payment document.

attributes.name: financial_period_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.financial_period. Business justification: AP payments are recorded within a specific financial period. The fiscal_period and fiscal_year integer columns are denormalized period identifiers replaced by a FK to the financial_period master for p

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: ap_payment has a gl_account STRING column that stores the GL account code for the payment clearing entry. This should be normalized to a FK reference to gl_account master. The string gl_account column

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: AP payment runs in SAP FI-AP are executed within a specific company code (legal entity). Adding legal_entity_id normalizes the company_code string into a proper FK to the legal_entity master for multi

attributes.name: payment_run_id
attributes.description: Identifier for the batch payment run that generated this payment. Groups multiple payments processed together.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Automatic Payment Program

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: ap_payment has a profit_center STRING column that stores the profit center code for payment allocation. This should be normalized to a FK reference to the profit_center master. The string profit_cente

attributes.name: bank_name
attributes.description: Name of the financial institution holding the company's payment account.

attributes.name: business_area
attributes.description: Business area or division code for cross-company reporting (e.g., QSR, casual dining, franchise operations).

attributes.name: clearing_date
attributes.description: Date when the payment cleared the company's bank account and funds were debited. Null if not yet cleared.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Bank Clearing Date

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the payment record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and compliance reporting.

attributes.name: discount_taken_amount
attributes.description: Cash discount amount deducted from invoice total for early payment. Supports supplier relationship management and Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) optimization.

attributes.name: document_currency
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the payment amount (e.g., USD, CAD, EUR, GBP, MXN).

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: Currency exchange rate applied to convert document currency to local currency. Null if currencies are the same.

attributes.name: invoice_count
attributes.description: Number of invoices cleared by this payment. A single payment may settle multiple invoices.

attributes.name: local_currency
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the company code's local reporting currency.

attributes.name: local_currency_amount
attributes.description: Payment amount converted to the company code's local currency for consolidation and Profit and Loss (P&L) reporting.

attributes.name: modified_by
attributes.description: User ID of the last person who modified the payment record (e.g., status change, cancellation, reversal).

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to the payment record. Used for change tracking and audit compliance.

attributes.name: payment_amount
attributes.description: Total payment amount in document currency. Net amount remitted to vendor after discounts and adjustments.

attributes.name: payment_block_reason
attributes.description: Reason code if payment was blocked or held for review (e.g., duplicate invoice, pricing dispute, quality issue). Null if not blocked.

attributes.name: payment_date
attributes.description: Date the payment was issued or scheduled to be sent to the vendor. Principal business event timestamp for cash management and Days Payable Outstanding (DPO) tracking.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Payment Document Date

attributes.name: payment_description
attributes.description: Free-text description or memo field providing additional context about the payment purpose or special handling instructions.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Payment Document Text

attributes.name: payment_document_number
attributes.description: SAP payment document number assigned during payment run. Externally-known business identifier for this payment.

attributes.name: payment_method
attributes.description: Payment instrument used to remit funds to vendor. ACH (Automated Clearing House) for domestic electronic transfers, wire for same-day transfers, check for paper-based payments, EFT for general electronic transfers, virtual card for card-based B2B payments.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Payment Method Configuration

attributes.name: payment_priority
attributes.description: Priority level assigned to payment for processing sequence. Urgent for critical suppliers, high for preferred vendors, normal for standard terms, low for deferred payments.

attributes.name: payment_processor
attributes.description: Name of third-party payment processor or banking partner used to execute the payment (e.g., JP Morgan, Bank of America, Citibank).
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Payment Service Provider

attributes.name: payment_reference_number
attributes.description: Bank-assigned reference or confirmation number for the payment transaction. Used for reconciliation and dispute resolution.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Bank Statement Reconciliation

attributes.name: payment_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the payment. Pending: scheduled but not yet sent. Processed: sent to bank. Cleared: funds debited from company account. Failed: rejected by bank. Cancelled: voided before processing. Reversed: reversed after clearing.

attributes.name: payment_terms
attributes.description: Payment terms code applied to this payment (e.g., Net 30, 2/10 Net 30). Determines discount eligibility and due date calculation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Payment Terms Configuration

attributes.name: payment_type
attributes.description: Classification of payment purpose. Vendor invoice for goods/services, credit memo for returns, down payment for Capital Expenditure (CapEx) projects, advance payment for future delivery, expense reimbursement for employee-paid vendor costs.

attributes.name: reconciliation_status
attributes.description: Bank reconciliation status indicating whether payment has been matched to bank statement. Unreconciled: not yet matched. Reconciled: matched to bank statement. Exception: discrepancy found. Pending review: awaiting manual review.

attributes.name: remittance_email
attributes.description: Vendor email address to which remittance advice is sent. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: value_date
attributes.description: Date when funds are expected to be available in the vendor's account. Used for cash flow forecasting.

attributes.name: vendor_account_number
attributes.description: Vendor's bank account number or payment account identifier used for remittance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Vendor Bank Details

attributes.name: vendor_name
attributes.description: Legal name of the vendor receiving payment.

attributes.name: withholding_tax_amount
attributes.description: Tax amount withheld from payment per regulatory requirements. Remitted separately to tax authorities.

products.name: ar_invoice
products.description: Accounts receivable invoice and payment lifecycle from SAP S/4HANA FI-AR. Covers all revenue-generating billings and their collection: royalty invoices to franchisees, catering and corporate account billings, gift card liability settlements, and intercompany charges. Invoice data stores customer/franchisee ID, invoice date, due date, payment terms, gross amount, tax, currency, dunning level, and collection status. Payment receipt data captures payment method, receipt date, bank clearing account, applied invoice references, unapplied cash amounts, and DSO (Days Sales Outstanding) impact. Supports royalty income accounting, franchise fee revenue recognition (ASC 606/IFRS 15), franchisee cash flow monitoring, and aging analysis.

attributes.name: ar_invoice_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the accounts receivable invoice record. Primary key.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Link AR invoice to cost_center master to avoid duplicated code values.

attributes.name: franchisee_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the franchisee when the invoice is for royalty or franchise fee billing. Null for non-franchise revenue streams.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Replace string GL account reference with FK to gl_account for consistency.

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: AR invoices in SAP FI-AR are issued by a specific company code (legal entity). Adding legal_entity_id normalizes the company_code string into a proper FK to the legal_entity master, enabling multi-ent

attributes.name: primary_ar_location_unit_id
attributes.description: Restaurant location associated with the invoice when billing is location-specific (e.g., royalty based on location sales). Null for corporate-level billings.

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Link AR invoice to profit_center master for consistent reporting.

attributes.name: adjustment_amount
attributes.description: Manual adjustments applied to the invoice for credits, rebates, or billing corrections. Can be positive or negative.

attributes.name: billing_address_line1
attributes.description: First line of the billing address for invoice mailing. Includes street number and name.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Customer Master Address

attributes.name: billing_address_line2
attributes.description: Second line of the billing address for suite, apartment, or building information. Optional field.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Customer Master Address

attributes.name: billing_city
attributes.description: City name for the billing address. Used for invoice mailing and tax jurisdiction determination.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Customer Master Address

attributes.name: billing_contact_name
attributes.description: Name of the primary billing contact at the customer or franchisee organization. Used for invoice delivery and payment inquiries.

attributes.name: billing_country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166 country code for the billing address. Used for international invoicing and tax compliance.

attributes.name: billing_email
attributes.description: Email address for electronic invoice delivery and billing communications. Primary channel for invoice distribution.

attributes.name: billing_period_end_date
attributes.description: End date of the period covered by this invoice. Used for royalty and franchise fee revenue recognition alignment.

attributes.name: billing_period_start_date
attributes.description: Start date of the period covered by this invoice. Relevant for royalty invoices based on monthly or weekly sales performance.

attributes.name: billing_postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code for the billing address. Required for invoice delivery and tax jurisdiction determination.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Customer Master Address

attributes.name: billing_state_province
attributes.description: State or province code for the billing address. Used for tax calculation and regulatory reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Customer Master Address

attributes.name: business_area
attributes.description: SAP business area for segment reporting. Enables P&L analysis by brand, region, or business unit.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Business Area Configuration

attributes.name: created_by_user
attributes.description: User ID or name of the person who created the invoice record. Used for accountability and audit purposes.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the invoice amounts (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Supports multi-currency operations.

attributes.name: discount_amount
attributes.description: Total discount applied to the invoice. May include early payment discounts, volume discounts, or promotional adjustments.

attributes.name: due_date
attributes.description: Date by which payment is expected based on payment terms. Used for aging analysis and dunning trigger calculations.

attributes.name: dunning_level
attributes.description: Current dunning level for overdue invoices. Indicates escalation stage in the collection process (0=no dunning, 1=first reminder, 2=second reminder, 3=final notice, etc.).

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: Exchange rate applied for foreign currency invoices to convert to company reporting currency. Null for domestic currency transactions.

attributes.name: gross_amount
attributes.description: Total invoice amount before taxes, discounts, or adjustments. Represents the base billing amount for goods or services.

attributes.name: invoice_date
attributes.description: Date the invoice was issued. Represents the business event date for revenue recognition and aging calculations.

attributes.name: invoice_number
attributes.description: Externally-known unique invoice number assigned by SAP S/4HANA for customer billing. Used for customer communication and payment reconciliation.

attributes.name: invoice_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the invoice in the collection workflow. Tracks progression from draft through payment to closure or write-off. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|open|partially_paid|paid|overdue|written_off|cancelled — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: invoice_type
attributes.description: Classification of the invoice based on revenue stream: royalty invoices to franchisees, franchise fee billings, catering and corporate account charges, gift card liability settlements, intercompany charges, or rebate billings.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Document Type Configuration

attributes.name: last_dunning_date
attributes.description: Date the most recent dunning notice was sent to the customer. Used to track collection activity and determine next dunning action.

attributes.name: modified_by_user
attributes.description: User ID or name of the person who last modified the invoice record. Used for change tracking and accountability.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was last modified. Tracks changes for audit and data quality monitoring.

attributes.name: net_amount
attributes.description: Final invoice amount due after applying taxes, discounts, and adjustments. This is the amount the customer must pay.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Net Due Amount

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments related to the invoice. May include special billing instructions, dispute details, or collection notes.

attributes.name: outstanding_balance
attributes.description: Remaining unpaid amount on the invoice. Updated as payments are received and applied. Zero when invoice is fully paid.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Open Item Management

attributes.name: payment_method
attributes.description: Expected or preferred payment method for this invoice. Guides payment processing and reconciliation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Payment Method Configuration

attributes.name: payment_reference
attributes.description: Reference number or identifier provided to customer for payment remittance. Used for automated payment matching and reconciliation.

attributes.name: payment_terms_code
attributes.description: Code representing the payment terms agreement (e.g., Net 30, Net 15, Due on Receipt). Determines due date calculation and discount eligibility.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AR Payment Terms Master

attributes.name: posting_date
attributes.description: Date the invoice was posted to the general ledger. May differ from invoice date due to period-end processing or batch posting.

attributes.name: revenue_recognition_date
attributes.description: Date when revenue from this invoice is recognized for financial reporting purposes. May differ from invoice date per GAAP/IFRS revenue recognition rules.

attributes.name: tax_amount
attributes.description: Total tax charged on the invoice. Includes sales tax, VAT, or other applicable taxes based on jurisdiction.

products.name: ar_payment
products.description: Accounts receivable payment receipt records from SAP S/4HANA FI-AR. Captures inbound payments from franchisees (royalties, franchise fees, marketing fund contributions), corporate catering clients, and intercompany settlements. Stores payment method, receipt date, bank clearing account, applied invoice references, unapplied cash amounts, and DSO (Days Sales Outstanding) impact. Critical for royalty income reconciliation and franchise cash flow monitoring.

attributes.name: ar_payment_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the accounts receivable payment record. Primary key.

attributes.name: bank_account_id
attributes.description: Reference to the company bank clearing account where the payment was deposited. Links to cash management and bank reconciliation.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Normalize cost center reference on AR payment.

attributes.name: financial_period_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.financial_period. Business justification: AR payments are recorded within a specific financial period. The fiscal_period and fiscal_year integer columns are denormalized period identifiers replaced by a FK to the financial_period master for p

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Replace GL account code with FK to gl_account for authoritative data.

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: AR payment receipts in SAP FI-AR are recorded within a specific company code (legal entity). Adding legal_entity_id normalizes the company_code string into a proper FK to the legal_entity master for m

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Normalize profit center reference on AR payment.

attributes.name: ach_trace_number
attributes.description: The ACH network trace number for ACH payments. Enables tracking and reconciliation of electronic payments.

attributes.name: applied_amount
attributes.description: The portion of the payment amount that has been allocated to specific invoices. Used to track payment application progress.

attributes.name: check_number
attributes.description: The check number for check payments. Null for electronic payment methods. Used for audit trails and bank reconciliation.

attributes.name: clearing_date
attributes.description: The date when the payment cleared the bank and funds were confirmed available. May differ from receipt date for checks and ACH.

attributes.name: created_by_user
attributes.description: The SAP user ID who created the payment record. Used for audit trails and accountability.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The system timestamp when the payment record was first created in SAP. Used for audit trails and data lineage.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the payment amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Required for multi-currency operations and foreign exchange tracking.

attributes.name: discount_taken_amount
attributes.description: The early payment discount amount deducted by the customer when paying within discount terms. Reduces net cash received.

attributes.name: dso_impact_days
attributes.description: The number of days between invoice due date and payment receipt date. Used to calculate DSO metrics and monitor collection efficiency.

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: The foreign exchange rate applied to convert payment currency to company code functional currency. Null for domestic currency payments.

attributes.name: functional_currency_amount
attributes.description: The payment amount converted to the company code functional currency using the exchange rate. Used for consolidated financial reporting.

attributes.name: modified_by_user
attributes.description: The SAP user ID who last modified the payment record. Used for audit trails and change tracking.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The system timestamp when the payment record was last modified. Used for audit trails and data synchronization.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments about the payment. Used to document special circumstances, customer communications, or application instructions.

attributes.name: payment_amount
attributes.description: The total gross amount of the payment received, before any deductions or allocations. Expressed in the payment currency.

attributes.name: payment_document_number
attributes.description: The externally-known SAP payment document number assigned to this AR payment receipt. Used for reconciliation and audit trails.

attributes.name: payment_method
attributes.description: The financial instrument used for payment: wire transfer, ACH (Automated Clearing House), check, credit card, debit card, or cash.
attributes.references: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS)

attributes.name: payment_processor
attributes.description: The third-party payment processor or gateway used for credit card or digital payments (e.g., Stripe, PayPal, Square). Null for direct bank payments.
attributes.references: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS)

attributes.name: payment_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the payment: received (entered), cleared (bank confirmed), applied (allocated to invoices), partially applied, unapplied (cash on account), reversed, or voided. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: received|cleared|applied|partially_applied|unapplied|reversed|voided — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: payment_type
attributes.description: Classification of the payment purpose: royalty income, franchise fees, marketing fund contributions, catering invoice payments, or intercompany settlements.

attributes.name: posting_date
attributes.description: The accounting period date when the payment was posted to the general ledger. Determines which fiscal period recognizes the cash receipt.

attributes.name: receipt_date
attributes.description: The business date when the payment was received and recorded in the AR system. Used for Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) calculation and revenue recognition.

attributes.name: reference_number
attributes.description: Customer-provided reference number or remittance advice identifier. Used to match payments to invoices during application.

attributes.name: reversal_date
attributes.description: The date when the payment was reversed. Null for non-reversed payments. Used for audit trails and financial period corrections.

attributes.name: reversal_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this payment has been reversed. True if reversed, False if active. Reversed payments remain in history for audit trails.

attributes.name: reversal_reason_code
attributes.description: Code indicating the reason for payment reversal (e.g., NSF - non-sufficient funds, duplicate entry, customer dispute, bank error). Null for non-reversed payments. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: NSF|duplicate|dispute|bank_error|wrong_account|fraud|other — promote to reference product]

attributes.name: transaction_reference
attributes.description: The payment processor transaction identifier for card or digital wallet payments. Used for chargeback management and reconciliation.
attributes.references: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS)

attributes.name: unapplied_amount
attributes.description: The portion of the payment amount that remains unallocated to invoices. Represents cash on account or overpayments requiring future application.

attributes.name: wire_confirmation_number
attributes.description: Bank-provided confirmation or trace number for wire transfer payments. Used for payment verification and dispute resolution.

products.name: fixed_asset
products.description: Fixed asset master record, depreciation lifecycle, and impairment tracking from SAP S/4HANA FI-AA. Tracks all capitalized assets across company-owned restaurants and corporate facilities: kitchen equipment (fryers, grills, KDS units), POS hardware, leasehold improvements, furniture and fixtures, vehicles, and IT infrastructure. Master data stores asset class, acquisition date, acquisition cost, useful life, depreciation method, salvage value, and CapEx project reference. Depreciation detail captures periodic planned/posted depreciation by fiscal period, depreciation area (book, tax, IFRS), depreciation amount, accumulated depreciation, net book value, and depreciation key. Supports CapEx vs. OpEx classification, EBITDA calculation (adding back D&A), tax depreciation schedules, impairment testing, and asset disposal/retirement processing for restaurant closures and remodels.

attributes.name: fixed_asset_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the fixed asset record. Primary key sourced from SAP S/4HANA FI-AA asset master.

attributes.name: cost_center_id

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Fixed assets in SAP FI-AA are posted to specific GL accounts (asset balance sheet accounts, accumulated depreciation accounts). The gl_account_code STRING column is denormalized and should be replaced

attributes.name: responsible_employee_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the employee or manager responsible for the custody and maintenance of the asset. Supports accountability and asset stewardship.

attributes.name: accumulated_depreciation
attributes.description: Total depreciation expense recognized to date since acquisition. Contra-asset account that reduces the gross book value to net book value.

attributes.name: acquisition_cost
attributes.description: Total capitalized cost of the fixed asset at acquisition including purchase price, installation, freight, and other directly attributable costs. Recorded in USD.

attributes.name: acquisition_date
attributes.description: Date when the fixed asset was acquired or placed into service. Used as the start date for depreciation calculations and useful life tracking.

attributes.name: asset_class
attributes.description: Classification category of the fixed asset used for grouping and reporting. Determines depreciation rules and capitalization thresholds per GAAP/IFRS standards.
attributes.references: GAAP ASC 360 Property Plant and Equipment; IFRS IAS 16

attributes.name: asset_description
attributes.description: Detailed business description of the fixed asset including make, model, and specifications (e.g., 'Vulcan 6-Burner Gas Range Model XYZ123').

attributes.name: asset_number
attributes.description: Externally-known unique asset tag or serial number assigned to the fixed asset for tracking and identification purposes. Used for physical asset verification and audit trails.

attributes.name: asset_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the fixed asset. Determines whether depreciation is active and whether the asset appears on the balance sheet. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: active|in_service|under_construction|retired|disposed|impaired|held_for_sale — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: asset_subclass
attributes.description: Detailed sub-classification within the asset class for granular tracking (e.g., 'Fryers', 'Grills', 'KDS Units' under kitchen_equipment).

attributes.name: capex_project_code
attributes.description: Reference code linking the asset to the originating capital expenditure project or budget line item. Supports CapEx tracking and ROI analysis.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the fixed asset record was first created in the SAP S/4HANA system. Supports audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the acquisition cost and book value (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Supports multi-currency consolidation for international operations.

attributes.name: depreciation_method
attributes.description: Accounting method used to calculate periodic depreciation expense. Straight-line is most common for restaurant equipment; declining balance may be used for vehicles.

attributes.name: disposal_date
attributes.description: Date when the asset was retired, sold, or otherwise disposed of. Triggers final depreciation calculation and removal from active asset register.

attributes.name: disposal_method
attributes.description: Method by which the asset was disposed of. Determines accounting treatment and tax implications for gain/loss recognition.

attributes.name: disposal_proceeds
attributes.description: Cash or fair value received from the sale or disposal of the asset. Used to calculate gain or loss on disposal for P&L reporting.

attributes.name: impairment_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether the asset has been tested for impairment and found to have a carrying value exceeding its recoverable amount per GAAP/IFRS standards.

attributes.name: impairment_loss
attributes.description: Amount of impairment loss recognized when the asset's carrying value exceeds its fair value or value in use. Recorded as a non-cash charge to P&L.

attributes.name: insurance_policy_number
attributes.description: Policy number for property and casualty insurance covering the asset. Used for claims processing and risk management.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the fixed asset record was last updated in the SAP S/4HANA system. Supports change tracking and audit compliance.

attributes.name: last_physical_inventory_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent physical verification or audit of the asset. Supports SOX compliance and internal control over fixed assets.

attributes.name: lease_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether the asset is subject to a lease agreement (finance lease or operating lease under ASC 842 / IFRS 16). Determines right-of-use asset treatment.

attributes.name: manufacturer_name
attributes.description: Name of the equipment manufacturer or brand (e.g., Vulcan, Hobart, NCR). Supports vendor performance analysis and standardization initiatives.

attributes.name: model_number
attributes.description: Manufacturer model number or SKU for the asset. Used for parts ordering, service manuals, and replacement planning.

attributes.name: net_book_value
attributes.description: Current carrying value of the asset calculated as acquisition cost minus accumulated depreciation. Represents the asset value on the balance sheet.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for additional comments, special handling instructions, or historical context about the asset (e.g., 'Replaced due to fire damage 2022-03-15').

attributes.name: purchase_order_number
attributes.description: Purchase order number associated with the asset acquisition. Provides audit trail to procurement documentation and invoice matching.

attributes.name: salvage_value
attributes.description: Estimated residual value of the asset at the end of its useful life. Subtracted from acquisition cost to determine depreciable base.

attributes.name: serial_number
attributes.description: Manufacturer serial number for the asset. Used for warranty claims, service tracking, and theft recovery.

attributes.name: useful_life_years
attributes.description: Expected useful life of the asset in years as determined by GAAP/IFRS guidelines and company policy. Used to calculate annual depreciation expense.

attributes.name: warranty_expiration_date
attributes.description: Date when the manufacturer or vendor warranty expires. Used to plan for extended service contracts and budget for repairs and maintenance (R&M).

products.name: budget
products.description: Annual and rolling financial budget and forecast records from SAP S/4HANA CO, encompassing plan header and granular line-level allocations with cash forecasting integration. Stores budget version (original, revised, rolling forecast), fiscal year, approval status, and approving authority. Line-level detail specifies GL account, cost center or profit center, fiscal period, budget category (food cost, labor, occupancy, marketing, R&M, CapEx), planned amount, and currency. Supports monthly phasing of annual budgets, variance analysis (actual vs. budget), NRO CapEx budgeting, daypart-level labor budgeting, food cost (COGS%) targets by restaurant unit, cash flow forecasting by period, and liquidity planning for treasury operations.

products.name: bank_account
products.description: Corporate bank account master record and daily transactional statement activity from SAP S/4HANA FI-TR (Treasury). Master data defines all operating, payroll, concentration, and zero-balance accounts across legal entities and geographies — storing bank name, account number (masked), IBAN/routing, account type, currency, cash pool group, signatory list, and reconciliation GL account. Statement lines capture daily electronic bank statement imports including value date, posting date, transaction type (credit/debit), amount, bank reference, counterparty name, clearing status, and matched GL posting. Supports daily automated bank reconciliation, real-time cash position reporting, fraud detection for restaurant cash deposits, POS settlement flow matching, and treasury cash pooling across entities.
